name: Stephanie Murphy
subject: DeSantis is dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
He's abandoned Florida
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2273?t=6&akid=479%2E564421%2EATIM01) Hey there, Rep. Stephanie Murphy here.

In the past few weeks, things have gone from bad to worse here in Florida.

**MAGA Gov. Ron DeSantis has sunk to levels we never thought imaginable.**

[**It’s never been more clear that we must remove Ron DeSantis from office immediately. That’s why I’m supporting Ron Be Gone in their fight to stop him. Will you join us by chipping in $3? »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2275?t=8&akid=479%2E564421%2EATIM01) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2282?t=15&akid=479%2E564421%2EATIM01)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2283?t=16&akid=479%2E564421%2EATIM01)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2284?t=17&akid=479%2E564421%2EATIM01)
**Most recently, Ron DeSantis has decided to wage war on schools.** As COVID-19 cases skyrocket and kids are increasingly getting seriously sick, DeSantis is punishing schools who choose to require masks for the safety of students.

Meanwhile he’s hosting lavish out-of-state fundraisers and rolling in MAGA campaign money.

And, according to a recent poll, the majority of Floridians agree that**DeSantis has abandoned the state of Florida for his own political ambitions.**

It’s clear to me, friend: Ron DeSantis is putting our well being at risk with his careless actions.

[**So team, I’m personally asking you to chip in $3 NOW to the good team at Ron Be Gone, and help us retire Ron DeSantis and save Florida! We need to raise $25,000 by TOMORROW to keep our critical ads and billboards funded. »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/2275?t=19&akid=479%2E564421%2EATIM01)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you for being a part of this effort.

_\-- Rep. Stephanie Murphy (D - FL-07)_
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

name: Demand Biden Resign
subject: Joe Biden is the worst president in history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Do you agree? | ****
---
Peter,

Joe Biden is the worst president in history.

_He is taking zero responsibility for the way he is withdrawing our troops in Afghanistan - resulting in a TALIBAN takeover - and he's even blaming President Trump for it._

Do you think this is OK, Peter?

The reason Biden is passing blame to President Trump is pretty simple - he knows he has FAILED the American people and is floundering.

We want to send a letter to Joe Biden DEMANDING that he resigns as President of the United States IMMEDIATELY. Will you co-sign it for us?

**[Add your name NOW to DEMAND Joe Biden resign as President of the United States.>>](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3b575e786e6f4f32afa64448a53b0bcf&_e=6HWF3I2z0zCUZgX_b4cVs3i_aNlK18eed2MrxOOyWa2h9e5yC4wqX6BclTTQzfoVjICyzAuqZnp9Ki3OHtij0Y9aPyzO-As4_Kr3Dc3BfgpZ7Trk3b6BW9U3mF80dq7xf79wsZQQoY5ROxVF3gj-bvVgv97D2LM6QfqjrVgeHEAyALKWCokvyR54XWf4cZpw5RSs_4ksHtvuiwusClOSeaL9NNleAss-KfUmpwHzrEnnpSp1k30h3uCQ6Vvr2sbKJMofvKRp5uoQn-u9vVtMhHT72xJMtKrE83FrA1u7P_lJkr1FoAh96uKEjMXSMd6rfQOJwb5HFpUrCH-O9YXPLC3ces_72k-8VSXKYbYqOxH9Svop_RNwqUT3PAuR7_k_73SjiW3d7YviO49xD3yS9IDsgBNNhIJZukhF_YPAUUGV6R5EJKtCu94CJHZDO_sBTgYajXEYnNOlRpsBOtEnCg%3D%3D)**

* * *
| _Dear Joe Biden,

Your decision to withdraw troops from Afghanistan and then blame President Trump for your terribly executed plan is despicable. As an American, I expect better.

As Commander-in-Chief, you have failed us and I DEMAND that you officially resign as President of the United States, effective immediately.

Sincerely,
Peter / A Patriotic American_
---
* * *

Our goal is to get 100,000 signatures from American patriots, like YOU, letting Joe Biden know that he has FAILED.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: AB 455 update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Make California Free Again](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorEhCkfCJfu1uroi3YhH2LfLNTcfdnq4NkeI7XnBblqWw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug30&n=1) The new language of AB 455 still is not in print. The Legislature adjourns next Friday. Apparently it will take less than 10 days to decide if we’re a free society. I’ve been asked how a toll road bill could magically become a vaccine passport bill. The answer is our Legislature is a sham. This “gut and amend” trick is one example. As a legislator, I’ll do everything I can to stop this bill. As Governor, I'll terminate the State of Emergency – and there’s nothing the Legislature can do about it. That’s the most consequential action a new Governor can take. It will leave decisions to the most local level there is – that of individual citizens. As citizens, you should be able to think about your Governor with pride. But you shouldn’t have to think about your Governor much at all. Everything should just work. Your life should be yours to live. Traveling the state, I am continually inspired by the amazing volunteers who made the Recall a reality. Thank you for believing California is worth fighting for. [Help me make California free again](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug30&n=2) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lRRCK90LByd_IZ7SYQ32hXdGYSh_QNx24op8gCjcFPsRBdD_8OFMVw-LIYJSa42TU-AuV88avH9ipa6JhY36FJmwW_nNyDb0kH5af9lQuUW9M9hKX3LgSRBYFFMC16MXA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug30&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug30&n=4)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug30&n=5).

name: Erica Smith
subject: the AmERICA Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Just wanted to follow up on our emergency 48-hour fund.
#
Hi, it’s Erica.
Can I be REALLY honest with you for a minute?
I’m pretty worried. We’re significantly behind on our August fundraising.
**That’s why our campaign launched an emergency fundraising goal of $10,000 this morning.**
My team is calling it the AmERICA Fund. Now THAT has a great ring to it!
The goal is to raise $10,000 in 48 hours, and the clock is already ticking. Every penny will go directly to our scrappy campaign for North Carolina.
**Will you please rush a donation of $5 or more to the emergency AmERICA Fund today?**
I wouldn’t ask if catching up on our campaign fundraising wasn’t so important.
**Here’s the best link to use:** [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210830-2-dpwillis67@gmail.com_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13040?refcode=em20210830-395&t=1&akid=395%2E3698%2E2CuAhI)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210830-395-footer&t=2&refcode2=395_3698_2CuAhI&akid=395%2E3698%2E2CuAhI)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: State Fair STOLE Our King Walz Signs
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_stole_king_walz&n=1)
---
Peter \-- On the first day of the Minnesota State Fair, the front office called me and asked us to take down our sign of King Walz. They told me it was disrespectful to the Governor who, at the time, was walking around the fair...maskless. **I told the state fair we will not take down the sign. The whole point of our booth, which was[approved by the state fair](https://www.action4liberty.com/state_fair_silences_political_speech_removes_king_walz_from_booth?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_stole_king_walz&n=2) ahead of time, is to show disrespect to the guy who unilaterally shut down our state and forced masks and vaccines on all of us.** So in the middle of the night, the State Fair personnel took our signs down and stole them without our permission. Make no mistake about it...
## They want to Silence Our Speech!
But we here at Action 4 Liberty don't get bullied around. Our lawyer sent them a letter that afternoon demanding they reinstall our signs or else we will make new ones and charge them for what they took. Since the State Fair didn't return them, I went ahead and had news ones created and our team just delivered them to the booth. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_stole_king_walz&n=3) Apparently, it's been a massive hit with fairgoers. People are coming up and getting selfies with the "forbidden items". Perhaps that's what makes the State Fair bullies upset the most - it's a hit with their customers! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_stole_king_walz&n=4) **By the way, tomorrow they'll be back up on the roof!** We will not back down to government bullies or radical leftists who want to control our lives and silence our speech. Action 4 Liberty is on the political frontlines, standing up for your rights, especially when it comes to pressuring politicians to Stop Vaccine Mandates in Minnesota. The political elite have painted a large target on our backs for taking a courageous stance. They aim to destroy everything we have built. Don't let them! **Help support the one political organization that never cowers to the radical left and the COVID authoritarians! Empower us to keep fighting in this battle!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_stole_king_walz&n=5 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_stole_king_walz&n=5)
---
Listen, we get it from all angles in this fight. The State Fair comes after us for holding Democrat Walz accountable. The Republican establishment comes after us for pressuring RINOs who won't sign the **Stop Vaccine Mandates pledge**.
It's real simple - if politicians won't stand up for our freedoms, then we will bring the pressure to them.
And the most important battleground right now is this fight to Stop Vaccine Mandates. Which is why I hired more phone callers to contact voters across the state. And our field team is working on bringing tens of thousands of new supporters and petition signers into our ranks.
## We cannot lose this battle!
Our numbers are growing by thousands a day right now. The more people in our movement, the more power we have to Stop Vaccine Mandates.
That's why we refused to back down to the State Fair bullies. We must continue putting the message out to Minnesotans so we grow our ranks.

subject: State Fair STOLE Our King Walz Signs
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_removed_sign&n=1)
---
Peter \-- On the first day of the Minnesota State Fair, the front office called me and asked us to take down our sign of King Walz. They told me it was disrespectful to the Governor who, at the time, was walking around the fair...maskless. **I told the state fair we will not take down the sign. The whole point of our booth, which was[approved by the state fair](https://www.action4liberty.com/state_fair_silences_political_speech_removes_king_walz_from_booth?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_removed_sign&n=2) ahead of time, is to show disrespect to the guy who unilaterally shut down our state and forced masks and vaccines on all of us.** So in the middle of the night, the State Fair personnel took our signs down and stole them without our permission. Make no mistake about it...
## They want to Silence Our Speech!
But we here at Action 4 Liberty don't get bullied around. Our lawyer sent them a letter that afternoon demanding they reinstall our signs or else we will make new ones and charge them for what they took. Since the State Fair didn't return them, I went ahead and had news ones created and our team just delivered them to the booth. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_removed_sign&n=3) Apparently, it's been a massive hit with fairgoers. Action 4 Liberty is on the political frontlines, standing up for your rights, especially when it comes to pressuring politicians to Stop Vaccine Mandates in Minnesota. The political elite have painted a large target on our backs for taking a courageous stance. They aim to destroy everything we have built. Don't let them! **Help support the one political organization that never cowers to the radical left and the COVID authoritarians! Empower us to keep fighting in this battle!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_removed_sign&n=5 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=state_fair_removed_sign&n=5)
---
Listen, we get it from all angles in this fight. The State Fair comes after us for holding Democrat Walz accountable. The Republican establishment comes after us for pressuring RINOs who won't sign the **Stop Vaccine Mandates pledge**.
It's real simple - if politicians won't stand up for our freedoms, then we will bring the pressure to them.
And the most important battleground right now is this fight to Stop Vaccine Mandates. Which is why I hired more phone callers to contact voters across the state. And our field team is working on bringing tens of thousands of new supporters and petition signers into our ranks.
## We cannot lose this battle!
Our numbers are growing by thousands a day right now. The more people in our movement, the more power we have to Stop Vaccine Mandates.

Thank you! -Kevin Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Thanks for being a part of this fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Last week, the Texas House passed voter suppression bill SB 1, meaning the
bill is likely only days away from being signed into law by Governor
Abbott.

The passage of this bill reaffirms what many of us have known for a long
time: Republican leaders in this state would rather dismantle our
democracy than be held accountable for the more than 56,000 COVID deaths
that have taken place on their watch, our crumbling power grid that killed
over 700 Texans during the winter storm, and so many other examples of
their failed leadership.

But thanks to people like you, Powered by People has been able to push
back and build a movement focused on electing leaders that truly represent
the people of Texas. Every single day, our volunteers are registering new
voters and encouraging others in their communities to become Volunteer
Deputy Registrars so that they can do the same. We know that registering
voters is crucial to bringing more people into our democracy so that we
can build a better, more responsive government, and we wouldn’t be able to
do this work without the support of people like you.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46863?refcode=ema20210830-151700&t=1001&akid=151700%2E444211%2EohLchi ]So if you can, please consider chipping in $3 or more now
to help us keep up the fight for voting rights in Texas and nationwide.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46863?refcode=ema20210830-151700&amount=3&t=1020&akid=151700%2E444211%2EohLchi ]Contribute $3

Meeting this threat to our democracy will require pushing back on all
fronts — both here in Texas and in Washington, DC, where our federal
lawmakers have the power to pass voting rights legislation that would
override voter suppression laws like SB 1 in Texas and across the country.

The U.S. House of Representatives has passed two critical bills — the For
the People Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Act — which have the potential
to stop voter suppression and save our democracy. But currently, both
bills face an uncertain future thanks to the Senate filibuster.

Powered by People has been doing the necessary work to bring thousands
upon thousands of people together to take to the streets, rally in front
of the state capitol, and keep the pressure up on President Biden to do
everything in his power to reform the filibuster to allow voting rights
legislation to pass. We will only be able to get this done if we bring
enough people together to call on President Biden to take action.

Your
support allows Powered by People to continue fighting for our democracy on
all fronts. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46863?refcode=ema20210830-151700&t=1021&akid=151700%2E444211%2EohLchi ]Please, donate $3 or more to support our
work to register new voters, fight against voter suppression, and protect
our democracy.

Thank you for your support,

Kate Roberts
Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46863?refcode=ema20210830-151700&t=1022&akid=151700%2E444211%2EohLchi ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=151700%2E444211%2EohLchi

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: President Biden's Disastrous Presidency
body:
| | | | Joe Biden's presidency has been MORE DISASTROUS than any of us could have imagined.
---

Now, President Biden's bad judgment has caused the U.S. to leave many billions worth of guns, assault vehicles, helicopters, and other advanced military equipment behind In Afghanistan — falling right into the hands of the Taliban!

clean_body: | | | | Joe Biden's presidency has been MORE DISASTROUS than any of us could have imagined. Dear Peter, Joe Biden's presidency has been MORE DISASTROUS than any of us could have imagined. Now, President Biden's bad judgment has caused the U.S. to leave many billions worth of guns, assault vehicles, helicopters, and other advanced military equipment behind In Afghanistan — falling right into the hands of the Taliban! Can this guy get any more RECKLESS? This is why I am fighting back, Peter. President Biden, and those influencing his decisions, must be stopped before more damage is done. If you want to help Defend America from Biden's horrific decision making, then I need you to STEP UP TONIGHT to help us meet our important End-of-Month fundraising deadline. | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: Kim Travis, Campaign Director
subject: Upcoming Deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, I wanted to check in on this with you. Do you have a moment to look this over?
Peter, our campaign needs your help.As Campaign Director for Congressman Bryan Steil, I know we face a big challenge in 2022, but I'm counting on our supporters to help us deliver a Republican wave.We can't stand by as Joe Biden takes our nation backwards.[**We need your help to restore common sense in Washington. The Democrats have shown that their policies don 't work. Donate now to help us win in 2022 before the August 31st deadline.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkylijk-idtjvlhlh-r/)**We cannot let them keep the House in 2022. It has been less than one year and we have felt the effects of big-government policies: rising inflation, and a weaker America. ** None of this will change while Nancy Pelosi remains Speaker of the House. **_But, she knows a Red Wave is coming. It is your chance to prove it. _**[**Please help us hit our goal before midnight on August 31 to help us take back the House and stop the Biden-Pelosi political machine.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkylijk-idtjvlhlh-y/) We need to hit our goal of $1,775 to make sure we have the necessary resources to win. Anything you can contribute is greatly appreciated. Kim
--
**Kim Travis**
Campaign Director [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkylijk-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkylijk-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkylijk-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkylijk-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-fkylijk-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58222644:6LRIbs2No:m:1:3253819041:3CD59CFE9B853F5E389C760EC4EB7BF8:r)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58222644:6LRIbs2No:m:1:3253819041:3CD59CFE9B853F5E389C760EC4EB7BF8:r)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58222644:6LRIbs2No:m:1:3253819041:3CD59CFE9B853F5E389C760EC4EB7BF8:r)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58222644:6LRIbs2No:m:1:3253819041:3CD59CFE9B853F5E389C760EC4EB7BF8:r)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58222644:6LRIbs2No:m:1:3253819041:3CD59CFE9B853F5E389C760EC4EB7BF8:r)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58222644:6LRIbs2No:m:1:3253819041:3CD59CFE9B853F5E389C760EC4EB7BF8:r)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58222644:6LRIbs2No:m:1:3253819041:3CD59CFE9B853F5E389C760EC4EB7BF8:r)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58222644:6LRIbs2No:m:1:3253819041:3CD59CFE9B853F5E389C760EC4EB7BF8:r)

**-> They can't arrest all of us or keep us locked down indefinitely. **

_Why?_

We can say NOーbecause Americans are a free people.

This nation _by the people_ , _for the people_ , and _of the people_ was created to protect freedom and liberty in moments just like this,****_**when politicians and bureaucrats use fear and lies to usher in tyranny on the American people. **_

I'm not going to let their fear tactics win, I'll continue being the champion for liberty and freedom, but it's not a fight I or anyone can do alone. That's why I'm setting a BIG goal of raising $25,000 before 11:59 PM on August 31st to continue funding the fight for liberty. [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58223054:6B-FEs29N:m:1:3253819041:B8E2DCB8C58C5DF053647CC2BB9CDB52:r)

I've stood consistently for freedom regardless of which party had power. And I'm not going to stop now. **But this isn 't a fight any American can win alone. **

That's why I need you on my side.

**Please, chip in what you can before our end of month deadline at this link:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2797431/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58223050:6B-FEs29N:m:1:3253819041:B8E2DCB8C58C5DF053647CC2BB9CDB52:r)**

Rand Paul

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: Resign!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58223956:JFgPvs2nN:m:1:3103520637:75EB7A38DD93CA7810924A8B925604A2:r "Headline") Peter, **I miss having a President who didn 't back down to America's enemies.** Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin should RESIGN immediately following the complete collapse of Afghanistan at the hands of the Taliban. We haven't seen images like the ones from the front lines since the fall of Saigon. This is NOT a display of American Exceptionalism, and it's NOT the way we treat our men and women in uniform and the American citizens on the ground! Everyone responsible for this botched withdrawal should resign immediately! **[If you believe Joe Biden failed our Armed Forces and our American interests on the ground in Afghanistan, stand with me by making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58223957:JFgPvs2nN:m:1:3103520637:75EB7A38DD93CA7810924A8B925604A2:r "If you believe Joe Biden failed our Armed Forces
and our American interests on the ground in Afghanistan, stand with me by making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000
today.")** Joe Biden's failure in Afghanistan destabilizes the Middle East and jeopardizes our security and the safety of our allies in Israel. Since July:
* Joe Biden has assured the American people Kabul WOULD NOT fall to the Taliban.
* He has given the Taliban a list of Americans and other high-profile allies, putting them in danger of being captured and tortured... or worse.
* He presided over a suicide bombing near an entrance to the airport in Kabul, leading to the deaths of more than a dozen U.S. military personnel and dozens of others.
* He and Secretary Blinken have begun importing unvetted immigrants from Afghanistan, including those with potential ties to extremist groups!

President Trump issued a timeline for withdrawal, but he would never have left American forces and diplomats on the ground without resources to defend our interests and get out safely. **Joe Biden surrendered in Afghanistan, and _he surrendered the America First policies that make our nation great_. Joe Biden is failing to lead our country, and it's absolutely shameful.** It's time to hold Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Lloyd Austin accountable - they should resign immediately! **[I'm forcing their hand in Congress, and I'm asking for your immediate help. If you want to save America's greatness in the face of the Taliban takeover of Afghanistan, please chip in $1,000, $250, $100, $50, or even $25 right away.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58223958:JFgPvs2nN:m:1:3103520637:75EB7A38DD93CA7810924A8B925604A2:r "I’m forcing their hand in Congress, and
I’m asking for your immediate help. If you want to save America’s greatness in the face of the Taliban takeover of Afghanistan, please
chip in $1,000, $250, $100, $50, or even $25 right away.")** Joe Biden's failure in Afghanistan will echo across the globe, weaken our position as a global leader, and embolden terrorists. **[You and I must hold him accountable.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58223956:JFgPvs2nN:m:1:3103520637:75EB7A38DD93CA7810924A8B925604A2:r "You and I must
hold him accountable.")** Thank you. Protecting Our Sovereignty, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58223956:JFgPvs2nN:m:1:3103520637:75EB7A38DD93CA7810924A8B925604A2:r "Andy Biggs") Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5)
Chairman, House Freedom Caucus
---

body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/F3Ge17snHOkSTkmcXwWzfvmpU_QLE-H5dRLpd_Z-v3g=/hQr4V04lvPY8K-bV8HIoajxvqwZI27y6WbaS4HUyj3c=)
---
Friend -- I'm working hard every day to win re-election to the House and help elect Democrats up and down the ticket, but extreme Republicans up and down the ticket will stop at nothing to turn back the clocks on the progress we've made with their divisive rhetoric and lies. [**Tonight at midnight is our August fundraising deadline, and I 'm asking directly for your help to make sure we have the resources we need to win re-election and keep Virginia blue this November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/F3Ge17snHOkSTkmcXwWzfvmpU_QLE-H5dRLpd_Z-v3g=/JYq-oGZ8FwaZlEsNjPjyz3yrHa3fJ7Y0yX_f7dLQ2t8=) This Commonwealth needs fresh voices and ideas as we enter this new Virginia decade that reflect who we are, what we value, and where we're going. My commitment to giving a voice to those left behind is unflinching, and we will work tirelessly over the years ahead to make Virginia stronger and more just for every citizen. That starts with keeping our Democratic Majority in the House and securing another statewide sweep this year. **[I hope you will join me in this fight by contributing to our efforts before our August fundraising deadline at midnight so we can keep our progress going.](https://act.myngp.com/el/F3Ge17snHOkSTkmcXwWzfvmpU_QLE-H5dRLpd_Z-v3g=/r7tJhs7SNfPr9OSWtai4jn4pJlnDwQUYtWoKKpIgMAs=)** \- Jay Jones

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Republicans could nominate someone much worse to take Pat’s place
#

Hey there — we know these emails pile up, but we promise there’s a good reason we’re reaching out again.
The thing is, Republican Senator Pat Toomey has been a disgrace to Pennsylvania’s working families.
It’s the truth! And we’re glad he’s retiring, but the reality is that Republicans could nominate someone much worse to take his place.
So we’re building a huge movement starting NOW to replace him with a working-class champion — someone who will go to bat for working families and NEVER back down.
That’s Malcolm. He’s been fighting for our agenda that puts working folks first (including a $15 living wage, canceling student debt, and climate justice) in Harrisburg. And now, we’re taking this fight to the U.S. Senate.
**A big surge of donations before our midnight deadline is just what we need to finish August strong. Can you pitch in today?**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34969003/303618830/-353695395?refcode2=808476c7-630a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210831-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg0NzZjNy02MzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lvq9AlJzz8VfXgR4HUHnJFIWz8Rk4MPY_28eKjYlcm8=)**
Look, any Democrat would be a better senator than Pat Toomey, but we can’t just send anybody to Washington.
We deserve leaders who look like us and will fight to put our families — and our struggles — first.
And no other candidate in this race knows the struggles working people face better than Malcolm.
He knows what it’s like to face eviction, live with a mountain of student debt, and watch his mom ration her insulin because it’s too expensive.
**So we know that Malcolm will go to the Senate and fight every day to meet the challenges of poverty, climate, debt, housing, and healthcare — but it’s our job to get him there.**
[Are you with us? If you’re able, please pitch in a few bucks before we close the books on August. clean_body: Republicans could nominate someone much worse to take Pat’s place Hey there — we know these emails pile up, but we promise there’s a good reason we’re reaching out again. The thing is, Republican Senator Pat Toomey has been a disgrace to Pennsylvania’s working families. It’s the truth! And we’re glad he’s retiring, but the reality is that Republicans could nominate someone much worse to take his place. So we’re building a huge movement starting NOW to replace him with a working-class champion — someone who will go to bat for working families and NEVER back down. That’s Malcolm. He’s been fighting for our agenda that puts working folks first (including a $15 living wage, canceling student debt, and climate justice) in Harrisburg. And now, we’re taking this fight to the U.S. Senate. A big surge of donations before our midnight deadline is just what we need to finish August strong. Can you pitch in today? = Look, any Democrat would be a better senator than Pat Toomey, but we can’t just send anybody to Washington. We deserve leaders who look like us and will fight to put our families — and our struggles — first. And no other candidate in this race knows the struggles working people face better than Malcolm. He knows what it’s like to face eviction, live with a mountain of student debt, and watch his mom ration her insulin because it’s too expensive. So we know that Malcolm will go to the Senate and fight every day to meet the challenges of poverty, climate, debt, housing, and healthcare — but it’s our job to get him there. = = Thanks for helping out today, Team Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: FWD: Sorry to bother you on a Sunday, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | | Did you miss my email yesterday? We are just ONE DAY away from the most important deadline of the year, and I need your help.

Check out my note below, and please **[CHIP IN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58223573:6U87Ds2fN:m:1:3253819041:45754A0B1D2B016E26396089E41B3F50:r "CHIP IN")** whatever you can to help us defeat the radical Left.

-Mike

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Mike Pompeo** <mike@cavpac.com>
Date: Sun, Aug 29, 2021 at 11:52 AM
Subject: Sorry to bother you on a Sunday
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58223573:6U87Ds2fN:m:1:3253819041:45754A0B1D2B016E26396089E41B3F50:r)
---

I'm sorry to bother you on a Monday, but _**[I need a quick favor.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58223573:6U87Ds2fN:m:1:3253819041:45754A0B1D2B016E26396089E41B3F50:r "but I need a quick
favor.")**_

My team just let me know that we are still coming up a little short of our fundraising goal ahead of the big deadline tomorrow.

**Here 's why this is so important: we need to exceed our goal in order to have the resources necessary to help principled conservatives WIN BIG in the upcoming elections. **

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58223573:6U87Ds2fN:m:1:3253819041:45754A0B1D2B016E26396089E41B3F50:r)
---

I'm traveling all over the country to support Republican candidates in important races like Sarah Huckabee Sanders in Arkansas, Tim Scott in South Carolina, Ashley Hinson in Iowa and Lee Zeldin in New York.

The Democrats have their Big Money machine in overdrive collecting cash from bigwig donors, so we need to match their Big Money with support from real, patriotic Americans like you. They may have the Hollywood elites on their side, but I know we can defeat them if enough grassroots conservatives chip in $100, $50 or $25 dollars toward our big goal.
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58223573:6U87Ds2fN:m:1:3253819041:45754A0B1D2B016E26396089E41B3F50:r)
---
If we come up short, that will mean open borders, higher taxes, socialist policies and new restrictions on our ability to live out our faith. Our core American values are at stake, and **[I am counting on you to help us stop the Democrats before it is too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58223573:6U87Ds2fN:m:1:3253819041:45754A0B1D2B016E26396089E41B3F50:r "I am counting on you to help us stop the Democrats before it is too late.")**

All eyes are watching, so please help get us across the finish line. I'm counting on you.
---
Never Give an Inch,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58223573:6U87Ds2fN:m:1:3253819041:45754A0B1D2B016E26396089E41B3F50:r)
---

name: Stefanie Sass
subject: Need help from you
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I’m worried. I just ran the numbers for August, and we’re $9,231 short of our goal.

This is concerning, team. Ron DeSantis will spend $150 million on his re-election— and most of that money will go towards attacking Nikki.

If we wait until next year to fight back, we won’t stand a chance. If you’re in a position to give, please click here to chip in now and help us defeat DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=tue]

We’re in a uniquely strong position to win this race, friends. Nikki is the only Democrat to win statewide in Florida since 2012, and Ron DeSantis is more vulnerable than ever before.

Floridians are fed up with watching DeSantis run for President instead of leading us through the COVID crisis. I know we can win if supporters like you step up and help us build a strong campaign.

Friends, please click here to donate before midnight and help us build a winning campaign against Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=tue]

Nikki is counting on supporters like you. Thanks for standing with us--we wouldn’t be here without you.

Warmly,
Stefanie Sass
Finance Director

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: RE: URGENT: Betsy DeVos will be in New Hampshire TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Did you get a chance to read my email, friend? Right-wing billionaire **Betsy DeVos will be in New Hampshire TODAY** to rally Trump's base against me. Her visit is _a clear indicator that Donald Trump and his far-right network are all in on flipping this seat red._ From McConnell-linked super PACs taking out massive ad buys in New Hampshire to repeated visits from top Republicans like Betsy DeVos and Mike Pence, this race is shaping up to be the _most crucial and expensive Senate race in the country._ With less than 24 hours until our August fundraising goal, Betsy DeVos' visit could not have come at a more pivotal time. **My campaign is still $10,581 short, and if we miss this goal, it could tip the scales in Mitch McConnell's favor.** That's why I'm back in your inbox to ask if I can count on your support in this critical race. **[Can you please chip in $5 before midnight tonight to close the gap? Whatever you give will go a long way in a race this consequential.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34972104/303630345/565612021?refcode=e20210831_devos-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE3M2QxZi02OTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gmURTzyWpNs_bQpbIVTPHpL6ySKAm20iWXlYdrrFoGg=)** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34972105/303630346/565612021?refcode=e20210831_devos-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE3M2QxZi02OTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gmURTzyWpNs_bQpbIVTPHpL6ySKAm20iWXlYdrrFoGg=)

Thank you in advance.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Maggie Hassan**
Date: Mon., Aug 30, 2021
Subject: URGENT: Betsy DeVos will be in New Hampshire TOMORROW

Friends –
Tomorrow, right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, **Betsy DeVos, will be in New Hampshire to rally Trump's base.** DeVos and her family have donated hundreds of millions of dollars to Republican causes and candidates – and her visit is an unmistakable signal that the Trump Network is laser-focused on flipping New Hampshire red.
During Betsy Devos' confirmation hearing back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system, and it was clear she was completely unqualified to serve. I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. **Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.**
I'm reaching out today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done working toward a more robust public education system. But the GOP is already sinking millions into New Hampshire, and this visit will only boost their massive war chest. **With top Republicans fully invested in this race, it's bad news for our slim Senate majority.**
I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority. **[I hate asking for money, but my campaign is falling behind our August goal with less than 48 hours until our deadline. Will you please rush $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help us win in New Hampshire and protect our vulnerable Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34972107/303630354/565612021?refcode=e20210831_devos-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE3M2QxZi02OTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gmURTzyWpNs_bQpbIVTPHpL6ySKAm20iWXlYdrrFoGg=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34972115/303630383/565612021?refcode=e20210831_devos-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE3M2QxZi02OTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gmURTzyWpNs_bQpbIVTPHpL6ySKAm20iWXlYdrrFoGg=)
I'm fighting to give New Hampshire families a brighter future by strengthening public education, expanding the Child Tax Credit, protecting health care, and more. But there's still much work ahead – and if Republicans regain control of the Senate, they will undo all of the progress we've made so far.
**[I need you in this with me. So please, consider making a $5 donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34972117/303630385/565612021?refcode=e20210831_devos-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTE3M2QxZi02OTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gmURTzyWpNs_bQpbIVTPHpL6ySKAm20iWXlYdrrFoGg=)**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

Our end of August fundraising deadline is just hours away. Every dollar we raise between now and midnight will be spent on our efforts to protect our Blue Majority. The clock is ticking, and the stakes couldn't be higher!
[**Join our fight by making a contribution before our deadline at midnight!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/aFw18C-dKqf-WstjHZdaEkxec5-fe5vGCeMRsFbJM-g=/n7UHJ58KBxar6uDhuZ5L2IS_zMoxNNuRdQPU-OK5CI8=)
We can't do this without you.
\- Team Northam

_Begin forwarded message:_
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aFw18C-dKqf-WstjHZdaEkxec5-fe5vGCeMRsFbJM-g=/XpkNDYaHRNr3-4x7c9oERf82xCz6nhzNYe_iCctX58o=)
---
Friend, I'll cut straight to the chase: our August fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and I need your help. We **__must__** protect our slim Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and secure another statewide sweep if we're going to protect the progress we've made over the past four years. Republicans are on the attack, recently announcing a six-figure ad campaign funded by out of state dark money, putting our narrow majority -- and the progress we've made on gun safety, justice reform, and women's reproductive healthcare access -- at risk. **[Please contribute as generously as you can before our August fundraising deadline Tuesday at midnight so we can keep Virginia blue!](https://act.myngp.com/el/aFw18C-dKqf-WstjHZdaEkxec5-fe5vGCeMRsFbJM-g=/XpkNDYaHRNr3-4x7c9oERf82xCz6nhzNYe_iCctX58o=)** Let me be clear -- this first ad buy is only the beginning. Republicans will stop at nothing to fan the flames of divisiveness across our Commonwealth. [**I hope we can count on you to donate as generously as you can today so we can keep the progress going.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/aFw18C-dKqf-WstjHZdaEkxec5-fe5vGCeMRsFbJM-g=/n7UHJ58KBxar6uDhuZ5L2IS_zMoxNNuRdQPU-OK5CI8=) \- Ralph Northam

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: I’m personally asking for your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I wanted to take a moment to reach out to you personally to ask for your support before tonight’s fundraising deadline.

I wanted to take a moment to reach out to you personally to ask for your support before tonight’s fundraising deadline.
When I decided to run for Senate, I knew we had to try something different than what we’ve typically seen in North Carolina.
This has to be a people-focused campaign that speaks to the hopes and needs of every North Carolinian — particularly those who have been left behind and ignored by Washington.
I know firsthand what it takes to win here because I’m the only Democrat in this race with a record of winning statewide. Each time we’ve won by running a campaign that excites and turns out as many voters as possible, and that’s what we plan to do again in this campaign.
I promise you that winning this race is possible, but it will only happen if we come together to build the largest people-powered campaign our state has ever seen.
That means we need you to invest now to help us build on our momentum and grow our grassroots team.
**[Will you please consider making a $3 donation to our campaign before our deadline at midnight? Republicans have already pledged millions in spending on this race, and I cannot take them on alone.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34973133/303634363/-928165870?refcode2=95039068-6b0a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210831-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTAzOTA2OC02YjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyteCTA0POcRRc7-H5YvAzfMgBWbMRteTRiSQKfMeJ4=)**
I’m grateful for everything you have helped us accomplish so far. Together, with faith and hard work, we can win this campaign and give the people of North Carolina new leadership in the Senate.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34973134/303634365/-928165870?refcode2=95039068-6b0a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210831-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTAzOTA2OC02YjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uyteCTA0POcRRc7-H5YvAzfMgBWbMRteTRiSQKfMeJ4=)**

* * *
Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina

name: Team Franchot
subject: The Democratic Frontrunner
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
Time is short, so we’ll keep this quick. We’re facing our end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight, and we’re just $5,500 short of our fundraising goal for the month of August -- so we’re looking for a huge number of grassroots donations to make up the difference!
It’s incredibly important that we keep meeting our monthly fundraising goals. Peter Franchot is the frontrunner in the Democratic field and keeping pace with our fundraising goals on a month-by-month basis is the key to maintaining our momentum in this competitive race. If we fall behind, we risk being outspent by Republican opponents in what the Washington Post has said could be the most expensive election in our state’s history.
We can’t let that happen.
That’s why we’re asking: will you rush a donation to help us hit our fundraising goal for August by our 11:59 PM deadline tonight?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august2021fundraising?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august2021fundraising?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august2021fundraising?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august2021fundraising?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august2021fundraising]Peter Franchot is leading the rest of the field because he’s the unprecedented candidate that we need for these unprecedented times. As our state’s chief fiscal officer, he has an unparalleled understanding of the state’s budget -- a must-have skill for Maryland’s next Governor that cannot be learned on the job.
He was the first candidate to release a detailed policy platform outlining how he’ll get to work on Day One to deliver results for our small businesses and working families. And he has more endorsements from current elected officials than any candidate in this race.
We have the momentum in this race -- and we need your help to keep our foot on the pedal. With your support, we can achieve a bold vision for the future of Maryland that includes creating 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future, connecting our communities with statewide public transit, taking bold action to fight climate change, and instituting a concrete plan to achieve economic, social and political equity for Black Marylanders.
If you can give anything to help our campaign keep track with our fundraising goal for August, we would greatly appreciate it. Click here to chip in whatever you can to help us shore up the $5,500 we need to meet our goal and maintain our momentum in this highly competitive race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august2021fundraising?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august2021fundraising?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648

clean_body: [ Peter -- Time is short, so we’ll keep this quick. We’re facing our end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight, and we’re just $5,500 short of our fundraising goal for the month of August -- so we’re looking for a huge number of grassroots donations to make up the difference! It’s incredibly important that we keep meeting our monthly fundraising goals. Peter Franchot is the frontrunner in the Democratic field and keeping pace with our fundraising goals on a month-by-month basis is the key to maintaining our momentum in this competitive race. If we fall behind, we risk being outspent by Republican opponents in what the Washington Post has said could be the most expensive election in our state’s history. We can’t let that happen. That’s why we’re asking: will you rush a donation to help us hit our fundraising goal for August by our 11:59 PM deadline tonight? CHIP IN $10 [] CHIP IN $20.22 [] CHIP IN $50 [] CHIP IN $100 [] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [ Franchot is leading the rest of the field because he’s the unprecedented candidate that we need for these unprecedented times. As our state’s chief fiscal officer, he has an unparalleled understanding of the state’s budget -- a must-have skill for Maryland’s next Governor that cannot be learned on the job. He was the first candidate to release a detailed policy platform outlining how he’ll get to work on Day One to deliver results for our small businesses and working families. And he has more endorsements from current elected officials than any candidate in this race. We have the momentum in this race -- and we need your help to keep our foot on the pedal. With your support, we can achieve a bold vision for the future of Maryland that includes creating 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future, connecting our communities with statewide public transit, taking bold action to fight climate change, and instituting a concrete plan to achieve economic, social and political equity for Black Marylanders. If you can give anything to help our campaign keep track with our fundraising goal for August, we would greatly appreciate it. Click here to chip in whatever you can to help us shore up the $5,500 we need to meet our goal and maintain our momentum in this highly competitive race. body:

Friend, I had to reach out to you personally with an urgent ask:
My staff just let me know we're still falling _$4,228 short_ of our critical end-of-month fundraising goal - so I'm counting on your support by midnight tonight, before it's too late.
Missing our goal is exactly what the GOP is betting on. Here in this state, the political ground could be shifting: Republicans just flipped a Connecticut State Senate seat red, the first GOP flip of a state legislative seat since President Biden was inaugurated. Meanwhile, national Republicans are closely following our fundraising numbers - and looking for any sign of weakness they can exploit so they can turn Connecticut's U.S. Senate seat red, too.
That's why I'm asking for people like you to show up now and prove to Mitch McConnell and his extremist Republican allies that this seat will not be an easy pickup. This end-of-month goal is too important, and we simply can't afford to fall short now, so I'm asking:
**Please, will you rush a donation of $5 or more to close this fundraising gap before midnight tonight? Here's the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1067-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Dick

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m running for the United States Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58225416:6oKpcs2NO:m:1:3253819041:1C99CF2F4CC2245CCB30A82651B9D1D4:r)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58225416:6oKpcs2NO:m:1:3253819041:1C99CF2F4CC2245CCB30A82651B9D1D4:r)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58225416:6oKpcs2NO:m:1:3253819041:1C99CF2F4CC2245CCB30A82651B9D1D4:r)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58225416:6oKpcs2NO:m:1:3253819041:1C99CF2F4CC2245CCB30A82651B9D1D4:r)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58225416:6oKpcs2NO:m:1:3253819041:1C99CF2F4CC2245CCB30A82651B9D1D4:r)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58225416:6oKpcs2NO:m:1:3253819041:1C99CF2F4CC2245CCB30A82651B9D1D4:r)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58225416:6oKpcs2NO:m:1:3253819041:1C99CF2F4CC2245CCB30A82651B9D1D4:r)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58225416:6oKpcs2NO:m:1:3253819041:1C99CF2F4CC2245CCB30A82651B9D1D4:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58225417:6oKpcs2NO:m:1:3253819041:1C99CF2F4CC2245CCB30A82651B9D1D4:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

With such a slim majority in the House of Representatives, it’s no exaggeration to say that whether or not we reelect Stephanie could mean the difference between Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Speaker Kevin McCarthy (or worse -- Speaker Donald Trump!). = We’re counting on you! \-- Team Murphy = * | | Paid for by Stephanie Murphy for Congress | Stephanie Murphy for Congress PO Box 205 Winter Park, FL 32790 United States | We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. body:
National Voter Registration Day is just around the corner, and we need your help.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34981980/303654485/1571363332?refcode=em_fr_210831NVRD_n_ng_90do_6_ng_testa_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzE2OWI4NS03NDBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5EpKEjlqvHF_jZluITHEL6sAyOJ9RYVi_Z_Ho_Iswf0=) Team — we’re less than a month away from National Voter Registration Day, and we need your help. Since 2013, NextGen has registered more than 1.4 million young voters. **In 2020, those young voters made the difference in electing President Biden and the Democratic majority in Congress.** In honor of National Voter Registration Day on September 28, we’re setting a goal of receiving 75 grassroots donations to elect progressive leaders who will prioritize the needs of young voters and drive up voter turnout in key battleground states. clean_body: National Voter Registration Day is just around the corner, and we need your help. | | = Team — we’re less than a month away from National Voter Registration Day, and we need your help. Since 2013, NextGen has registered more than 1.4 million young voters. In 2020, those young voters made the difference in electing President Biden and the Democratic majority in Congress. In honor of National Voter Registration Day on September 28, we’re setting a goal of receiving 75 grassroots donations to elect progressive leaders who will prioritize the needs of young voters and drive up voter turnout in key battleground states. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Our future depends on the voices of young voters and action from leaders who will prioritize progressive policies to: Protect the environment. End the burden of student debt. Ensure a more equitable future for all of us. = Thank you, Lillie Catlin Vice President, Programs NextGen America | | At NextGen, we Identify, Engage and Mobilize the #YouthVote by meeting young communities where they're at with issues that are directly affecting them. Will you join us in making it happen? NextGen America** 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503

name: Jim Jordan
subject: POLL: Mandatory COVID VACCINES?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Would you support a federal vaccine mandate? Or are you able to make your own healthcare decisions? Let us know. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58717318:WLbOxqdNC:m:1:2247059263:5298848C4EA55E47A0EEE9685CB08116:r)
---

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We've lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58717318:WLbOxqdNC:m:1:2247059263:5298848C4EA55E47A0EEE9685CB08116:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58717318:WLbOxqdNC:m:1:2247059263:5298848C4EA55E47A0EEE9685CB08116:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 31st

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58717318:WLbOxqdNC:m:1:2247059263:5298848C4EA55E47A0EEE9685CB08116:r)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don't wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58717318:WLbOxqdNC:m:1:2247059263:5298848C4EA55E47A0EEE9685CB08116:r)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58717318:WLbOxqdNC:m:1:2247059263:5298848C4EA55E47A0EEE9685CB08116:r)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58717318:WLbOxqdNC:m:1:2247059263:5298848C4EA55E47A0EEE9685CB08116:r)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

That's why Marco Lopez (D) – a former border-city mayor and Obama administration alum – is running for governor to defeat these Republican extremists and flip Arizona blue. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that this race is a TOSS-UP, which means Democrats need a fighter here who can win. But POLITICO is reporting that Republicans are getting ready to spend BIG to defeat us – and right now, we're falling short of the resources we need to fight back and win this race. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Lopez Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2021 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

name: Erik Aadland
subject: Failure to lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
Joe Biden has done nothing but to embarrass and weaken our nation in the past 8 months. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b1ed4daa171342f9b9d9ebdc16b8772b&_e=sylTkx-h1rucCJKBRA71-eiEmdZoaexu2uaEI-afXrN7VEVZ6S6Rv8GejYgMlQWE0wIkz8-GSxMwUGJIu-UmgEuAq1Ybwx8oBZ6_6fF34yL2brtHpiFi55ZP5HIeLvW3Xy8QxFaL-wBT_a0FS4uupQh-ubi_fXqwl5df7-TPsBWBnXyZTTjuGb3tWLhtIIcD2ruLkragwPGoIfGrEPVjeW63h8pGpEApQmZ9wfT1e21TO1zwDVuHeAz_wfvFP41zndPf5MP9Y8ya27Zrn1ZSJWV_VY0sH43eeQtwz3Z4ilIsk43ISYMg8WDz59G8uNFidcSMJBoPbCEPlQk8Xw1fht10eL-Y_teXThxsDFm1pHWOl5_zuVKBMxl9sTPKv3c3RRxg2Fm3cE5XHaLG5S1WSgVUZVU0Lp-ieu_Z8grVTrE%3D)

---
Fellow American,

**Joe Biden has gotten too many passes, too many second chances, and his only accomplishment is failing our nation.** He’s failed as a leader and done nothing but throw our country into disarray while embarrassing us on a national scale.

Right now, myself and so many of my fellow service members keep asking questions like: Why has Joe Biden allowed this chaos and death to happen in Afghanistan? Why did he put troops back on the ground in a vulnerable location, and then tell the entire world where to find them? Why did he allow billions of dollars worth of military equipment and technology to fall into the hands of our enemies? How long until Iran or China gets ahold of that technology to exploit and use against us?

**None of us will ever get a straight answer from a lifelong politician like Joe Biden. Unlike this President and so many of his liberal lackeys in the Senate, I served my country in uniform instead of a suit. I served in Iraq, in Afghanistan, and** __**this President has done nothing but fail our nation, turn his back on our troops, and lie to us all with false promises.**__

Joe Biden’s fellow Democrats in Congress, like Senator Bennet, have let him slide on every mistake he’s made. Yet every single news organization from CNN to Fox News is unanimous in describing Joe Biden's actions as failures, the reason Afghanistan has fallen, and why people have died.

My fellow soldiers and I didn’t fight for our country just to have a feckless and weak government making our nation more dangerous both outside and inside our borders. That needs to end, and [**I aim to do that in the United States Senate.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b1ed4daa171342f9b9d9ebdc16b8772b&_e=sylTkx-h1rucCJKBRA71-eiEmdZoaexu2uaEI-afXrN7VEVZ6S6Rv8GejYgMlQWE0wIkz8-GSxMwUGJIu-UmgEuAq1Ybwx8oBZ6_6fF34yL2brtHpiFi55ZP5HIeLvW3Xy8QxFaL-wBT_a0FS4uupQh-ubi_fXqwl5df7-TPsBWBnXyZTTjuGb3tWLhtIIcD2ruLkragwPGoIfGrEPVjeUq-cGvT6rOLIVc4e1H6IwdZVTWMAAwwjOFO0a3in_kVU2kwJaL7n7x_CjLJc7UDtOclDba9AayZDydJOg2ml_VoBvA6dw8TuIt94V0kqe0RT2J6F317D_4OQhfsvpERmgqeJVZmIVwMjT9JbcvXBmu4ztDu9CthtxQnbYRLx9eGREnRtXCTKL6X0zuE-TEL-nv0BHGawXLRqwajnJXIGq4%3D)

Our nation deserves better than the failures of Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats. They’ve barely been in charge for 8 months and they keep failing our nation. Enough is enough.

Right now, I need your help to win back the Majority in the United States Senate. We don’t need any more elitist politicians who embarrass our nation on the world stage, we need conservatives who want to help our nation get back on its feet.

**If you agree, then** [**join me**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b1ed4daa171342f9b9d9ebdc16b8772b&_e=sylTkx-h1rucCJKBRA71-eiEmdZoaexu2uaEI-afXrN7VEVZ6S6Rv8GejYgMlQWE0wIkz8-GSxMwUGJIu-UmgEuAq1Ybwx8oBZ6_6fF34yL2brtHpiFi55ZP5HIeLvW3Xy8QxFaL-wBT_a0FS4uupQh-ubi_fXqwl5df7-TPsBWBnXyZTTjuGb3tWLhtIIcD2ruLkragwPGoIfGrEPVjeSZKsFx_utmQsqIBDkHAP0nRGNG1UgVEJvO7sPxa7SuHY_HZz-CSPRMjT3mTKvL3hnRfnX1WdJE_c4D_OpRmSglgZVtKnLp7Hwq8i5zS39hLkFQb21onwGRC8Eq8hFVCeG74nL2Gb3vtgjeAZA5IZ4yGOgWnZmFmW-URivy22Oq7rumx8LnH9A7IYNGzaR4Hunk-iCvgW12Cg8TEaeBFWWo%3D) **in the fight to take back the U.S. Senate so we can start holding Joe Biden responsible for his failures**.

For a better America,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b1ed4daa171342f9b9d9ebdc16b8772b&_e=sylTkx-h1rucCJKBRA71-eiEmdZoaexu2uaEI-afXrN7VEVZ6S6Rv8GejYgMlQWE0wIkz8-GSxMwUGJIu-UmgEuAq1Ybwx8oBZ6_6fF34yL2brtHpiFi55ZP5HIeLvW3Xy8QxFaL-wBT_a0FS4uupQh-ubi_fXqwl5df7-TPsBWBnXyZTTjuGb3tWLhtIIcD2ruLkragwPGoIfGrEPVjee2s9qBBeAt9A58g3BWV8bf03R0TWAqTMGGxmktRdNCXSjeG04ETUUB58AQdynLwdrsUlcsGuPBXqVTfS6S6L9y-NmKrUTikP9UCW9FL9d6VW9eHifWVSdgVWfV-i6Z7gGJq_SkuNZKjRY59QzQBSWHe86ZPDDulmXBR72E1LX44iDCs3SxlwWI2C3SaBTeJE5L7UzO68yJZu_k3cJmc4dc%3D)
**Erik Aadland**

[**JOIN THE FIGHT TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE AND HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b1ed4daa171342f9b9d9ebdc16b8772b&_e=sylTkx-h1rucCJKBRA71-eiEmdZoaexu2uaEI-afXrN7VEVZ6S6Rv8GejYgMlQWE0wIkz8-GSxMwUGJIu-UmgEuAq1Ybwx8oBZ6_6fF34yL2brtHpiFi55ZP5HIeLvW3Xy8QxFaL-wBT_a0FS4uupQh-ubi_fXqwl5df7-TPsBWBnXyZTTjuGb3tWLhtIIcD2ruLkragwPGoIfGrEPVjeY9TXbuV0cfgEe8lp_6HWRtkMIXTXVEo4GHeaTnaBNVEVkfDhRevYX28I3KDlVh4BitEXL3YdHFXjr4xY_P9K1TaJbS6n47x94aVK1al3klR99LE1wfiI-7WzNQDmZxVkR-Pl7xN3A-W_dU64pzhYpBiNYqa0yooCoir-be8o_dsZQSOEvlxLixsxkMUvkH0tot5gqxDIb_ktsXToumzZpk%3D)

* * *
Erik Aadland is a father, a West Point graduate, an former Army officer, and steadfast conservative. He served valiantly in combat operations in Iraq and Afghanistan, and now he’s running for to represent Colorado in the United States Senate. If you believe America deserves less politicians and more public servants, [**please support Erik Aadland for U.S. Senate.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b1ed4daa171342f9b9d9ebdc16b8772b&_e=sylTkx-h1rucCJKBRA71-eiEmdZoaexu2uaEI-afXrN7VEVZ6S6Rv8GejYgMlQWE0wIkz8-GSxMwUGJIu-UmgEuAq1Ybwx8oBZ6_6fF34yL2brtHpiFi55ZP5HIeLvW3Xy8QxFaL-wBT_a0FS4uupQh-ubi_fXqwl5df7-TPsBWBnXyZTTjuGb3tWLhtIIcD2ruLkragwPGoIfGrEPVjeVxaht-5Mi7k27cpKI9yQxcqsFsOzXWBkW4GWIJYcR_PuQQPDLrqe2Y1IEyB5ycKySMMqJWHz114_ZeplltvYbH7q8xgj82Kq15eGFhTtSuiSxVTsk1kqOCPR6z6VZ_DamHrc32N2UmGFCKN3WDhu8jmqF4DDQnSUwu-PMIOZ1FtQLlwOUT5-BYGdv4lAyowohdEy-ZuP8HM0rRJmhhzKBc%3D)

| | Derek, we’ve got our million dollar deadline coming up tonight and **_[we’re still tens of thousands of dollars from reaching our goal. Can you chip in and do your part to help me stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34983667/303661293/-2023814932?refcode=20210831.4_TM_8EX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWY3MjE3Zi03NDBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DeGMxta0a2vHZUyt7KNBvxkCqFc30ywcrlLBgYis2H8=)_**

Here’s why tonight’s deadline is so important:

In less than three weeks, early voting starts in Virginia. Recent polls show a virtually tied race. What our grassroots team raises before our deadline will determine our final September budget.

We have to put up a big number. Glenn Youngkin has vowed to spend $75 million of his own money to win. If he makes good on that promise and we don’t do our part, he’ll have infinite resources to outspend us on the airwaves and on the ground.

clean_body: Here are the stakes, Derek | | | = | | Derek, we’ve got our million dollar deadline coming up tonight and = Here’s why tonight’s deadline is so important: In less than three weeks, early voting starts in Virginia. Recent polls show a virtually tied race. What our grassroots team raises before our deadline will determine our final September budget. We have to put up a big number. Glenn Youngkin has vowed to spend $75 million of his own money to win. If he makes good on that promise and we don’t do our part, he’ll have infinite resources to outspend us on the airwaves and on the ground. This is a TIGHT race, Derek. And that means every single dollar matters — your contribution of $25 could be the difference between building a Virginia that works for everyone, and handing Virginia over to Trump and Youngkin. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thanks for being part of my team, Terry McAuliffe = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click.
