name: Rand Paul
subject: coming to a town near you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58226624:J3XTfs2NW:m:1:3253819041:05B121489C5CC217C458A02BA7E65632:r) | |
---
Peter, you probably heard in the news by now, but vaccine passports are now being implemented throughout New York City! Here's a headline from the Daily Caller about the situation:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58226624:J3XTfs2NW:m:1:3253819041:05B121489C5CC217C458A02BA7E65632:r)
Politicians and bureaucrats say these vaccine passports are only for COVID, but we know it won't stop there...considering we're on day 500 something of _' 14 days to slow the spread'_.

Americans are living in a world where politicians and bureaucrats are quite literally trying to CONTROL:

-> _Where you can eat_
-> _Where you can shop_
-> _Where you can travel_
-> _What you can attend_
**-> **_Who you can associate with_

_**That is tyranny through anti-science mandates. **_

The time to fight back is now. Unless you want this tyranny coming to a town near you, I'm going to need your support in getting this message out to as many Americans as possible. That means reaching our fundraising goal.

I'm asking every supporter to chip in just $25 NOW to help fight back against this tyranny─[**can I count on your support?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58226624:J3XTfs2NW:m:1:3253819041:05B121489C5CC217C458A02BA7E65632:r)
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**ONE CLICK MONEYBOMB: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58226625:J3XTfs2NW:m:1:3253819041:05B121489C5CC217C458A02BA7E65632:r)
[**ONE CLICK MONEYBOMB: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58226626:J3XTfs2NW:m:1:3253819041:05B121489C5CC217C458A02BA7E65632:r)
[**ONE CLICK MONEYBOMB: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58226627:J3XTfs2NW:m:1:3253819041:05B121489C5CC217C458A02BA7E65632:r)
[**ONE CLICK MONEYBOMB: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58226628:J3XTfs2NW:m:1:3253819041:05B121489C5CC217C458A02BA7E65632:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
Peter, the stakes have never been higher than they are now, and that's why it's CRUCIAL this message reaches Americans across the country.

Please, join me today to ensure we win this fight against vaccine passports: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2797878/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58226624:J3XTfs2NW:m:1:3253819041:05B121489C5CC217C458A02BA7E65632:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Derek Marshall
subject: You can make the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Hurricanes. Floods. Wildfires. Drought. An increasingly serious Delta variant. Voting rights under fire. The Supreme Court overruling the eviction moratorium.

**Listen, Peter. We are in the midst of many crises and everyone is looking to Congress for leadership.** With so many urgent needs, it’s absolutely crucial that our representatives are fighting for our safety and wellbeing. [**Congress needs more progressive leaders who won’t back down when the going gets tough. I need you to invest in this campaign today so I can fight for you in the halls of Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34985981/303669789/1962946781?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzUyMDJlYS03YzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tQeok8sy6e_fwuIJf759qtlXRnswSo-NexxLIZ7O_zo=)

body:
– | Hi there, I’m reaching out one last time before August ends to ask if you can contribute to our campaign’s end-of-month fundraising goal. Here’s your individual link to give: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cranley-donate?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34986295/303670517/-606200675?refcode=em_JC_FR_EOM5_083121_l1&amount=10&refcode2=aa1f5511-7d0a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTFmNTUxMS03ZDBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxcAv-fk9fz6vbBZiQnYvn1bkEmAtFLmsPKBHi460q8=)_** My commitment to serving Ohio starts and ends with this: I will always be straight with you. I believe that we can flip Ohio blue — I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t think we could win. But our success depends on you, friend. I’m proud that our campaign is funded by folks like you who are ready to flip Ohio blue and write a comeback story with us. And I’m grateful that so many of you have stepped up to chip in already. It goes to show that the people of our community are invested in Ohio’s future and in building a government that we can be proud of. We’ll be an administration that serves the middle class, not just the wealthiest among us. One that follows the science when it comes to COVID-19 and climate change, so we can end this pandemic and protect our planet for future generations. This is what we’ve done for Cincinnati, and it’s what we can do for Ohio — if we have your help. Please, if you haven’t given yet this month, or if you’re able to donate just a little more, use your personal donation link before midnight. name: Donna Imam
subject: I was a Democratic nominee in 2020. Here's what I learned:
body:
During my 2020 campaign, voter turnout in Williamson County -- which is entirely in TX-31 -- saw the highest increase in Democratic turnout of the top 25 most populous counties in Texas. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34986404/303670872/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzNkZjczYS03ZDBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DNwD8WyWb4SErDrC4HebCEvWhw_VACxAl6wcPUMyJJ0=)
Friend,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to [**donate $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34986405/303670873/77586780?refcode=em-83121-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzNkZjczYS03ZDBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DNwD8WyWb4SErDrC4HebCEvWhw_VACxAl6wcPUMyJJ0=) to my campaign before tonight's end-of-month deadline. But first, I want to share some insights into my race and explain why your support is so critical.

Back in 2020, I won the Democratic nomination in TX-31. We did it by running on economic solutions for all Texans -- health coverage, high-wage jobs, and debt-free education. We went to over 50,000 doors to get our message out, and we came closer than anyone imagined to flipping TX-31 from red to blue.

**During my 2020 campaign, voter turnout in Williamson County -- which is entirely in TX-31 -- saw the highest increase in Democratic turnout of the top 25 most populous counties in Texas.**

I bring this up for two reasons: 1.) 2020 taught me that turnout is everything. But we didn't get people to the polls by running a conventional campaign. We ran on solutions that working families desperately need and met voters on their doorsteps -- the most effective way to get out the vote (GOTV).

2.) If we're going to flip Texas in 2022, we'll need historic turnout in Democratic hubs like the district I'm running in here in Austin. This grassroots campaign got Democrats fired up and to the polls. This is how we win this seat and flip Texas, and it's why we need your support:

[**Can you chip in $3 so we can win this district and flip Texas from red to blue? But first, I want to share some insights into my race and explain why your support is so critical. Back in 2020, I won the Democratic nomination in TX-31. We did it by running on economic solutions for all Texans -- health coverage, high-wage jobs, and debt-free education. We went to over 50,000 doors to get our message out, and we came closer than anyone imagined to flipping TX-31 from red to blue. During my 2020 campaign, voter turnout in Williamson County -- which is entirely in TX-31 -- saw the highest increase in Democratic turnout of the top 25 most populous counties in Texas. I bring this up for two reasons: 1.) 2020 taught me that turnout is everything. But we didn't get people to the polls by running a conventional campaign. We ran on solutions that working families desperately need and met voters on their doorsteps -- the most effective way to get out the vote (GOTV). 2.) body:
Joe Biden has done nothing but to embarrass and weaken our nation in the past 8 months. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a094ae6ac7f648d5b1d4d1a42a2607b5&_e=eUUX7wfkzqmBOfvdivQbJ3dukOGRQnnRaWQxIcBnDfiXJNl_WV3_DBJK6CI4z2ANREBI73zyNZkwJl5ucI9ToYp7QZNib5LqlQhu-Tk_rfDkHrzLJ6rXJ59sBzNiXpesVr8XW9PwUbbLBMf34bEcQxZ64KYQkhThE80kxdXo0VCUbLS6_YQXpUeX_HAZJpduDSMW2l0nNf6160y2w4lKtiiN9jwjlvccd5XOg_fu-31NhGCQ9qhFpS6-g6C01RB8SUWHDbfr33TiJYPEMY3Ep4Xia5FqkYoEq_s_VQldVBR8QGmZccZYgNe2zpNK_o92aq1Xj-AdSz8VNqhayDjPGW4HoSHLMzfhhMz4Cyg11khtkC3FVuQuigzlXEydsL07U0mfkvOmyuVCfyCw81lZyspWvLW_c0mBP6sgKJlwlQU%3D)

---
Fellow American,

**Joe Biden has gotten too many passes, too many second chances, and his only accomplishment is failing our nation.** He’s failed as a leader and done nothing but throw our country into disarray while embarrassing us on a national scale.

Right now, myself and so many of my fellow service members keep asking questions like: Why has Joe Biden allowed this chaos and death to happen in Afghanistan? Why did he put troops back on the ground in a vulnerable location, and then tell the entire world where to find them? Why did he allow billions of dollars worth of military equipment and technology to fall into the hands of our enemies? How long until Iran or China gets ahold of that technology to exploit and use against us?

**None of us will ever get a straight answer from a lifelong politician like Joe Biden. Unlike this President and so many of his liberal lackeys in the Senate, I served my country in uniform instead of a suit. I served in Iraq, in Afghanistan, and** __**this President has done nothing but fail our nation, turn his back on our troops, and lie to us all with false promises.**__

Joe Biden’s fellow Democrats in Congress, like Senator Bennet, have let him slide on every mistake he’s made. Yet every single news organization from CNN to Fox News is unanimous in describing Joe Biden's actions as failures, the reason Afghanistan has fallen, and why people have died.

My fellow soldiers and I didn’t fight for our country just to have a feckless and weak government making our nation more dangerous both outside and inside our borders. That needs to end, and [**I aim to do that in the United States Senate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a094ae6ac7f648d5b1d4d1a42a2607b5&_e=eUUX7wfkzqmBOfvdivQbJ3dukOGRQnnRaWQxIcBnDfiXJNl_WV3_DBJK6CI4z2ANREBI73zyNZkwJl5ucI9ToYp7QZNib5LqlQhu-Tk_rfDkHrzLJ6rXJ59sBzNiXpesVr8XW9PwUbbLBMf34bEcQxZ64KYQkhThE80kxdXo0VCUbLS6_YQXpUeX_HAZJpduDSMW2l0nNf6160y2w4lKtp_cOHsCi0ZjNKRmj7UCRpt3sEScqBOlFfBrEFQeUC8FFg8dDXwzxY8BFoSuFbCuifqzNN4AnHEVCUtYQIJ-c0d52bz0W4xsR_BoWk2B2URv0lDsjQx_sCZ0v-n9r5vVAJ2TM0GQr7UFlFL9jsbbaR0Q4AAqhILKDW-ovd76VpaCMkIMVlMULjwON7EJivUxjGWOzQhuZl-7b5acXA-xRgM%3D)

Our nation deserves better than the failures of Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats. They’ve barely been in charge for 8 months and they keep failing our nation. Enough is enough.

Right now, I need your help to win back the Majority in the United States Senate. We don’t need any more elitist politicians who embarrass our nation on the world stage, we need conservatives who want to help our nation get back on its feet.

**If you agree, then** [**join me**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a094ae6ac7f648d5b1d4d1a42a2607b5&_e=eUUX7wfkzqmBOfvdivQbJ3dukOGRQnnRaWQxIcBnDfiXJNl_WV3_DBJK6CI4z2ANREBI73zyNZkwJl5ucI9ToYp7QZNib5LqlQhu-Tk_rfDkHrzLJ6rXJ59sBzNiXpesVr8XW9PwUbbLBMf34bEcQxZ64KYQkhThE80kxdXo0VCUbLS6_YQXpUeX_HAZJpduDSMW2l0nNf6160y2w4lKtuYrSysYBOLf_kCRzkOyvF5IdWAzQtaMZ2OXSIAuSLSZNqYnSeixG1C5aMFCAEz_1iLc0bnankoRDNneh_I94HDVeBgdh9rBk5WqBR0bb2BzhAYyqSndnVN_38idF-ZYWKwLpFjviW_B_THSA72TUkEpdi7EhgXbm_LtUGVonh_xyg4mRSU5UBKU5qjHndPEaapA0K9bS5jNZ8n_ePoL2-Q%3D) **in the fight to take back the U.S. Senate so we can start holding Joe Biden responsible for his failures**.

For a better America,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a094ae6ac7f648d5b1d4d1a42a2607b5&_e=eUUX7wfkzqmBOfvdivQbJ3dukOGRQnnRaWQxIcBnDfiXJNl_WV3_DBJK6CI4z2ANREBI73zyNZkwJl5ucI9ToYp7QZNib5LqlQhu-Tk_rfDkHrzLJ6rXJ59sBzNiXpesVr8XW9PwUbbLBMf34bEcQxZ64KYQkhThE80kxdXo0VCUbLS6_YQXpUeX_HAZJpduDSMW2l0nNf6160y2w4lKtpL5JrklDXu6UUM4PJ2RiQDluMux6LVtrmi5pI66F2eUQHlYebtqZbjxhdeJkUr7hAdQ5RG1xyyNZemQIL7bOw_73ceGgd7hCbIEhZHlhjPPpfEqd-xtuvbYTVcZqJ4JsBCC2j9l3wspa2wuQ-nHaLFQ-F4aQaM_b4Omr6ZXpYkBDI-nUFNFsokeJbCsSw7MUqPQowkEJHGniqniJq3sxPg%3D)
**Erik Aadland**

[**JOIN THE FIGHT TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE AND HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a094ae6ac7f648d5b1d4d1a42a2607b5&_e=eUUX7wfkzqmBOfvdivQbJ3dukOGRQnnRaWQxIcBnDfiXJNl_WV3_DBJK6CI4z2ANREBI73zyNZkwJl5ucI9ToYp7QZNib5LqlQhu-Tk_rfDkHrzLJ6rXJ59sBzNiXpesVr8XW9PwUbbLBMf34bEcQxZ64KYQkhThE80kxdXo0VCUbLS6_YQXpUeX_HAZJpduDSMW2l0nNf6160y2w4lKtrdCSEIU7EfDQYSmD6Cqz1Zu5DoyAiyUkQHql_3ihFqxceiZmTRQVLhzCb7XkRyMllZ2VCMnKChNcpDI-BewohZgN7LnHcRAf5drvNzfJBAaoBrDswUZtsQ0t_hbAyTrSEguZUKVMHXNlODwfNeTBpvBUcmoVpREFUeXbgywVSO6r20shUgA09b93MTm6pyafH2svDVwoZQHoKnsQ4OjC94%3D)

* * *
Erik Aadland is a father, a West Point graduate, an former Army officer, and steadfast conservative. He served valiantly in combat operations in Iraq and Afghanistan, and now he’s running for to represent Colorado in the United States Senate. If you believe America deserves less politicians and more public servants, [**please support Erik Aadland for U.S. Senate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a094ae6ac7f648d5b1d4d1a42a2607b5&_e=eUUX7wfkzqmBOfvdivQbJ3dukOGRQnnRaWQxIcBnDfiXJNl_WV3_DBJK6CI4z2ANREBI73zyNZkwJl5ucI9ToYp7QZNib5LqlQhu-Tk_rfDkHrzLJ6rXJ59sBzNiXpesVr8XW9PwUbbLBMf34bEcQxZ64KYQkhThE80kxdXo0VCUbLS6_YQXpUeX_HAZJpduDSMW2l0nNf6160y2w4lKtq1iXX7Zcovi3QdJdOKgpQ7DFU5cuWZSRLLdqOjnvzOA7EVjiRUwUj_qJdX-dx3zS7rrsOxMiELv7YevJA_Yw3eVRtmQMVOzdNiZlwXC-XImH3RstKtCwBRtmiaeAEkmUqCJfrpxUj-f3r5f9P4IfB5dQA8CFujNdYYN-EiXTebbOBiMsnqpsprw03xx8q5A-jhQdC-QbAUsunrVMu_hZco%3D)

name: Erik Aadland

body:
Joe Biden has done nothing but to embarrass and weaken our nation in the past 8 months. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=50e271481a564db99a59312ad84344be&_e=DtDjU-BpYlcH4zGUCGU1Kiv0zOvmtn_FUZzh61a1ry5uqQNlBqmXsfBeweHnfWwbU-TiE4mpCQ1U5PJz5ZOUON-BvPpg1Whu9GQJiUSs6xKMnjarUFlVt5ad9LtqszjKMdGrQKQEdhpId2cpsPxFqHtIe52Q3vZ2s1pV4L1jJmhbXYu6_L6_ZsqeRnVVFe1VNaphKT_0lUdY34NQQxbJy-WhH8p2oGr_T7U6TCX81ftg2tRmJ_2YrDeWFA_vQAbVSk0dOqByMp2_YC_wM8BVrTvZ4-xq_-bQBwyOXZgNVH9PC1KkvLaj7LBhzD6cteS4QetM3CNmLQonNL8MBtvjwtGpnKGiszk6bt3krTPAiXrdIhGQ6FWPvbnhyzjsynxTH3SIhpcpO18Wci3EIBGD5nV9ls48OwxCxOjNDE1LHkI%3D)

---
Peter,

**Joe Biden has gotten too many passes, too many second chances, and his only accomplishment is failing our nation.** He’s failed as a leader and done nothing but throw our country into disarray while embarrassing us on a national scale.

Right now, myself and so many of my fellow service members keep asking questions like: Why has Joe Biden allowed this chaos and death to happen in Afghanistan? Why did he put troops back on the ground in a vulnerable location, and then tell the entire world where to find them? Why did he allow billions of dollars worth of military equipment and technology to fall into the hands of our enemies? How long until Iran or China gets ahold of that technology to exploit and use against us?

**None of us will ever get a straight answer from a lifelong politician like Joe Biden. Unlike this President and so many of his liberal lackeys in the Senate, I served my country in uniform instead of a suit. I served in Iraq, in Afghanistan, and** __**this President has done nothing but fail our nation, turn his back on our troops, and lie to us all with false promises.**__

Joe Biden’s fellow Democrats in Congress, like Senator Bennet, have let him slide on every mistake he’s made. Yet every single news organization from CNN to Fox News is unanimous in describing Joe Biden's actions as failures, the reason Afghanistan has fallen, and why people have died.

My fellow soldiers and I didn’t fight for our country just to have a feckless and weak government making our nation more dangerous both outside and inside our borders. That needs to end, and [**I aim to do that in the United States Senate.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=50e271481a564db99a59312ad84344be&_e=DtDjU-BpYlcH4zGUCGU1Kiv0zOvmtn_FUZzh61a1ry5uqQNlBqmXsfBeweHnfWwbU-TiE4mpCQ1U5PJz5ZOUON-BvPpg1Whu9GQJiUSs6xKMnjarUFlVt5ad9LtqszjKMdGrQKQEdhpId2cpsPxFqHtIe52Q3vZ2s1pV4L1jJmhbXYu6_L6_ZsqeRnVVFe1VNaphKT_0lUdY34NQQxbJy-rtZTvrTb99qiAV39Q97TRTo_dEzvYppcPcqAnZ2xeYFj_0n1vLOSDleKgZ1_pcwvBRXxM2G_1Ixrz_VZUPX9oTJRMOxizbIWQUVQpRfFCUye8_USERRZTuU2z6ICPBS7I7QG59aQlMmdsQQ12JNCLxYqJ7jmts2O4oGDQ5VxbnVGkJ7Z0_khKb5FKsZhnPK9k6HDf7TUOCqdJTLrXvhrg%3D)

Our nation deserves better than the failures of Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats. They’ve barely been in charge for 8 months and they keep failing our nation. Enough is enough.

Right now, I need your help to win back the Majority in the United States Senate. We don’t need any more elitist politicians who embarrass our nation on the world stage, we need conservatives who want to help our nation get back on its feet.

**If you agree, then** [**join me**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=50e271481a564db99a59312ad84344be&_e=DtDjU-BpYlcH4zGUCGU1Kiv0zOvmtn_FUZzh61a1ry5uqQNlBqmXsfBeweHnfWwbU-TiE4mpCQ1U5PJz5ZOUON-BvPpg1Whu9GQJiUSs6xKMnjarUFlVt5ad9LtqszjKMdGrQKQEdhpId2cpsPxFqHtIe52Q3vZ2s1pV4L1jJmhbXYu6_L6_ZsqeRnVVFe1VNaphKT_0lUdY34NQQxbJy6G6y8vzhj84Q85ALN78jeOd3l4WS23izae7jpC5pgWxwIf23WYadeAmrgiWJfTGeiy5f9mFq3e9oYHis3e8VFefVFbvQSU8uZeui1gHyMF9a-RloNP_eaLTeZ0Lu3Mu5A3nnxvjkPgRZJkmMxh6Lin8xvkrG-7qlQApxIoYxJqUh2zeg4kncnDCe_Ph-kQ71wl_w3xcT6zLPrE_E7-g5-Q%3D) **in the fight to take back the U.S. Senate so we can start holding Joe Biden responsible for his failures**.

For a better America,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=50e271481a564db99a59312ad84344be&_e=DtDjU-BpYlcH4zGUCGU1Kiv0zOvmtn_FUZzh61a1ry5uqQNlBqmXsfBeweHnfWwbU-TiE4mpCQ1U5PJz5ZOUON-BvPpg1Whu9GQJiUSs6xKMnjarUFlVt5ad9LtqszjKMdGrQKQEdhpId2cpsPxFqHtIe52Q3vZ2s1pV4L1jJmhbXYu6_L6_ZsqeRnVVFe1VNaphKT_0lUdY34NQQxbJyyJiYK8_x2jLDuDY2BkFy2lMoqbpf-WlDLGKKE0OlDclBOzhuH9T-C3ia8Q_sHw2epzOttOzeqaWesQC3ikUEbjZXZzfGueWJkZqIPgzGu-IBUv5mQU5WjywWIP-ioBjbYOJ4aKJm0BWPtAocU4FVu7aVgHzVnEptTbAiQTaZtGrpe9qPj39AH6ZwJTGjLZSUq-fAD_ovbBbPWwkUjGFgVE%3D)
**Erik Aadland**

Erik Aadland is a father, a West Point graduate, an former Army officer, and steadfast conservative. |

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34987440/303674588/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTA1YmJhYy03ZjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETFQI75OcuaIiFI63EX1mbTGsY5QQ88amDOKJ2eNFRg=)

Friend --

In March 2018, I won a special election in a district that Donald Trump won by nearly 20 points.

National Republicans spent more than $8 million on television advertising, twice as much as our side -- but we out-worked them on the ground.

We knocked on doors, went to job sites, met people out in their community, and organized to get out and vote.

When all ballots were counted, our campaign led by 700 votes.

Since then, I won two more close races in battleground elections. Each time I did it because I had thousands of folks like you working alongside me.

**Pennsylvania is the #1 U.S. Senate race in the entire country -- it's vital to protecting and expanding our Democratic majority.**

Losing just isn't an option -- too much is at stake. Millions have fought too long and too hard for the right to vote, better jobs and higher wages, affordable health care, secure retirements.

The Republicans on the other side are talking about repealing the Affordable Care Act, taking away a woman's right to make her own health decisions, and turning our elections over to Trump loyalists.

**[I am going to do everything in my power to make sure they don't get the chance -- but I can't do this alone. Please chip in $5 or more before tonight's end-of-month fundraising deadline and become a Founding Donor of our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34987441/303674589/1374837556?refcode=em21_210831_eom4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTA1YmJhYy03ZjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETFQI75OcuaIiFI63EX1mbTGsY5QQ88amDOKJ2eNFRg=)**

I know what you’re thinking: How important can fundraising be in August 2021 for the 2022 midterm elections?
The answer? **Extremely.**
Republicans are breaking fundraising records _every_ month. That means every month that we fall behind on a fundraising goal, the gap between me and my Republican opponents widens.

clean_body: | = | | Hi folks, Thanks for opening this email -- August is a notoriously bad month for fundraising, and I want to make sure that you’re still with us. And if you are one of the people reading this email, = | | | = I know what you’re thinking: How important can fundraising be in August 2021 for the 2022 midterm elections? The answer? Extremely. Republicans are breaking fundraising records every month. That means every month that we fall behind on a fundraising goal, the gap between me and my Republican opponents widens. The gap could become a chasm by next November if we don’t stay vigilant. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support, Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. clean_body: We can’t let everyone down... | We’re so glad we caught you, Peter. We’ll get right to the point. Right now, he’s one of the frontrunners for the Democrat nomination for Senate in North Carolina, and if he wins the nomination he’ll rake in millions in donations from liberals in California and New York. We’re going to need the support of EVERY GRASSROOTS REPUBLICAN in order to keep up -- including you \-- and we can’t afford to wait another day. | | | | | The fact is that the Democrats are prepared to devote every waking moment to seizing control of North Carolina’s Republican Senate Seat, Peter. They’re prepared to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to win \-- and they’re going to bring in an army of donors and volunteers from deep blue states like California and New York to do it. There’s no way we can hold the line without your help. We need reinforcements from every state, including Florida, in order to hold the line. (If we lose North Carolina, our hopes of winning back the Republican Majority are lost!) | | | | | | | | | Thank you. \-- North Carolina Republican Party

subject: A critical moment for our Commonwealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This is a critical moment for the Commonwealth of Virginia -- and this is the kind of progress and leadership that we voted for when we reelected Mark Warner in 2020.

|

Michael Bennet is fighting for Colorado families while the National GOP targets his seat to flip the Senate. We’re counting on you today. |

Michael also secured the largest federal investment in broadband in American history that will boost rural and Tribal communities’ connections. Team, Michael is fighting to make the Child Tax Credit expansion permanent, he’s working for Colorado’s future, and he’s running for re-election. If we fall short of our fundraising, we risk being vulnerable to GOP attacks and losing Michael’s Senate seat. Peter -- As we face a major fundraising deadline at midnight, we wanted to lay out the stakes for you.

**2022 WORST-CASE SCENARIO:** Republicans beat Gov. Newsom, turn CA-41 red, take back the House and Senate majorities, oust elected progressives like Mark in the state, and turn California and Congress into a MAGA hellscape.

**2022 BEST-CASE SCENARIO:** We keep and strengthen our House and Senate majorities, beat back MAGA extremism, and execute on our progressive priorities to create a United States that works for ALL Americans.

Peter, YOU could be all the difference between these two scenarios.

Because this campaign and all of our accomplishments wouldn’t be possible without you. And whether we win or lose in the future will also be because of you.

[**So, with just 7 hours left until our end of month deadline, can we count on you to chip in $3 and save our country from MAGA extremism festering in our country and our state? Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. name: Stewart Navarre
subject: I’ll be quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
I just stepped out of my finance meeting, so I wanted to give you a quick update. The support we have received to date has been tremendous and put us in a strong position heading into the fall.
Since it is the final day of the month, I wanted to reach out personally to ask if you can help us hit our goal by pitching in $5, $10, or any amount that you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210831-email]
This is a critically important time for our campaign as we end the summer months and head into the fall. Before you know it, the midterms will be in full swing!
Can you give us a hand to put us over the top by chipping in a few bucks today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210831-email]
I truly appreciate your support, Peter. Thanks for standing with us.
-- Stewart

name: Erica Smith
subject: BREAKING: Rep. Madison Cawthorn just threatened to violently overthrow the government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
He promised "bloodshed" and even "to take up arms."
#
Breaking news.
**January 6 insurrectionist Rep. Madison Cawthorn (NC-11) threatened to violently overthrow the government.**
He promised "bloodshed" and even "to take up arms."
He's a violent extremist who has no place in the halls of congress.
The people of North Carolina deserve better representation in Congress than a lying white supremacist.
**But that’s exactly the kind of Republican who could win this Senate seat if we don’t nominate a progressive Democrat who can build the coalition of voters it takes to win statewide.**
If we’ve ever needed your support, it’s now.
[**_Will you please make your very first $5 donation and help elect Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate? Our August fundraising deadline is about 14 hours away, and right now we’re behind, so anything you're able to give has a huge impact on our campaign._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13078?refcode=em20210831-397&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=397%2E3698%2ECKt6Eg)

name: Erik Aadland
subject: Failure to lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
Joe Biden has done nothing but to embarrass and weaken our nation in the past 8 months. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=238df00881994baa981ad30b8f311eae&_e=dgWKk1t4cYrqoLDuqyZfmksE0R6FiZWQjQZUB0Tlik31_2fe2cHzqd2TPzK5sJgWIeHvoVpa43EVhF51pRy2479_Amy606Cbw4_X2-GkLgTU9LvSQFWrr8NgWBUKghCOBuZrAvAAMH32eqWHXpMBVJvbh2M-BIqEiCJZlQs834WM4coXJRbRlhgfbhRDC_gTjX6kGGkObbIqZTIw81TwRcU9OWUQCutiN5w5-1CWp057P-yts8MwZEfKdBpeXAiFTrYGW8FuusvF8HpzAsHqtb5aRKHMMpcvvol0Bkxe41CBQjdWYW4kPomHr66A50PLgiGHbbrzyfuWFzTe0pZ6BTcTMQJxhxqdzbN0KwGt05sztsneS7op05D1qQLcm-xSrBqnNu_0FzrNYlw7OqphoFlA3rxrVKmPRlol_Zo2MZM%3D)

---
Peter,

**Joe Biden has gotten too many passes, too many second chances, and his only accomplishment is failing our nation.** He’s failed as a leader and done nothing but throw our country into disarray while embarrassing us on a national scale.

Right now, myself and so many of my fellow service members keep asking questions like: Why has Joe Biden allowed this chaos and death to happen in Afghanistan? Why did he put troops back on the ground in a vulnerable location, and then tell the entire world where to find them? Why did he allow billions of dollars worth of military equipment and technology to fall into the hands of our enemies? How long until Iran or China gets ahold of that technology to exploit and use against us?

**None of us will ever get a straight answer from a lifelong politician like Joe Biden. Unlike this President and so many of his liberal lackeys in the Senate, I served my country in uniform instead of a suit. I served in Iraq, in Afghanistan, and** __**this President has done nothing but fail our nation, turn his back on our troops, and lie to us all with false promises.**__

Joe Biden’s fellow Democrats in Congress, like Senator Bennet, have let him slide on every mistake he’s made. Yet every single news organization from CNN to Fox News is unanimous in describing Joe Biden's actions as failures, the reason Afghanistan has fallen, and why people have died.

My fellow soldiers and I didn’t fight for our country just to have a feckless and weak government making our nation more dangerous both outside and inside our borders. That needs to end, and [**I aim to do that in the United States Senate.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=238df00881994baa981ad30b8f311eae&_e=dgWKk1t4cYrqoLDuqyZfmksE0R6FiZWQjQZUB0Tlik31_2fe2cHzqd2TPzK5sJgWIeHvoVpa43EVhF51pRy2479_Amy606Cbw4_X2-GkLgTU9LvSQFWrr8NgWBUKghCOBuZrAvAAMH32eqWHXpMBVJvbh2M-BIqEiCJZlQs834WM4coXJRbRlhgfbhRDC_gTjX6kGGkObbIqZTIw81TwRd21tq-wOTa_GnJKxiuEC0fwCYK8pk4BzuMx1shbATxrdg1C402qvBF35rjGa9nCT0O7hmecj8e0y3QoYzB87_CgmhLoKxjM6A-MoP5VZ59vLMtKH1fwY9_1RAjThLb114G5SwwMloMMI1XK-IKxW07ahN7p9EkikAfPNVUqiGruTmjRZ96Sn7FVlNGAZ20aX_sFxKcKTfWHZlxFxW2oqCQ%3D)

Our nation deserves better than the failures of Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats. They’ve barely been in charge for 8 months and they keep failing our nation. Enough is enough.

Right now, I need your help to win back the Majority in the United States Senate. We don’t need any more elitist politicians who embarrass our nation on the world stage, we need conservatives who want to help our nation get back on its feet.

**If you agree, then** [**join me**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=238df00881994baa981ad30b8f311eae&_e=dgWKk1t4cYrqoLDuqyZfmksE0R6FiZWQjQZUB0Tlik31_2fe2cHzqd2TPzK5sJgWIeHvoVpa43EVhF51pRy2479_Amy606Cbw4_X2-GkLgTU9LvSQFWrr8NgWBUKghCOBuZrAvAAMH32eqWHXpMBVJvbh2M-BIqEiCJZlQs834WM4coXJRbRlhgfbhRDC_gTjX6kGGkObbIqZTIw81TwRehRvnTsLp91TQArC9jJiPJax3g3QdwgQ1y3QLxODN-iDSJ9cEWbdC9fB8Xea6lK67WeN4cYmTEW0wRbw_6TGCzr1HVF-oCKa26yx_QWCKjyI8xCv4wPk0gE-Cge0qcKbSpQoKnBpavjPy1hyn85ybx5tvLQgNgnE3OYHZiWiJwe_U5B2KZuJNkY94h4OUJodZ-mve3-SUkhZ2X9eSPkWEM%3D) **in the fight to take back the U.S. Senate so we can start holding Joe Biden responsible for his failures**.

For a better America,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=238df00881994baa981ad30b8f311eae&_e=dgWKk1t4cYrqoLDuqyZfmksE0R6FiZWQjQZUB0Tlik31_2fe2cHzqd2TPzK5sJgWIeHvoVpa43EVhF51pRy2479_Amy606Cbw4_X2-GkLgTU9LvSQFWrr8NgWBUKghCOBuZrAvAAMH32eqWHXpMBVJvbh2M-BIqEiCJZlQs834WM4coXJRbRlhgfbhRDC_gTjX6kGGkObbIqZTIw81TwRXVEE9FqyiUNPqekp4kd0E5oCCcZGgEW_BDCFgPcXl66PhjXY7R2_5pKRt5pbqlWOzHX4GA2Iq-4EJ06_Xp0hcrmmVOj3LeJ-I87W-Db5IPArCa7tQE0aMMLpQ-GrbXHYfpDFL7G9GGyIciz-PFb0jITbK3F0xjCmJZHYjI5fdhlFaIeNCryndeqQGxnNIEXTYJ--kYKAsIe4c8FS1H0o5s%3D)
**Erik Aadland**

[**JOIN THE FIGHT TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE AND HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=238df00881994baa981ad30b8f311eae&_e=dgWKk1t4cYrqoLDuqyZfmksE0R6FiZWQjQZUB0Tlik31_2fe2cHzqd2TPzK5sJgWIeHvoVpa43EVhF51pRy2479_Amy606Cbw4_X2-GkLgTU9LvSQFWrr8NgWBUKghCOBuZrAvAAMH32eqWHXpMBVJvbh2M-BIqEiCJZlQs834WM4coXJRbRlhgfbhRDC_gTjX6kGGkObbIqZTIw81TwRdoPFfGWe7creehBCjU7qANcA0EFtN5K2eTJI_GewOS9tcN0WdrwU84YMBdYYqcQmJRqXUmsQ7mvhNYIznesLq5vhnmFQR6VKL64jHSoiOMgmazPTeRpHcNHtTZkcZK4owwojwF6IaGYEV54TZ5L7iU7w-AkDayX1LX4UnZTyZfOPx_1SIGJr2PBCno1X0Qbqz9J1anpl9rQHsb-CTgj9mw%3D)

* * *
Erik Aadland is a father, a West Point graduate, an former Army officer, and steadfast conservative. He served valiantly in combat operations in Iraq and Afghanistan, and now he’s running for to represent Colorado in the United States Senate. If you believe America deserves less politicians and more public servants, [**please support Erik Aadland for U.S. Senate.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=238df00881994baa981ad30b8f311eae&_e=dgWKk1t4cYrqoLDuqyZfmksE0R6FiZWQjQZUB0Tlik31_2fe2cHzqd2TPzK5sJgWIeHvoVpa43EVhF51pRy2479_Amy606Cbw4_X2-GkLgTU9LvSQFWrr8NgWBUKghCOBuZrAvAAMH32eqWHXpMBVJvbh2M-BIqEiCJZlQs834WM4coXJRbRlhgfbhRDC_gTjX6kGGkObbIqZTIw81TwRaZlAfaDEPbVN14cqIjMCzxlBEZ_MWJJMtPkG2FQnSf4QABJK_Qq8o3f73HRHiBdSpyNn5GzwvK8ab6tZOZasaD6-GUl6D8zqO5fxGVQoPoQkvT35y2wELbOz7j5dnZjm4QjJMhXMgKGMsWpvuDu2s6GmtaU2FS-P20CY5RhR35QP3uAjXH-aJBUndsvjspWs5NMqYunt34JaRb128B421o%3D)

Right now, myself and so many of my fellow service members keep asking questions like: Why has Joe Biden allowed this chaos and death to happen in Afghanistan? Why did he put troops back on the ground in a vulnerable location, and then tell the entire world where to find them? Why did he allow billions of dollars worth of military equipment and technology to fall into the hands of our enemies? How long until Iran or China gets ahold of that technology to exploit and use against us? None of us will ever get a straight answer from a lifelong politician like Joe Biden. Unlike this President and so many of his liberal lackeys in the Senate, I served my country in uniform instead of a suit. I served in Iraq, in Afghanistan, and this President has done nothing but fail our nation, turn his back on our troops, and lie to us all with false promises. Joe Biden’s fellow Democrats in Congress, like Senator Bennet, have let him slide on every mistake he’s made. Yet every single news organization from CNN to Fox News is unanimous in describing Joe Biden's actions as failures, the reason Afghanistan has fallen, and why people have died. My fellow soldiers and I didn’t fight for our country just to have a feckless and weak government making our nation more dangerous both outside and inside our borders. That needs to end, and Our nation deserves better than the failures of Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats. They’ve barely been in charge for 8 months and they keep failing our nation. Enough is enough. Right now, I need your help to win back the Majority in the United States Senate. We don’t need any more elitist politicians who embarrass our nation on the world stage, we need conservatives who want to help our nation get back on its feet. If you agree, then in the fight to take back the U.S. Senate so we can start holding Joe Biden responsible for his failures. For a better America, Erik Aadland * Erik Aadland is a father, a West Point graduate, an former Army officer, and steadfast conservative. He served valiantly in combat operations in Iraq and Afghanistan, and now he’s running for to represent Colorado in the United States Senate. If you believe America deserves less politicians and more public servants, | | Paid for by AADLAND for Senate Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f5b5d2d17e6a40f99e1c8afd7020d523&_e=u4x5iJdxs1goG9xkA6Bml07zJerrz4HvxvU9xCZEiRhwddfWXZRfMuV-kTh-YAnHBxsSbcey0r7Q1PAilvNkuPwr5r9CTdw-NPzFsKXfKq9VhzZo8Sjy5271lm5lWyautx3lycNKkWAcRRAbegS4nIlXd2didqU_AhpzDPx92MYWM2bzEMC6TvAuvWzgBMiHnO1hq0albWpyiWVwx9MZd9IzKqFVmvBZoeuFiWNqP_VvLwzwpTfwWXb2cuDo89yuOzgjghwnvmNCnHvB-mQGKBV0o9h7GI9URC8c9eh0sYRiuhZIesXAAzoRLiKSIHN2W4GrsNdUw58d2UUtU29OJMfennIH4M81Usr02IujDTqHxFcIqIrWpX3CUU3poj00rkKrd6btWvNGOQpsk_GIzV2iotB8JJXHcMK8TPLM4lFBpjsp1DtqX-ZpvGgHHvRTy3EuT3VeI6YJPNCA4xEpjcDpY_OkR44_EU7bed8C8G3Jk7Higrq12TCaD2H65rQi)**

From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f5b5d2d17e6a40f99e1c8afd7020d523&_e=u4x5iJdxs1goG9xkA6Bml07zJerrz4HvxvU9xCZEiRhwddfWXZRfMuV-kTh-YAnHBxsSbcey0r7Q1PAilvNkuPwr5r9CTdw-NPzFsKXfKq9VhzZo8Sjy5271lm5lWyautx3lycNKkWAcRRAbegS4nIlXd2didqU_AhpzDPx92MYWM2bzEMC6TvAuvWzgBMiHnO1hq0albWpyiWVwx9MZd9IzKqFVmvBZoeuFiWNqP_VvLwzwpTfwWXb2cuDo89yuOzgjghwnvmNCnHvB-mQGKBV0o9h7GI9URC8c9eh0sYQFl8Rr9vUHJ5g7bRXgdysI5EWOgJLJ5X5liiQ-TGAQvlpLd0CKe3z2SNDq9uffSrF2gLt_Zp8ML0Okgf4MN8xap-ivlf3IN2drYelwTLXsks2cK3NTeAJB83JqeOc6WksTpC1W4dSLWSIB-GifseqUwV6rFgKJCJzlMoZhUZhyNg8-5a3Z25rMufGoDnQ0gB7SAqN8QRyBM1Mx2MOgwXV9) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f5b5d2d17e6a40f99e1c8afd7020d523&_e=u4x5iJdxs1goG9xkA6Bml07zJerrz4HvxvU9xCZEiRhwddfWXZRfMuV-kTh-YAnHBxsSbcey0r7Q1PAilvNkuPwr5r9CTdw-NPzFsKXfKq9VhzZo8Sjy5271lm5lWyautx3lycNKkWAcRRAbegS4nIlXd2didqU_AhpzDPx92MYWM2bzEMC6TvAuvWzgBMiHnO1hq0albWpyiWVwx9MZd9IzKqFVmvBZoeuFiWNqP_VvLwzwpTfwWXb2cuDo89yuOzgjghwnvmNCnHvB-mQGKBV0o9h7GI9URC8c9eh0sYTmpzv3BYheXkm3bxsTjy8k1aIYZ2BWKQdx-OSpx7ixNvBNtb1SKH03rC7IX8TI9neOeuGnOq0K_KAdDZz022pJNrg6bTciP38e2CAz-Q_EQxL7ASl5F_r2Pevy3gJLYzx8csXNAMbqo6RFs5nReX1qcr_1yCfyjwRmuJ4ID88d0r6FMYR2_XQyp2ayF6nUIKQaoSO-80DcWLAuFIBBeY5D)

Friends -

I would like to take this opportunity to reflect back on the past week and the horrific act of terrorism that claimed the lives of 13 of America's finest and dozens of innocent Afghan civilians. These men and women gave the ultimate sacrifice while carrying out their mission to rescue stranded Americans and innocent Afghan civilians who were left behind enemy lines. I offer my prayers to their families as I am sure all of you do during this unfathomable time.

I am left with the question as I am sure many of you are of how did we come to this? I don't believe this mass causality event was inevitable as some had suggested and as I struggle with that question, I am forced to deal with the reality that our leaders failed us. My argument is not whether or not we should have stayed in Afghanistan, as I will never advocate for putting our brave men and women in harms way if we don't need to, but I will always make the case that American citizens and our allies' safety should be of the upmost importance to those in power. We made a promise for their safety and that American promise is one that must be upheld.

The last US troops left the country yesterday and it is apparent according to Gen. Frank McKenzie, head of U.S. Central Command that “We did not get everybody out that we wanted to get out.”

I don't wish to politicize this tragedy further, I am an American citizen who is heartbroken, outraged, and seeking answers past giving talking points on TV when they have the ability and duty to do more.

Veterans and Gold Star Families need our support now more than ever. If you know of anyone who is struggling, please reach out and offer whatever support they may need. If you are active duty military, a veteran, have a loved one who is currently serving, or had a loved on who gave the ultimate sacrifice, there are organizations and groups who can lend support during this incredibly difficult time. Please click on the link below or forward it to those who need the information.

-Lisa
[**Veteran Crisis Line** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=28dd9b666316447d8e166c9ce36b07a7&_e=AhIc4r2mVw6RZ6sQ2BT8xgCzKjXXEKIvCtWIFZwOKuaDZjv84P6VJwP7ZqBotd2Ksvp6xJDm9RRkyLksBhaY2XvF2qMBgPXki63wC1CmgY-PRj7i3aqOIyss9yu5ET6On5Uw5pjfV8-9H8uVvsZklNYMu3259CXU7LHLvh1Okt2WcChQyVYM7mpqEmWOAhadZ90-Pl3diMXJapIR-mL7BBcuujSU4ANFtErizjYzJog2EacSgTePmgoqhr7jpK3uxm9d94tErIEsH5h9inj5XZw8XF54GdNfN0s_kBOk-V4%3D)

**_Susan Wild Voted for Bernie Sanders' Budget _**

Last week, Susan Wild voted in favor of a budget drafted by Socialist Bernie Sanders. Wild has been a vocal supporter of this bill, being quoted several times of pleading with other Democrats to pass this resolution. But what Congresswoman Wild fails to recognize is that this budget is a road map to to ruin that paves the way for greater Washington command and control over the lives and livelihoods of millions of working families.

The $3.5 trillion price tag is just a start as this budget increases spending to $68 trillion over the next ten years which will be the largest sustained spending level in US History and if you combine the spending in the budget with what the Democrats have already spent since taking over the U.S. House of Representatives in 2019, it will equal more than the total taxes paid by all Americans in U.S. history.

This budget proposes $16.3 trillion of total deficit spending over ten years, which is a debt increase greater than the GDP of every country on earth, except the U.S., and increases the national debt to $45 Trillion dollars by 2031. The budget also raises the corporate tax rate to a level higher than communist China and includes a multi-trillion tax increase on small businesses and family farms. This spending is irresponsible, reckless, and downright sickening seeing that it is happening at the same time that inflation is on track to reach its highest level since 1981.

Besides the sheer amount of spending which should be reason enough not to support it, this budget includes amnesty for illegal immigrants, tax breaks and subsidies for wealthy environmentalists, eliminating right to work protections, expanding government-controlled health care, Imposing new taxes and mandates on American energy development that pick winners and losers, raising electricity costs for households, increasing reliance on China and Russia for energy, and new funding to double the size of the IRS.

After voting to move this budget forward, Wild tried to dodge any criticism by stating that her vote "should not be confused for an endorsement" of the final version of the budget. Make no mistake, Susan Wild has led the charge to mortgage the future of this country in order to pursue her socialist wish list of policies and I will make sure the people of Pennsylvania's 7th district know this come election day 2022. Susan Wild was the one that rallied the Democrat caucus to support this bill just yesterday according to reports and she should be held accountable for her "yes" vote today.

Pennsylvania families deserve to know what their representative stands for and I intend to do just that. I ran for local office because of a tax increase and successfully cut taxes for the people of Lehigh County and I will do the same in Washington. This is a budget that will do immense harm to the future of American families and it must be defeated.

|

clean_body: We have another edition of the Scheller for Congress Newsletter! We have new updates from the campaign for what has been a very b Scheller for Congress Newsletter | | | ---|--- Friends - I would like to take this opportunity to reflect back on the past week and the horrific act of terrorism that claimed the lives of 13 of America's finest and dozens of innocent Afghan civilians. These men and women gave the ultimate sacrifice while carrying out their mission to rescue stranded Americans and innocent Afghan civilians who were left behind enemy lines. I offer my prayers to their families as I am sure all of you do during this unfathomable time. I am left with the question as I am sure many of you are of how did we come to this? I don't believe this mass causality event was inevitable as some had suggested and as I struggle with that question, I am forced to deal with the reality that our leaders failed us. My argument is not whether or not we should have stayed in Afghanistan, as I will never advocate for putting our brave men and women in harms way if we don't need to, but I will always make the case that American citizens and our allies' safety should be of the upmost importance to those in power. We made a promise for their safety and that American promise is one that must be upheld. The last US troops left the country yesterday and it is apparent according to Gen. Frank McKenzie, head of U.S. Central Command that “We did not get everybody out that we wanted to get out.” I don't wish to politicize this tragedy further, I am an American citizen who is heartbroken, outraged, and seeking answers past giving talking points on TV when they have the ability and duty to do more. Veterans and Gold Star Families need our support now more than ever. If you know of anyone who is struggling, please reach out and offer whatever support they may need. If you are active duty military, a veteran, have a loved one who is currently serving, or had a loved on who gave the ultimate sacrifice, there are organizations and groups who can lend support during this incredibly difficult time. Please click on the link below or forward it to those who need the information. -Lisa | Susan Wild Voted for Bernie Sanders' Budget Last week, Susan Wild voted in favor of a budget drafted by Socialist Bernie Sanders. Wild has been a vocal supporter of this bill, being quoted several times of pleading with other Democrats to pass this resolution. But what Congresswoman Wild fails to recognize is that this budget is a road map to to ruin that paves the way for greater Washington command and control over the lives and livelihoods of millions of working families. The $3.5 trillion price tag is just a start as this budget increases spending to $68 trillion over the next ten years which will be the largest sustained spending level in US History and if you combine the spending in the budget with what the Democrats have already spent since taking over the U.S. House of Representatives in 2019, it will equal more than the total taxes paid by all Americans in U.S. history. This budget proposes $16.3 trillion of total deficit spending over ten years, which is a debt increase greater than the GDP of every country on earth, except the U.S., and increases the national debt to $45 Trillion dollars by 2031. The budget also raises the corporate tax rate to a level higher than communist China and includes a multi-trillion tax increase on small businesses and family farms. This spending is irresponsible, reckless, and downright sickening seeing that it is happening at the same time that inflation is on track to reach its highest level since 1981. Besides the sheer amount of spending which should be reason enough not to support it, this budget includes amnesty for illegal immigrants, tax breaks and subsidies for wealthy environmentalists, eliminating right to work protections, expanding government-controlled health care, Imposing new taxes and mandates on American energy development that pick winners and losers, raising electricity costs for households, increasing reliance on China and Russia for energy, and new funding to double the size of the IRS. After voting to move this budget forward, Wild tried to dodge any criticism by stating that her vote "should not be confused for an endorsement" of the final version of the budget. Make no mistake, Susan Wild has led the charge to mortgage the future of this country in order to pursue her socialist wish list of policies and I will make sure the people of Pennsylvania's 7th district know this come election day 2022. Susan Wild was the one that rallied the Democrat caucus to support this bill just yesterday according to reports and she should be held accountable for her "yes" vote today. Pennsylvania families deserve to know what their representative stands for and I intend to do just that. I ran for local office because of a tax increase and successfully cut taxes for the people of Lehigh County and I will do the same in Washington. This is a budget that will do immense harm to the future of American families and it must be defeated. | Last Call for "Shooting with Scheller" by August 27th! We only have a few spots left! There will be prizes for the best shot! Included with your ticket is a rental gun, ammo, and dinner! Don't hesitate, sign up today!! | Photos From Around the District! Graduation of "Eric" a Tails of Valor Service Dog Southern Lehigh Advocates for a Full Education Golf Outing! Kristin Lorah-Soldridge for Northampton County Council BBQ! Lehigh Valley Young Republican's Kickball Fundraiser! Fundraiser for our Republican Candidates for Statewide Judge! Northwestern Lehigh Night in the Country! Other Photos from around the District! | Where to find me! mailto:duttforcommissioner@gmail.com?subject=September%2011%20Fundraiser%20RSVP "duttforcommissioner@gmail.com" | As always, be sure to keep an eye out for future updates from the campaign and future events! Onward to victory, Team Scheller | Check out our Social Media Pages! | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

body:
TODAY is ELECTION DAY! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34990119/303684042/-463565617?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTk0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmM4YjhjMy04NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-b4e2ZkGnzNUPccXMPD6VSz2hVoOYQN3XbybcdWBLh8=&emci=63306edb-830a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2bc8b8c3-850a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21906540) Dear Peter, This is the big day, **ELECTION DAY!** Every email we’ve sent, the doors we’ve knocked on, numbers we’ve dialed, the message we’ve texted, and the events we’ve attended, has been in anticipation of this exact moment! We still have our work cut out for us, up until the polls close! We will be out all day, urging folks to vote and collecting those final votes, which are sure to make a difference in this race. With that said, I wouldn’t be doing my job correctly if I didn’t ask: **Have you voted yet?** If the answer is no (maybe you lost track of time or even lost your ballot), go out and vote, TODAY! There are three Accessible Voting Locations throughout AD-18, one in each of the cities; Alameda, Oakland, and San Leandro. However, you can also find your [assigned polling place here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34990120/303684046/-964102651?electionid=244&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTk0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmM4YjhjMy04NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-b4e2ZkGnzNUPccXMPD6VSz2hVoOYQN3XbybcdWBLh8=&emci=63306edb-830a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2bc8b8c3-850a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21906540) _The polls are OPEN and will close at 8:00pm, but don’t wait till the last minute._ If you have your ballot with you, and simply need to return it, you can do so at any of the 24 ballot drop boxes. [**Find your nearest ballot drop box here,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34990121/303684047/1967267901?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTk0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmM4YjhjMy04NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-b4e2ZkGnzNUPccXMPD6VSz2hVoOYQN3XbybcdWBLh8=&emci=63306edb-830a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2bc8b8c3-850a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21906540) and make sure to get it in before 8:00pm! We’ve come a long way, and have garnered support from all corners of our community. This is the final and most important step before we close out the campaign. I’ll say it again, this is the end of our campaign, but just the preamble to the work we will accomplish, together! **_Happy Election Day, #teamMia!_** Yours in Service, Mia Bonta Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2021, FPPC# 1437973
1241 High St, Oakland, CA 94601 | 415-891-9751 | volunteer@miabonta.com | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34990122/303684048/1029081333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTk0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmM4YjhjMy04NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-b4e2ZkGnzNUPccXMPD6VSz2hVoOYQN3XbybcdWBLh8=&emci=63306edb-830a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2bc8b8c3-850a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21906540) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34990123/303684049/-106911857?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTk0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmM4YjhjMy04NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-b4e2ZkGnzNUPccXMPD6VSz2hVoOYQN3XbybcdWBLh8=&emci=63306edb-830a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2bc8b8c3-850a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21906540) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34990124/303684050/-202986150?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTk0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmM4YjhjMy04NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-b4e2ZkGnzNUPccXMPD6VSz2hVoOYQN3XbybcdWBLh8=&emci=63306edb-830a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2bc8b8c3-850a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21906540) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34990125/303684051/2018659114?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTk0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmM4YjhjMy04NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-b4e2ZkGnzNUPccXMPD6VSz2hVoOYQN3XbybcdWBLh8=&emci=63306edb-830a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2bc8b8c3-850a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21906540)

We need to move NOW:

**As the MAGA mob’s representative Madison Cawthorn warns BLOODSHED over the Big Lie, we need to stand firm AGAINST the GOP’s fascism.**

clean_body: Aside from the dozen Biden-caused crises we have going on right now, he’s... Hi friend, it’s Jeff. My team reached out yesterday to explain why Joe Biden must be IMPEACHED. Aside from the dozen Biden-caused crises we have going on right now, he and he alone abandoned Americans in Afghanistan and armed the Taliban with American military weapons , aircraft , and vehicles. He has put Americans’ in harm’s way due either to his incompetence or indifference, regardless of which he deserves to be held to account for! Now, that’s never going to happen, with Democrats in control of our Congress. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. I hope you'll support the fight. Take Back PA to Save America, Jeff Bartos \---------- forwarded message below ---------- From: Impeach Biden (Team Bartos) Date: August 28th, 2021, at 1:51 P.M Subject: CBS Poll: ‘Majority of Americans find Biden incompetent’ To: | | Friend, did you catch this headline from the Post Millennial? According to a recent CBS poll , a majority of Americans no longer find Biden “competent, focused or effective at his job.” We’re not sure why anyone found Biden to be ‘competent' in the first place, considering we’re amidst a: → Border Crisis → Inflation Crisis → Labor Crisis → Gas Shortage → And, now a crisis in Afghanistan. The blame for each and every one falls solely on Joe Biden himself because he’s directly caused them. Joe Biden is destroying America and has betrayed the American people, and for that reason, he must beIMPEACHED! Friend, we can’t make that happen unless conservatives like Jeff Bartos can take back control of Congress. 🚨 AUGUST END OF MONTH DEADLINE 🚨 | | ---|---|--- Friend, it looks like the honeymoon phase between Biden and the mainstream media is finally coming to an end...or they decided even they can’t cover for the disaster that is his presidency. We need to take advantage of this momentum and work to start getting Biden out of officeー Thank you, Team Bartos | | | Paid for by Bartos for US Senate | | 1152 Mae Street #129, Hummelstown, PA, 17036 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Abandoning Our Countrymen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Just days after thirteen flag-draped caskets returned home with the remains of our fallen soldiers killed by terrorists in Kabul, Joe Biden caved to the Taliban’s demand that we leave Afghanistan by August 31, abandoning [hundreds of Americans](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=788aacef45544d08bc10c570b401816d&_e=RoJDm0tauAY3XBJZllqLVYfA9rj5drBbwEZJ1QL8RFVYiUr26q0kv51vGqfHoVPkjIy0hhwrZuR4_ZqvCsUoc7cqTZCtHoF9gH31B2Ue-AgopxbhzHaOBHTTHq4GG3wpQnqqqyCSeUEG6uqfJdader5-YerIyOM0H5lAlyGxSJzLJBcfPoE7T6Tjfiq2P8LW9pZrJ9kqPAa5PmTK56IYwXlHABf3Y0HKViztl6WPQXAmxVDbilh9mLeo2GHi7ySVu2HLgmvVuhFkLLs7CAK3dX6PuHN9CPT0stsLWTiubv7zR0pXBi-j1WMF9B8EhJ6qNHlMCy5Ac9ngnNejGLHDd1uXxdPZEzKFG36Z1s92Ri3-cmJgiKxJVu9s9K_13SFlDYgLOih4fu_Es50GIqlbEQ%3D%3D) in Afghanistan.

The hundreds Americans who remain stranded have been left to the mercy of the same type of brutal killers who took the lives of our thirteen service members.

Afghanistan is now host to the worst terrorist organizations in the world, including ISIS-K, Al Qaeda, and the Taliban. And now thanks to Joe Biden, the Taliban is armed with $85 billion in American military weaponry - which the Taliban and others will inevitably use against Americans, our allies, and Afghan civilians.

It is morally reprehensible for the President of the United States to abandon our fellow countrymen. By breaking his promise to evacuate all Americans who wish to leave, Joe Biden has once again proven that his words are meaningless, and worse yet, his actions have now placed American lives and the future stability of the world in grave danger.

Despite Biden’s abysmal failure of leadership and his administration’s reckless lack of planning, our military should be commended for their heroic efforts during the frantic evacuation at Hamid Karzai Airport. Without their commitment to saving lives, thousands of more Americans would still be trapped behind enemy lines.

In a prepared statement yesterday, Secretary of State, Tony Blinken claimed that the U.S. would continue efforts to get Americans out of the country, but those words ring hallow. As the final plane left Kabul, not a single American civilian was on board.

Joe Biden and his administration have betrayed the American people and the trust of our allies around the world. His handling of the withdrawal in Afghanistan is a stain on the legacy of America and a national embarrassment.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=788aacef45544d08bc10c570b401816d&_t=J_9oYbb-U86r0AKp0piMoy6vwWrnXf7z7cBn-JDePNEKPu5XVGf5v7bahKKxOYbMHgZEI260h3ANvKUxUIhoDmU87JbuNt1qdV5p-vtD0L8IjbzjUTslcE3-Pi7L2cVQg8QfUnqL8ZLAsoJuJMBYE3fna4gije4OFSRwyZ84Ctc%3D).

name: John Kasich
subject: Not what he promised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I've told you before that I will call things as I see them, and what we're seeing with the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=f5695e617f2c4d0596ed35cce381118e&_e=V-REJ1M5mfXqVGa56d3JQM3HiNQ3p6R7ZfVvV2naXzMDoI008cslu-yBX1vPM69vsxc3xRGXPoOxyxnPZANcqwlz8p4ZfyhNkVrT3xGg38DqZusCAFdLpUpt2sjz21-V3L9f5xjk5UTWbwMCGSLMEZwAYkXiPi3OaAG8w6o5yXzk1dkw9_5_DE8ybSFruS4FdWKO9jsQ0qU5QSik6rcbQyh-_KI9ibbTeQ2KQaRLak0eWWeRRlpWRXYIdzeEflWaqWj-9zg-e3eFzkRcqCUd2w%3D%3D) Peter - I've told you before that I will call things as I see them, and what we're seeing with the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan is a complete mess. When this is all over with, I hope that there will be an investigation to determine how this was handled so poorly and it's important that people are held accountable for their mistakes. And while this is happening, here at home, the Democrats in the U.S. House just jammed through a bloated $3.5 spending resolution that would dramatically expand government bureaucracy without a way to pay for it. I'm hopeful more reasonable minds in the U.S. Senate will stall this bill. **This is not the platform that Joe Biden was elected on**. I supported him because he promised to find a new way to break the Washington gridlock and work together. In fact, he could get a win right now if he pushed harder to pass the bipartisan infrastructure bill. I'm going to keep speaking out about this and share my thoughts about how President Biden can keep his promises and deliver for all Americans. **Part of that effort requires that we continue to raise the funds to use all of our communication tools to rally support**. [Anything you can chip in to help hit our August fundraising goal is most appreciated](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=f5695e617f2c4d0596ed35cce381118e&_e=V-REJ1M5mfXqVGa56d3JQI7fC90-hFTnXvIWW5KD30LwLsIXgEkSY635XYnyOwBY7TtAbR4Ctlso7Ce6CmGFjmZrRHyXlVDRQKNMcDGt_c44IHHtkTlml6dKBM4mA2jO5wpo0izPmp44bOT6shO9DxqDE72tSpqvo_sAb7Tgc3HhfaJLtsrsfy4tHGiPFIzqbPBgrCOPmtM-tFGocqukj_snKSLQJKK0ij0qAXuHw0y4twT5ufuIjlSUrrA6jFMKTqKHqNs1HSxzS2szCe2jbQ%3D%3D). [Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=f5695e617f2c4d0596ed35cce381118e&_e=V-REJ1M5mfXqVGa56d3JQI7fC90-hFTnXvIWW5KD30LwLsIXgEkSY635XYnyOwBYmIRxEgQpfEJ4wWv52NOA2CnM8pqKyrF4Op8G8D1MVU2rIZ5epwiwtQpQ98Ky0RngXlLb7MH6UQSN3UTc9DDkYvUm5Ms0-SLxGGRh6XeIxEZSixFhjq5Nb55Z-Tau_Wtwllc8tTuGrE9AZQ3L_ipsoKKfCCAli7t2CTk3XghozvjCMMX7g48Fplhax069xaKGYzZKOwKHhrwv2is2VkWs8Q%3D%3D) I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country. Thank you! -John Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any

body:
| **** | | **TRUMP HIRES STAFF TO RUN FOR PRESIDENT** **[This is the most important ask I have ever made of you. Trump has threatened to run for President if Republicans unseat my Democratic House Majority. And he just hired staff to do it. I'm calling for a historic response -- 6,000 gifts before my End of Month Deadline at midnight -- to protect my Democrats and make Trump's plan BACKFIRE. This is absolutely critical, so I would be incredibly grateful for any generous gift you can spare to ensure we keep the House Majority firmly in Democrats' hands >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQemWNXM~)**
I need you to make a crucial choice in this moment:

\-- We can either let Trump shovel millions to Republicans, steal our Majority, and barge back into power...

\-- Or we can rise up, send a historic response, and show Trump and his Republicans they will NEVER take the House from us.
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)
---

Trump has hinged his entire Presidential run on reclaiming the House.

And I will fight with everything I have to defend it from his and the Republicans' grasp.

But I can't do it alone -- not when he and his Republicans are armed with $102 MILLION to defeat us.

body:

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f0e7bb24a5f94738a69fada2f2ac17f2&_e=mPpyh34mpnk5xn3E2b4tXLrqaRBRpfLbhOwEJoe39gk2Aku7W7D9jCvwhzGW1GPuYQJ-nPHz94Wq30t-T1c_tv5VAlN706WQhuzYDmMxjBnJLI1wfSu3aBATqxUTU2KfkZ8iv36jadbQUCvPmCzpy7uLJRPI9gDPA9kTKcxZAgjIztfs-DEUQaeuimL_z5hF2J_Smtwrzl6I6FbmgQ_qnJkPeVvbDD_ufvQf6oiJqCvFTdWzeHf4kgQVqJylkx_-PO2sPNz5psTaTzYdt4M_6XrWyI2D8dpYR8Bhvlro1S4lJdeSBtZnuNDYaMMquTIxDV4H3qzhOvWpXrhrEt-kl0ITf9lVvtMq7pzhm0zykCgxa43ZdI3Qth_pLdxWlJGLezJF66Iw5dEJ7GLypm5Ll99558aspq04015aWczG9R6Pnr2rPcmaSv7-IFctFQ2v3Gf7jgJel9a5U3eRq111BNNVqbkyrWSGYZaqu-uWGKhQE81CNBpa3-I73b-q88ICFScSfcduHxcPrRdcevaPyg%3D%3D)

Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f0e7bb24a5f94738a69fada2f2ac17f2&_e=mPpyh34mpnk5xn3E2b4tXLrqaRBRpfLbhOwEJoe39gk2Aku7W7D9jCvwhzGW1GPuYQJ-nPHz94Wq30t-T1c_tv5VAlN706WQhuzYDmMxjBnJLI1wfSu3aBATqxUTU2KfkZ8iv36jadbQUCvPmCzpy7uLJRPI9gDPA9kTKcxZAgjIztfs-DEUQaeuimL_z5hF2J_Smtwrzl6I6FbmgQ_qnJkPeVvbDD_ufvQf6oiJqCvFTdWzeHf4kgQVqJylkx_-PO2sPNz5psTaTzYdt4M_6XrWyI2D8dpYR8Bhvlro1S4lJdeSBtZnuNDYaMMquTIx4N_CVcOfgHj1HeIEphFp2Z6Q_aBVnSC1RQp5hZfbTwe9n8qJWsw7G-Mr31iLYSvzg_wfoxKZyU9JkMEe_8IJowKZ-dqctR2C98nqzYMD7ajBwGrsr3gxDG1myqnjMiu53aGVrG904WjhxZay-OfXyMqeOqpC4bU-w_U6RafcVLWKWdbmp83X6svZ84tUGcdjMQFp0_dSWOfy-2KWMrUWSw%3D%3D)**

From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f0e7bb24a5f94738a69fada2f2ac17f2&_e=mPpyh34mpnk5xn3E2b4tXLrqaRBRpfLbhOwEJoe39gk2Aku7W7D9jCvwhzGW1GPuYQJ-nPHz94Wq30t-T1c_tv5VAlN706WQhuzYDmMxjBnJLI1wfSu3aBATqxUTU2KfkZ8iv36jadbQUCvPmCzpy7uLJRPI9gDPA9kTKcxZAgjIztfs-DEUQaeuimL_z5hF2J_Smtwrzl6I6FbmgQ_qnJkPeVvbDD_ufvQf6oiJqCvFTdWzeHf4kgQVqJylkx_-PO2sPNz5psTaTzYdt4M_6XrWyI2D8dpYR8Bhvlro1S4lJdeSBtZnuNDYaMMquTIxGVoB7czIoVZp0F_4z0ZEfJcAV3ESxnMogfBmxSfbdYjgM-IMIkNu7mRWI5y9_cm-fPuD_ZPWiNH2H-JkP0N0ywwVFd4MdDFRTcVs9G6EPDAjyzt9px9G2BNe2Q1IX-UDFA15avxkUQTtX1oqSBPTONawPbAiA-sK7YI7JIEYN0o9I1JOmL2hzi9S-wfPcnggP8lI_KcQMP96Jb9IoqxqKw%3D%3D) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,

clean_body: I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Peter, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: MTG & Nancy Pelosi
subject: my phone number
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter -- Joe Biden left Americans behind in Afghanistan to be
taken hostage by the Taliban.
Now, to distract from his failure, the
Democrats along with Nancy Pelosi, and Liz Cheney are demanding I
hand over my phone records to their January 6 Witch Hunt
Committee!
Why?
Because they're coming after members like me
who stood up for President Trump and against the Democrat
takeover of our elections.
Make no mistake: this is nothing more than an
attempt to hide China Joe's impeachable activity like the
Afghanistan debacle.
But I'm not backing down.
JOE BIDEN MUST BE IMPEACHED.
Not tomorrow. Not next week. Not next year.

NOW!

SIGN YOUR IMPEACH JOE BIDEN PETITION RIGHT
AWAY
After you sign, I'm asking you to please
consider going the extra mile by chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15
-- whatever you can most afford -- to help me "Impeach Joe Biden"
and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN.
Joe Biden refuses to resign.
Republicans must impeach him before China Joe
can do any more damage to America.
SIGN YOUR IMPEACH JOE BIDEN PETITION RIGHT
AWAY
There is no time to delay.
We must move swiftly to ensure that Joe Biden
can no longer hurt our country and destroy it piece by piece.
The case against Joe Biden in STRONG.
Consider President Biden's:

Dereliction of duty in Afghanistan; and
Violations of immigration law that has
caused a national security crisis on our Southern border;

In seven short months, Joe Biden has caused
America to lose the respect of the entire world.
The evidence is clear and his actions are so
egregious that he must be impeached.
Joe Biden DISHONORED the sacrifices made by
every American soldier who fought in the 20-year war, especially
those who gave their life for the cause.
Joe Biden LEFT BEHIND over 10,000 American
citizens to face the terrifying rule of the Taliban as they
impose Sharia law across the country.
No commander-in-chief should ever leave
Americans behind!
Joe Biden (along with Kamala Harris) VIOLATED
our immigration laws, deprived our Border Patrol of manpower and
resources, and created a national security crisis by allowing
unknown foreign nationals into our country who wish to do harm to
Americans.
That is why I am drafting Articles of
Impeachment against President Joe Biden.
Will you become a Citizen CoSponsor to urge
your Representatives and Senators to get on board?
The Taliban have made a fool of Joe Biden.

America's southern border is being overrun
with hordes of illegal aliens.
Our economy is crippled because of the
Chinese Covid bioweapon.
The world is laughing at us and Joe Biden has
fled into hiding!
China Joe must go.
75 million Americans are fed up with
inaction.
Will you join and become a citizen
co-sponsor?

I need you to join this fight: become a
Citizen Co-Sponsor by signing your "Impeach Joe Biden" petition!
After you sign, I'm asking you to please
consider going the extra mile by chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15
-- whatever you can most afford -- to the "Impeach Joe Biden
Fund" and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE
BIDEN.
The Biden Crime Family must be held
accountable.
So please, after you become a citizen
co-sponsor to impeach Joe Biden, consider donating before the
deadline.
I'll keep you updated.

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

body:
| | | |

| | Peter, This is going to be a longer email, but please stick with me and read the whole thing.** _It's important_**. Indiana Democrats have been working overtime to help Hoosier put COVID-19 behind them. We saw an opportunity to rebuild our state and create a better future for Hoosiers across Indiana. This is why we passed the American Rescue Plan and the investments in vaccines and relief efforts in all 92 counties. It's also why we look forward to passing the American Jobs Plan and its once-in-a-generation investments that will revitalize Indiana's infrastructure system. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34993033/303694088/624230061?refcode=INGOP.COVID.08.31.21.&INGOP.COVID.08.31.21.=INGOP.COVID.08.31.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTFjOWNhZC04ZDBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LddVrS0D2OPiWvx71mxqS5QWcu70o0Okbn8X2WKtG0=) While Indiana Democrats have been working to improve the lives of all Hoosiers, state Republicans appear to have completely given up on providing any solutions on COVID-19 altogether. Instead, Indiana Republicans have been focused on their extreme partisanship, irresponsible agenda, and continuous infighting that does nothing but hold families back from a better future. In fact, the INGOP continues to mislead Hoosiers with misinformation about today's most-pressing issues - like the pandemic. [

](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34993034/303694089/624230061?refcode=INGOP.COVID.08.31.21.&INGOP.COVID.08.31.21.=INGOP.COVID.08.31.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTFjOWNhZC04ZDBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LddVrS0D2OPiWvx71mxqS5QWcu70o0Okbn8X2WKtG0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34993035/303694090/624230061?refcode=INGOP.COVID.08.31.21.&INGOP.COVID.08.31.21.=INGOP.COVID.08.31.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTFjOWNhZC04ZDBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LddVrS0D2OPiWvx71mxqS5QWcu70o0Okbn8X2WKtG0=)
Holcomb on Indiana's COVID-19 response: "I'm good with where we are from a state perspective" **It's time that we put Indiana Republicans on notice. WE CAN replace them next year. **Indiana Democrats have done everything that we can to put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror - vaccines and relief for our families, our schools, and our communities. Democrats have followed the science to determine what is best for Hoosier families. But until Hoosiers elect more Democrats to office, Indiana will continue to find itself in its "work more for less" economy, with underfunded public schools, and unnecessary culture wars that do nothing but divide our communities. It's time to hold Indiana Republicans accountable.
Chip in today to help Democrats get rid of dangerous Republicans. In Solidarity,
Lauren Ganapini
Executive Director
