clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | Peter, This is going to be a longer email, but please stick with me and read the whole thing. It's important. Indiana Democrats have been working overtime to help Hoosier put COVID-19 behind them. We saw an opportunity to rebuild our state and create a better future for Hoosiers across Indiana. This is why we passed the American Rescue Plan and the investments in vaccines and relief efforts in all 92 counties. It's also why we look forward to passing the American Jobs Plan and its once-in-a-generation investments that will revitalize Indiana's infrastructure system. = While Indiana Democrats have been working to improve the lives of all Hoosiers, state Republicans appear to have completely given up on providing any solutions on COVID-19 altogether. Instead, Indiana Republicans have been focused on their extreme partisanship, irresponsible agenda, and continuous infighting that does nothing but hold families back from a better future. In fact, the INGOP continues to mislead Hoosiers with misinformation about today's most-pressing issues - like the pandemic. = = Holcomb on Indiana's COVID-19 response: "I'm good with where we are from a state perspective" It's time that we put Indiana Republicans on notice. WE CAN replace them next year. Indiana Democrats have done everything that we can to put COVID-19 in the rearview mirror - vaccines and relief for our families, our schools, and our communities. Democrats have followed the science to determine what is best for Hoosier families. But until Hoosiers elect more Democrats to office, Indiana will continue to find itself in its "work more for less" economy, with underfunded public schools, and unnecessary culture wars that do nothing but divide our communities. It's time to hold Indiana Republicans accountable. Chip in today to help Democrats get rid of dangerous Republicans. In Solidarity, Lauren Ganapini Executive Director Indiana Democratic Party If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Special Note: Our average online donation this year is $25. A donation in that amount helps us build the primary and re-election campaigns that can defeat Indiana Republicans. = | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

subject: , meet Rio and Jelani:
body:
RSVP for a Labor Day Weekend Canvass near you! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us6.campaign-archive.com/?e=400a181d5a&u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=fca4962e1c)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7c1dccfc15&e=400a181d5a)
---
[CLICK TO SEE DETAILS AND RSVP](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ae786ba395&e=400a181d5a)
| |
### **Introducing: Russo HQ Regional Organizing Team!**
September is just around the corner, , and we’ve got a lot of exciting events coming up! From forums and festivals to knocking on our neighbors doors, we need your help connecting to OH-15 voters. Sign up for a volunteer event near you, and make sure you introduce yourself to our new regional staffers ⤵️
---
| | |
---
_“My name is Rio Aagaard-Shively, and I’m your Southeast Ohio Regional Organizing Director! I worked with campaigns in Iowa, Ohio, and Montana last year, and I’m excited to be back in the Buckeye State to elect Allison and to support the great work Democrats are doing here in Southeast Ohio! I’m looking forward to working with you to send Allison to Congress and get folks out to vote this fall!”_ **Say Hi: [Rio@allisonrusso.com](mailto:Rio@allisonrusso.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer%20in%20SEO!&body=Hi%20Rio%2C%20%0A%0AI'd%20like%20to%20volunteer%20in%20SE%20Ohio.%20How%20can%20I%20get%20started%3F)**
| |
---
_"Hello, my name is Jelani Coleman. I'm excited to be joining Team Russo as the Central Ohio Regional Organizing Director! I believe that when we organize we win. When we talk to voters and bring them to the table we change communities. This is our moment and our chance to send Allison Russo to Congress, and I need your help. I need you to knock on some doors in your community, and call your neighbors. Please sign up to build a better Ohio with us!"_
**Say Hi:[Jelani@allisonrusso.com](mailto:jelani@allisonrusso.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer%20in%20central%20Ohio!&body=Hi%20Jelani%2C%20%0A%0AI'd%20like%20to%20volunteer%20in%20SE%20Ohio.%20How%20can%20I%20get%20started%3F)**
| |
Be on the lookout for more updates and events this week, including [volunteer kick-offs](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=19c8678722&e=400a181d5a), [trainings](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=62d7e59de5&e=400a181d5a), and [community events](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b31efcf9de&e=400a181d5a)!

In solidarity,

Morgan, Rio, and Jelani
Russo for Congress
---

body:
Read this before it's too late. | |
---
| |
I wanted to quickly follow up on my email from yesterday, and I wanted to share a number with you:

**$45.92. That’s our average online contribution for this month.**

**Every dollar makes a difference, and right now, with the clock ticking closer to midnight and the end of the month,[I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can if you haven’t already — whether it’s $45.92 or even just $20.22.](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=ce06d5b28b&e=0b94e583bc)**
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=f86f8291e0&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE NOW")
---
| Joe Biden and the Democrats have humiliated our country with the debacle in Afghanistan, opened our borders, and are trying to spend TRILLIONS we simply don’t have.

And they’re depending on elite donors across the country to defeat Republicans and lie about their agenda.

[We depend on supporters like YOU, pitching in $50, $20.22, or even just $5.](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=c256e8bdb0&e=0b94e583bc)

So many of you have stepped up, but right now we’re falling just $437 short of our $2,122 August end of month goal.

Your investment in winning back the U.S. Senate this year will help fuel victory next year. **[So, please, if you haven’t already, chip in whatever you can now to help us stay on track.](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=6bb56a2150&e=0b94e583bc) **

The future of our country depends on Republicans winning in 2022, and we can’t do that unless we get started now.

Thank you for standing with us.

Senator Roger Marshall
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
---
| [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=e48a6befb6&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| |
I’ll cut right to the point: **Tomorrow marks the end of August, which means we have exactly one month to go until the end of the fundraising quarter.**

It’s never been more important that we stay on top of our fundraising goals, and right now the finance team has told me we need to raise another $2,122 to stay on track. [**Will you help? Chip in here.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=7800020bbc&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=91b47729c8&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE NOW")
---
| Just look at what Joe Biden and the Democrats are doing to our country!

**➤****They’ve humiliated our country and handed the Taliban $85 BILLION worth of weapons and technology.**

**➤****They’re ramming a $3.5 TRILLION socialist spending bill through Congress.**

**➤****They’ve opened our borders.**

**➤****They’re attacking the Second Amendment and trying to indoctrinate our kids and military with critical race theory.**

**➤****They’re refusing to hold Communist China accountable for what it unleashed on the world. **

If you’re like me this, you’re sick of this woke left agenda and American weakness.

**_The ONLY way to stop the insanity now is to win back the U.S. Senate. And victory next year starts by reaching our fundraising goals this year._**

[**Will you help? We need to raise another $2,122 before the month is out to stay on track. If you’re able, please chip in $50 — or even just $20.22 — right now. **](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=53cc3187cf&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| [](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=2ee33562e3&e=0b94e583bc)
Senator Roger Marshall
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=2a8b22aa9c&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE NOW")
---
|

| |
---
| [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=f914945363&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=0799cdc67c&e=0b94e583bc&c=b0fa0021e3).

name: Giffords.org
subject: Just a few of our priorities for this year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Hitting our $100,000 fundraising goal will enable us to continue working to pass gun safety legislation.
#

Friend -
The fight against gun violence matters every single day. When lives are at stake, our work doesn’t stop.
[**That is why tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline is so crucial and why we are asking you to rush a $3 contribution before midnight. If you are able, please pitch in now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21-eom?refcode=em210831-1-15&t=1&refcode2=772_3935704_vn6Cn0&akid=772%2E3935704%2Evn6Cn0)
Here are just a few of our top priorities for this year that your contribution will help support:
**_\- Banning “ghost guns”_**
We’ve driven hundreds of public comments on the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) website in support of regulating “ghost guns,” firearms that are untraceable, available without a background check and increasingly used in serious crimes.
**_\- Passing universal background checks_**
Background checks have passed the House, so now we are doing everything we can to ensure universal background checks legislation is passed in the Senate and signed into federal law. With a gun safety majority in Congress and President Biden in the White House, there is no better time than now to get this done.
**_\- Funding community violence intervention_**
Community violence intervention programs prevent violence at the local level. They’re proven to work—we just need to fund them. President Biden proposed $5 billion for local efforts earlier this year, and we’re pushing to get that funding passed by Congress.
**We’re relying on you to help us continue this important work. So can we count on you to make a $3 donation before our midnight deadline? Pitch in quickly at this link if you can.**
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/August-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21-eom?refcode=em210831-1-15&t=2&refcode2=772_3935704_vn6Cn0&akid=772%2E3935704%2Evn6Cn0)
Thank you for your role in saving lives.
\- The team at Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21-eom?refcode=em210831-1-15&t=3&refcode2=772_3935704_vn6Cn0&akid=772%2E3935704%2Evn6Cn0)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=772%2E3935704%2Evn6Cn0) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Save Warnock (via When Democrats Turn Out)
subject: “Dead men can’t pass laws”: Proud Boys threaten Sen. Warnock!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Recently, Proud Boys supporter and domestic terrorist Edward Florea pleaded guilty to threatening the life of Sen. Warnock on social media \-- writing, “Dead men can't pass laws”. This is just one example of the right-wing extremism coming from the Republican Party \-- and it proves that we must protect Sen. Warnock and his seat in the Senate at all costs. Right-wing extremists like Edward Florea are threatening Raphael Warnock personally. And CNN reports that Trump ally Kelly Loeffler \-- who lost her Georgia Senate seat on January 5 by less than 100,000 votes \-- is seriously considering challenging Warnock in 2022. Peter, CNN just declared Warnock the #1 most vulnerable Democrat in the country in 2022. And if Warnock loses his Senate seat, Democrats will hand control of the Senate to Mitch McConnell. That means: Goodbye, voting rights reform. Goodbye, universal health care. Goodbye, expansions to Medicare and Social Security. We are doing all we can to re-elect Raphael Warnock and protect our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority. But yesterday, we FAILED to reach our fundraising goal. YOU stepped up in a big way to elect Raphael Warnock and give Democrats a 50/50 Senate. It's only because of you that Democrats have been able to pass COVID-19 relief and get more money into the hands of Americans. But with GOP extremists becoming more empowered by feckless GOP members of Congress like Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, and Marjorie Taylor Greene, there hasn't been a more important moment for you to give again to protect Raphael Warnock and our Senate Majority. **[We MUST raise $3,153 before midnight tonight to protect Raphael Warnock's Senate seat and keep our Democratic Senate. If we fail, not only will we lose Warnock's Senate seat in Georgia, but we will lose the Senate majority, handing Republicans power and further empowering extremists like Florea. subject: keep reading
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John Fetterman needs your help.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210831-2476-header&t=1&akid=2476%2E434096%2E1ZrMNC)
Keep reading, Peter, because John Fetterman needs your help!
There are just around 12 hours left before our big August fundraising deadline, and we’re trying to raise $84,172 into the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before midnight.
**Unfortunately, we’re running behind on donations right now.** Status update:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29142?refcode=em20210831-2476&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2476%2E434096%2E1ZrMNC)
[**_Peter, can you please rush a donation of $5 or more to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate? In a crowded Pennsylvania primary like ours, we can’t afford to come up short at any point._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29142?refcode=em20210831-2476&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2476%2E434096%2E1ZrMNC)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29142?refcode=em20210831-2476&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2476%2E434096%2E1ZrMNC)**
Thanks for all you do,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210831-2476-footer&t=23&refcode2=2476_434096_1ZrMNC&akid=2476%2E434096%2E1ZrMNC)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

| Peter -- today is the last day to fundraise before the end-of-month deadline. [_**I hope you 'll consider contributing to Abigail's re-election campaign today so we can meet our August goal.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/V532FjGk8dzsXm4TmY2Mum_ewpF31DvjnCUZjEIhWyk=/wafkJ3yvyJU5uXg9LY06tXFpJimb3OgxeTTK9V0m1CQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210831-1-EM&amount=25)

There are many reasons our campaign needs sufficient resources, but here are just a few:
1. **Multiple opponents have already declared their candidacy to challenge Abigail** in Virginia's 7th District. They know how competitive this seat is and will do everything in their power to defeat her.

2. Outside groups have already launched **ad campaigns to discredit her work in Congress.** As we get closer to the election, there will be more attacks.

3. House Democrats know that this seat is vulnerable -- that's why they added Abigail to the **Frontline list** , which names House Democrats who must win in 2022.

4. **Abigail is working every single day to serve the hard-working people of Central Virginia.** She needs to win this race to continue advocating for the expansion of rural broadband, to lower prescription drug prices, and to keep fighting for the kitchen table issues that Central Virginians care about.

Peter, the stakes of this race are high, but we have a team strong enough to weather any of the challenges that we face. I am confident that with your support, we can hold this seat in 2022.

[_**Can I count on you for a contribution before our August deadline?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/V532FjGk8dzsXm4TmY2Mum_ewpF31DvjnCUZjEIhWyk=/wafkJ3yvyJU5uXg9LY06tXFpJimb3OgxeTTK9V0m1CQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210831-1-EM&amount=25)

Thank you for your support,

Whitney

We're going to miss our August fundraising goal unless we're able to come up with the additional money by midnight tonight. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. |
---
Peter.

I was just as shocked as anyone else when my Democrat opponent outraised my campaign in the 2nd quarter. It's not something that I'm open to letting happen again in the 3rd quarter. **While we've got another month to make sure that doesn't happen, our success in August is paramount if we're going to come out on top.**

I was just as shocked as anyone else when my Democrat opponent outraised my campaign in the 2nd quarter. It's not something that I'm open to letting happen again in the 3rd quarter. While we've got another month to make sure that doesn't happen, our success in August is paramount if we're going to come out on top. Well, as you know today is the last day of August and here at my campaign office we're all a bit on edge. I just looked at our donation dashboard and to hit our August fundraising goal we need to raise another $2,538 before MIDNIGHT. | PLEASE CHIP-IN STATUS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com: PENDING If somehow I get outraised once again this quarter, I'm afraid that there will be grave implications beyond my campaign. Politically ambitious Republicans in Oregon might even take the opporutnity to jump into this race, creating a contentious primary which we cannot afford to have if we're going to win this district and take back the House. We can't lose the momentum that we've built since launching this campaign, because this race will win Republicans back control of the House. Thanks for your help. Respectfully, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress - | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: permanently RED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this -- but Sen. Rosen said I could reach out today
#
Team,
I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this -- but Sen. Rosen said I could reach out today because **Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34995818/303704257/-1995958237?refcode=jr_em_nd_210831_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjE5NDRjMC05NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P91TBw3sIaFlwXmNl6_ywEEQlTw3hW9iqxKxASyIBdc=)
I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate -- but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought.
I'll give it to you straight: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP permanently. I'm not giving up on Florida -- but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now.
And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight.
**[So I have to ask you humbly and directly because outlets like CNN say my race could decide Senate control: Will you split $5 or more to my campaign and Jacky Rosen help me win in Florida and keep the Senate blue? I’m still short of my $50,000 midnight goal, so contributing whatever amount you can will really help my campaign right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34995819/303704258/-1995958237?refcode=jr_em_nd_210831_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjE5NDRjMC05NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P91TBw3sIaFlwXmNl6_ywEEQlTw3hW9iqxKxASyIBdc=)**
I can’t thank you enough for your support.
Congresswoman Val Demings

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34995820/303704259/-1995958237?refcode=jr_em_nd_210831_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjE5NDRjMC05NTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P91TBw3sIaFlwXmNl6_ywEEQlTw3hW9iqxKxASyIBdc=)**

name: Francis Conole
subject: Join Our Mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
My name is Francis Conole, and I’m running for Congress in New York’s 24th Congressional District.

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34995858/303704827/1008973322?refcode=con_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjM0MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQzZTUwMi05NjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Br4Gb1sEE5rtfPtK7Z3rRiDbNytu6A_Lx_yKdYDW8Ok=)

| | Friend, For over 20 years, I fought for American values at home and abroad. My life’s mission has focused on defending Democracy and protecting our nation's interests. As a Senior Naval Officer, I took an oath to support and defend the Constitution five times — through multiple deployments and over 20 years serving in uniform. I will always live up to my oath. Now, my mission is to continue to fight for our country and for the hard-working people of Central New York, the place my journey began and a community my family has proudly served for generations. **My name is Francis Conole, and I’m running for Congress in New York’s 24th District against Republican John Katko because it’s past time we had a leader willing to invest in working families and rebuild our middle class.** **[So, if you’re ready to ensure that healthcare is a right, not a privilege, make sure families aren’t burdened by crippling debt, and invest in the infrastructure and clean energy needed to guarantee our future economic success, then please, click here to join our mission today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34995859/303704840/2044239901?contactdata=KNRF5zFOEOrixk7SydvjVl8%2BXma9GS%2BZa0qC30be8CR0ZpWQLdxvLAdfsT9WMTYObRmc9HXOGC3tbkdMZeuLlFmFosOTYqDk6kGXrz3VKDeT%2FJ93tuwgyfm42Yjw8YfPcHYAR5ytjk6KsCvEY%2FXv5g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjM0MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQzZTUwMi05NjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Br4Gb1sEE5rtfPtK7Z3rRiDbNytu6A_Lx_yKdYDW8Ok=&emci=71901e43-97fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5ed3e502-960a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10659470)** | | | [Join Our Mission »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34995861/303704848/2044239901?contactdata=KNRF5zFOEOrixk7SydvjVl8%2BXma9GS%2BZa0qC30be8CR0ZpWQLdxvLAdfsT9WMTYObRmc9HXOGC3tbkdMZeuLlFmFosOTYqDk6kGXrz3VKDeT%2FJ93tuwgyfm42Yjw8YfPcHYAR5ytjk6KsCvEY%2FXv5g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjM0MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQzZTUwMi05NjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Br4Gb1sEE5rtfPtK7Z3rRiDbNytu6A_Lx_yKdYDW8Ok=&emci=71901e43-97fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5ed3e502-960a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10659470)
---
My family has called Central New York home for over four generations. I come from a family of teachers, nurses, social workers, police officers, and veterans. My father is a retired Army Officer, my mother a teacher, and my grandfather was the only Democrat ever elected Sheriff of Onondaga County.
They taught me what it means to work hard and sacrifice for others; to come together as one family — one community — and persevere when times get tough.
Those values are why I attended the Naval Academy, navigated a warship in the Middle East after 9/11, served in a combat zone in Iraq, and served as a senior intelligence officer at the highest levels of the Department of Defense.
But the America I took an oath to protect was not an America I recognized on January 6, when a group of radical, far-right domestic terrorists, emboldened by the Republican Party’s most powerful leaders, tried to overthrow our government.
Instead, it was an America run by Washington elites who have spent years trying to take healthcare away from millions, and wealthy politicians like John Katko who have lost touch with what it means to defend and protect working families.
That’s why I’m running for Congress, to carry out my oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
**But I need your help.**
**[So please, join our mission today and invest in a future all Americans can be proud of — one that prioritizes the safety and overall well-being of our Democracy and its hard-working, middle-class families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34995862/303704856/2044239901?contactdata=KNRF5zFOEOrixk7SydvjVl8%2BXma9GS%2BZa0qC30be8CR0ZpWQLdxvLAdfsT9WMTYObRmc9HXOGC3tbkdMZeuLlFmFosOTYqDk6kGXrz3VKDeT%2FJ93tuwgyfm42Yjw8YfPcHYAR5ytjk6KsCvEY%2FXv5g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjM0MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQzZTUwMi05NjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Br4Gb1sEE5rtfPtK7Z3rRiDbNytu6A_Lx_yKdYDW8Ok=&emci=71901e43-97fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5ed3e502-960a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10659470)**
| | [Join Our Mission »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34995863/303704865/2044239901?contactdata=KNRF5zFOEOrixk7SydvjVl8%2BXma9GS%2BZa0qC30be8CR0ZpWQLdxvLAdfsT9WMTYObRmc9HXOGC3tbkdMZeuLlFmFosOTYqDk6kGXrz3VKDeT%2FJ93tuwgyfm42Yjw8YfPcHYAR5ytjk6KsCvEY%2FXv5g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjM0MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQzZTUwMi05NjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Br4Gb1sEE5rtfPtK7Z3rRiDbNytu6A_Lx_yKdYDW8Ok=&emci=71901e43-97fe-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5ed3e502-960a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10659470)
---
Together, I know we can do it.
— Francis Conole

clean_body: My name is Francis Conole, and I’m running for Congress in New York’s 24th Congressional District. | = | | Friend, For over 20 years, I fought for American values at home and abroad. My life’s mission has focused on defending Democracy and protecting our nation's interests. As a Senior Naval Officer, I took an oath to support and defend the Constitution five times — through multiple deployments and over 20 years serving in uniform. I will always live up to my oath. Now, my mission is to continue to fight for our country and for the hard-working people of Central New York, the place my journey began and a community my family has proudly served for generations. My name is Francis Conole, and I’m running for Congress in New York’s 24th District against Republican John Katko because it’s past time we had a leader willing to invest in working families and rebuild our middle class. | | | My family has called Central New York home for over four generations. I come from a family of teachers, nurses, social workers, police officers, and veterans. My father is a retired Army Officer, my mother a teacher, and my grandfather was the only Democrat ever elected Sheriff of Onondaga County. They taught me what it means to work hard and sacrifice for others; to come together as one family — one community — and persevere when times get tough. Those values are why I attended the Naval Academy, navigated a warship in the Middle East after 9/11, served in a combat zone in Iraq, and served as a senior intelligence officer at the highest levels of the Department of Defense. But the America I took an oath to protect was not an America I recognized on January 6, when a group of radical, far-right domestic terrorists, emboldened by the Republican Party’s most powerful leaders, tried to overthrow our government. Instead, it was an America run by Washington elites who have spent years trying to take healthcare away from millions, and wealthy politicians like John Katko who have lost touch with what it means to defend and protect working families. That’s why I’m running for Congress, to carry out my oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic. But I need your help. | | Together, I know we can do it. — Francis Conole | | If you'd like to support Conole for Congress, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: Susan (personal)
subject: quick question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
The kind of work I’ve been doing is only possible with a Democratic majority in the House.

| Hi Peter,

I hate to bother you, so I’ll keep this quick. Our end-of-month deadline is just hours away, but we’re still $1,297 short of our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in today to get us there? Here’s a secure link to donate now: [_**https://wildforcongress.com/AugustGoal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34996724/303709504/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210831-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTdiMzQ2ZS05NzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zVk7XSlrKh8m3jI2XXxBu42rAHC9GGbJi6J-VD9K_1w=)

I so enjoyed being home in the Lehigh Valley this month — but I’m even more excited to be back in Congress fighting for key issues like voting rights, lowering prescription drug costs, and securing good jobs.

The kind of work I’ve been doing is only possible with a Democratic majority in the House. And if we’re going to keep the House blue in 2022, we can’t afford to lose a single seat, including mine.

To keep me in Congress and keep the House blue, please consider contributing to my re-election campaign before our deadline tonight. Multiple polls have shown us either beating Gov. Ron DeSantis or closing in on him, and our momentum has skyrocketed. Folks like you are powering this campaign to build a Florida for All, and I really can’t thank you enough.

**But now is when we need to dig in and keep this momentum going.[My finance team has set a lofty end-of-month goal to finish August strong, so can you chip in? name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: My final pitch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I'm about to ask you to make a small donation to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our end-of-month deadline expires tonight at midnight. Here's my final pitch:

When I ran statewide in 2018, I took on Scott Walker and his Republican allies, and I beat them in a midterm election -- overcoming my GOP opponent by a margin of more than 100,000 votes and winning back _nine_ Trump counties (the places we'll need to flip this Senate seat!).

Defeating Ron Johnson won't be easy, but I have a strong track record of beating Republicans in statewide elections in Wisconsin. And I have no doubt that our team is the strongest to take him on now, which is why he's attacking me already.

Wisconsin is our best chance to expand the 50-50 Democratic Senate majority. _The Cook Political Report_ just moved our race from Lean R to Toss-Up and _CNN_ is calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP incumbent. We can flip this seat, but only if we hit our goals.

**That's why I'm asking you to rush a donation of any amount to help us build another winning campaign in Wisconsin. Please use this personal link to add a donation before midnight:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-aug21-eom&refcode2=Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34997052/303710453/-1936136847?gpsid=50_130_20313&refcode=em21_210831_EOM10_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_format&utm_campaign=em21_210831_EOM10_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_format&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGUyN2UxZi05ODBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JHMQU0ctaZ0u5umU6BYoW9wzkYjVz0_ho42zC-RHaY0=)**

When Ron Johnson and his allies assume they can attack me personally and affect the outcome of this race, they're assuming our grassroots team doesn't have the power to fight back. Let's prove them wrong.

— Sarah Godlewski
| Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34997053/303710454/-1936136847?gpsid=50_130_20313&refcode=em21_210831_EOM10_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_format&utm_campaign=em21_210831_EOM10_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_format&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGUyN2UxZi05ODBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JHMQU0ctaZ0u5umU6BYoW9wzkYjVz0_ho42zC-RHaY0=)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Support the Cajun Navy Rescuing Hurricane Victims
body:
| |
---
We’ve all been watching the devastation from Hurricane Ida, and if you want to help, the best way is to support the Cajun Navy.

The Cajun Navy is simply Americans helping Americans. There’s no red tape, no bureaucratic egos or machines to get through. They are citizens helping citizens, straight up.

**Please consider supporting the work they are doing.** When government agencies can’t or won’t go into flooded areas or other dangerous situations until it’s too late, the Cajun Navy is there.

You can [read more about the Cajun Navy](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjQzLWQyNmNiNzdiMTcwODQ0NDc5YzZiMTZiOThmMWFmN2E0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9uZXdzLnRydXN0Lm9yZy9pdGVtLzIwMjEwODMwMTYzMDMyLTV4YTl3Lz9taWQ9NDQyNjImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=yhIyF99OjRLrcObP224nRg), as well as [make a donation](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjQzLWQyNmNiNzdiMTcwODQ0NDc5YzZiMTZiOThmMWFmN2E0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jYWp1bnJlbGllZi5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25zL2RvbmF0ZS1jYWp1bi1uYXZ5LWZvdW5kYXRpb24vP21pZD00NDI2MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=5Zq_-Vcmp076csHC-yHPcA).

Tea Party Patriots Action is not affiliated with the Cajun Navy, but we appreciate what they do and want to help the Americans suffering any way that we can.

Thank you!

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: Voter suppression anywhere is a threat to democracy everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
I'll stop at nothing to make sure your vote is protected by the Senate.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, Voter suppression _anywhere_ is a threat to democracy _everywhere_. So when fellow Americans, say, in Georgia, experience obstacles at the ballot box that we in Vermont aren't subject to, we need to call it what it is -- voter suppression -- and make it right. Last week, the House passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which will do just that. I'll stop at nothing to protect your vote and make sure the Senate sends this bill to President Biden's desk right after we come back from recess. **[We need everyone to speak out. Sign my petition to urge Senators to come together to uphold our voting rights and preserve American democracy.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** Let me tell you how we got to this boiling point. Eight years ago, the Supreme Court weakened the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ , opening the door for states to pass restrictive laws. Then, as a reaction to Democratic victories last year, and fueled by the former president's lie of widespread voter fraud, 18 Republican-led state legislatures enacted 30 laws to suppress votes. Most recently, the Supreme Court upheld two such laws this summer. That's why I sponsored the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and why it's my top priority as soon as we're back in session. In honor of my dear friend John Lewis, I am working to find common ground. We need to get this done for the American people and to honor the spirit of John Lewis. **[The Senate Democratic majority is razor thin, so we need everyone, including you, on board. Will you add your name right now to show your support for voting rights?](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** Thank you for signing on. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---

Peter ー it’s Andrew.

I wanted to just send you a quick reminder about my campaign and explain to you why it’s so crucial that we outraise our Democratic opponents.

The Democrats want to pass the infamous HR4 -- which denigrates the American voting process -- in the Senate. But to do that, they need to end the filibuster...

And Peter, I have to admit... I’m very concerned about this. My colleagues on the other side of the aisle, and especially Nancy Pelosi, have proven how shameless they can be over this past year.

If the Dems strike down the filibuster...**we could see America radically transformed.**
[**RUSH A DONATION TO SAVE VOTER LAWS**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=2ceea51e536947fd9a01fc7e3eeea6be&_e=hEoGkNRvwW4BnsEdLaYMHEV70k55h2xjY7BJS83MTrRKNcVCXOiYQl86sbHJLj_m_GX7KrQW7GaADhUdbDSIQYVdk_RHhO1RG9goezrMZdn3EQgBRqXePmZE4a71ac_VTucGnz1-DuP2gmis_TOE7En8cE9iBbJchJUaCpdYnDvmhh8h7AX-djTZLP9joKGj7OkaE_AQiRYiEVz1iBYytsIRzm9obxshaRLL8GIFCNYfTw3D1EI0v5L51hd9ka9cXlihVjwPWZmEI-Z8hJQAGPDdS4Paglf5n-4vXpbBTczjtoxuFLpxGwQz_ZTlc9HUtPYkevqEFQxSFa88LxgQEe73_7wEnBhkEpBphLmsx4Te6jFFdBvbspxStVEF4_4gASGMuGKb9axmgyx3zI1i6mtBQHNEzfaPxJ_FXJyB9_Qs2L8fnx7GTOxvdzxfhNJR5qZ50bvicvhM7Rsq_NQMy3hYotXmKhZ9V7wc7RR_ob4MVrvH1mjPYsfJaCTzbdnk)
But that’s not what we want. And it sure isn’t what hard-working Americans need.

Americans are looking for leadership that actually represents their will. So why are Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats governing like this is a socialist country?

**It all comes down to power and control for the leftists.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Beware of the Mockingbird Media
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Stay strong |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c936035f9c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the voice of the grassroots movement sweeping America in every state – Election Integrity.

**From the start, I fought for election integrity paying for critical hearings out of pocket, I have fought to put America’s Audit on the map, and I have fought to keep it safe from personal, political, and legal attacks going all the way up to Merrick Garland and the Department of Justice. And now I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona.**

**_And one by one, they have been defeated and America’s Audit has prevailed, one foot in front of the other._**

And this could not happen without you and me working together. This is why once again I must ask for your help.

**Right now, we are busy fighting the latest challenge, something fairly innocuously called:_NASS Task Force on Vote Verification: Post-election Audit Recommendations._**

Before I dive into this particularly nasty piece of propaganda, I need you to understand something.

We are up against a critical deadline by September first. [While we have raised a tremendous amount of support over the last few days, we are still $8,400 shy of reaching our fundraising goal. We are THIS close.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=843fa2cef0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6551a6eb46&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **We need to raise this money to mobilize support, promote America’s Audit and results while we are being silenced by mainstream media, and to make sure our campaign has the infrastructure to weather the attacks that WILL come from all sides – everyone who opposes the sanctity of American Election Integrity!**

[_And this is why I must again ask for your help. Please make a contribution today to ensure that the Election Integrity movement stays strong!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a5429f9ee1&e=44b8c466b0)

First, let me make clear exactly what the responsibilities of Secretary of State are. Here are a few:
* Act as “Chief Election Officer”
* Certify statewide election results
* Record campaign finances of candidates

You might notice that the position is centered around keeping elections free and fair.

**Well, as future “Chief Election Officer” of Arizona, let me tell you what the Secretary of States are trying to do, in almost unison, to squash election integrity.**

The explicit goal of the NASS Task Force on Vote Verification was to ensure that nothing like “a Maricopa-Style Forensic Audit would ever happen again.”

**Why?**

I will continue to challenge this: Why is a third-party independent audit overseen by the legislative such a bad thing? This is an explicit duty of the legislative.

**Nonetheless, one thing is clear. It is the job of the Secretary of State to protect elections, not prevent them from falling under the scrutiny of the people.**

_This is America. This is a Democracy. This is not the tyranny of a cabal of partisan Secretary of States too scared to have the people take a second look at how shoddily they are running their elections!_

**Preventing Maricopa-style audits does one thing really well: it obscures the fact that there are several really good measures to reduce the need for audits to begin with:**
* **Defect elimination**
* **Multi-factor authentication**
* **Ballot fraud countermeasures.**

Instead, the executive Secretaries of State decided that it was their prerogative to override the duty of the Legislative and the right of the People to oversee the elections.

This joint statement reads:

_The NASS Task Force on Vote Verification encourages states to consider the following recommendations for all types of post-election audits:_

_● States should have a requirement and timeframe, ideally in state statute, for post-election audits in place prior to an election. These defined requirements should include conducting the audit as soon as reasonably possible after an election, as well as a process to recertify election results based on the results of the audit._

_● Ensuring chain of custody procedures throughout the post-election audit process is paramount. Election officials should be able to track the movement and transport of ballots, voting machines, and other election materials through witnesses, signature logs, security seals, video, etc. A break in the chain of custody increases the risk that the integrity or reliability of the asset cannot be restored. The EAC Chain of Custody Best Practices document and CISA Chain of Custody and Critical Infrastructure Systems document should be used as a reference when establishing these procedures._

_● Have state and/or local election officials be an integral part of the post-election audit process, including in the selection of the precincts or equipment to be audited. The involvement of any third-party entities, like a CPA firm, should be determined by the Chief State Election Official or state legislative act prior to an election, and those entities must work closely with election officials._

_● The post-election audit methods and processes must be transparent. This includes identifying who may observe the audit, which should include members of the public, media, political party and/or candidate representatives. Once the results of the post-election audit are completed and certified, they should be made publicly accessible consistent with state law._

_● To avert the possibility of voting systems becoming unusable, states should have criteria in place prior to an election for the use of a federally or a state accredited test lab to perform any audit of voting machine hardware or software._

_● States should make every effort to educate the public on their post-election audit process, as well as other processes and procedures in place to ensure the accuracy and public trust of the results._

**In effect, what these recommendations do is force the People and the Legislative to let the government try and hold itself accountable.**

_This means that in the event of fraud, the expectation of the people should be that the people who are trying to STEAL the election are the same ones who should hold themselves accountable._

**This is ridiculous. This is like the National Association of Bank Robbers coming together to claim that Bank Robbers shouldn’t be arrested, they should hold each other accountable to not rob any more banks.**

This is on its face absurd, and this is why I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona.

**The Secretaries of State agreed on this almost unanimously, which means that almost every Secretary of State in America thinks it is the prerogative of the Secretary of State to take power from the people.**

_I want to represent the people and give power back to the people, which is what I have been fighting for every single day!_

**But nevertheless, we are under attack once again in Maricopa and the Left is trying to squash all possibilities of a nationwide audit in every state.**

[We need to get the word out on the Audit, and fast. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ef3424dfc0&e=44b8c466b0) We need resources to protect our campaign from outside attacks. We need to mobilize volunteers. And this takes your continued support.

[_Please donate GENEROUSLY today to support the Election Integrity movement and fight off this next attack. Help us reach our goal of $8,400 by the end of the month!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=db2f50fd26&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8fe5d88e75&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5987a1a24c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=a416b27b26) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=a416b27b26).
---

name: Team Scheller
subject: end of month deadline: almost here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Team Scheller here. Did you see Lisa’s last email? We’re now only hours away from the calendar flipping and we’re still nowhere near where we needed Peter, Team Scheller here. Did you see Lisa’s last email? We’re now only hours away from the calendar flipping and we’re still nowhere near where we needed to be at the end of August. name: Tamara Bates
subject: 👀 Don't Miss Out

body:
https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/408597/ [https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/408597/]
Peter,
TOMORROW, September 1st at 7 pm CT, is our first Project Build Blue Academy training for candidates, campaign operatives, and anyone who wants to learn about community organizing.
Representatives from the DNC and the ASDC Best Practices Institute will be joining to teach attendees how to improve their ground game by learning about campaign strategy, the basics of voter contact, GOTV, building local party and community infrastructure, how to organize, and more.
RSVP here 👇
https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/408597/ [https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/408597/]
After you sign up, you'll receive Zoom instructions for this virtual event.
We won't turn Tennessee blue if we don't organize like hell, and this event is a great way to get trained up before 2022.
Look forward to seeing you there,
Tamara Bates
Political Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Kimberly Guilfoyle, Eric, me (3)
subject: FW: Critical Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
Our chance to take back the Senate.
| Peter,
---
As the National Chair of Eric Greitens’ MUST-WIN U.S. Senate campaign, I promised Eric there was no way I’d let us fall behind on our fundraising goals.
---
**_But with just hours left until the end-of-month deadline, we’re still $11,539 short._**
---

As you can see **\- time is running out.**

We need your help if we want to save America. I’m coming up short on my End of Month goal, and I need your support.

**My Radical Socialist opponent has already raised over $100,000 in just 24 hours. This puts us in the danger zone if we don’t increase our efforts. **

clean_body: We need to catch up | Friend, As you can see \- time is running out. We need your help if we want to save America. I’m coming up short on my End of Month goal, and I need your support. My Radical Socialist opponent has already raised over $100,000 in just 24 hours. This puts us in the danger zone if we don’t increase our efforts. I can NOT sit back and watch our opponent ruin all of the great things we have created for Iowa and our nation. The time for you to step up has never been more important. Can you step up and make a donation before the month comes to an end? Without your support we risk a Radical-Left takeover! | Thank you, and God bless America, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. | | I know me and my team have sent you a lot of emails this week.

But I just checked in with them and I knew I had to reach out immediately.

_They told me I only need[**1 more gift**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35000483/303722006/1129282168?refcode=20210831_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjRhN2VlNS1hMTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEK9YxoU2fSqP0M9iu5kvUgYUX9P0i3wYED2WOVpi2g=) from 18326 to hit my End-of-Month Goal!_

[**_I’m going to explain why your support is so important but, if you’re in a rush, will you please chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35000484/303722007/1129282168?refcode=20210831_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjRhN2VlNS1hMTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEK9YxoU2fSqP0M9iu5kvUgYUX9P0i3wYED2WOVpi2g=)

Unlike many political candidates, I’ve experienced the struggles that hardworking Americans face everyday.

I grew up in poverty. And I know the feeling of living paycheck to paycheck, without any sort of safety net to rely on.

So when Congressman Don Bacon voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations instead of helping hardworking families, I knew I needed to replace him.

[**But the fact is: running for office is incredibly expensive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35000485/303722008/1129282168?refcode=20210831_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjRhN2VlNS1hMTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEK9YxoU2fSqP0M9iu5kvUgYUX9P0i3wYED2WOVpi2g=)

And I can’t personally fund my own campaign.

[**_I know we need more everyday people representing and fighting for us in Congress -- and I’m running to do just that. But I need to stay on track and reach my End-of-Month Goal before midnight, or I’ll be forced to make serious budget cuts. I can make it if one more supporter from 18326 chips in, so I’m humbly asking:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35000486/303722009/1129282168?refcode=20210831_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjRhN2VlNS1hMTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEK9YxoU2fSqP0M9iu5kvUgYUX9P0i3wYED2WOVpi2g=) [**Can I count on your $10?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35000487/303722010/1129282168?refcode=20210831_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjRhN2VlNS1hMTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEK9YxoU2fSqP0M9iu5kvUgYUX9P0i3wYED2WOVpi2g=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35000488/303722011/1129282168?refcode=20210831_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjRhN2VlNS1hMTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEK9YxoU2fSqP0M9iu5kvUgYUX9P0i3wYED2WOVpi2g=)

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. clean_body: I just checked in with my team... | | | I know me and my team have sent you a lot of emails this week. But I just checked in with them and I knew I had to reach out immediately. They told me I only need= from 18326 to hit my End-of-Month Goal! = Unlike many political candidates, I’ve experienced the struggles that hardworking Americans face everyday. I grew up in poverty. And I know the feeling of living paycheck to paycheck, without any sort of safety net to rely on. So when Congressman Don Bacon voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations instead of helping hardworking families, I knew I needed to replace him. = And I can’t personally fund my own campaign. = = | | = | = | = | = | = | = From the bottom of my heart, thank you -- Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . We don’t want to lose you completely -- but if you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: _** We can't tell you how much we appreciate your grassroots support! Tony Vargas for Congress PO Box 746 Boys Town, NE 68010 United States info@vargasfornebraska.com | | Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress

But our finance team is telling us that we need just 12 more folks to pitch in $25 or over. | In 2021, we have been able to support these great Virginia candidates and we want to give more! We have 6 great candidates with Josh, Kelly, Nadarius, Katie, Jenni, and Ben. But we want to potentially reach out to more candidates for Delegate because we need to keep our majority here in Virginia, but also have members in place who will do the work that will benefit our working families here in Virginia. You can see from our tracker, we have been showing the power of small dollars in supporting our candidates from everyday donors like you. It shows the power of the people when we band together to support Progressives running for office. But we still have work to do. We are so grateful for all of the support we have already gotten and look forward to working with all of you to create a commonwealth where wealth is common. In solidarity, KTBBH PAC | | KTBBH takes its initials from the late great Henry Howell who said he would "Keep the Big Boys Honest." That's what Progressives need to do now in the Commonwealth of Virginia. We rely solely on everyday donors like you to make sure that we support elected officials who only answer to you, the people. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lt.=20General=20Mark=20Berry=20=28Ret.=29?=
subject: Arkansas's Future and Students are at Risk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LESLIE RUTLEDGE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/leslierutledge.com/arfuture?e=624a44d946)

Dear Friends,

Last week was a perfect example of where Attorney General Leslie Rutledge’s priorities are compared to her fellow Republican gubernatorial candidate, Sarah Huckabee Sanders. General Rutledge spent the Monday evening (8/23) answering important policy questions during KATV and Talk Business & Politics live Education Town Hall (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aGPZkz4fBB8) , while at the exact same time Sarah Sanders held one of her high-dollar fundraisers (https://leslierutledge.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/Little-Rock-Sanders-8.23.21-Redacted.png) merely two blocks from the town hall's recording studio. The town hall organizers gave both candidates several options for available dates and over a month’s notice to ensure both parties could participate. However, Sarah still chose to decline (https://katv.com/news/local/ag-rutledge-questions-opponents-absence-discusses-education-policy-and-mask-mandates) . Why? Well, that's a good question and Arkansas voters deserve an answer.
https://youtu.be/wFQFu6DTGIM
KATV/TB&P EDUCATION TOWN HALL HIGHLIGHTS

Education is arguably the single most important policy issue of any state government. In Arkansas, over 70% of the state's general revenue goes toward education funding. While Rutledge laid out her policy vision for Arkansas and took questions from the public and media, Sarah yet again dodged anyone who didn't have a check in their hand. Sarah appears to be more concerned about the wellbeing of her bank account (funded by nearly 90% of out-of-state donors) rather than the next generation of Arkansans.

https://leslierutledge.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/Little-Rock-Sanders-8.23.21-Redacted.png
WHERE WAS SARAH?

Attorney General Rutledge told voters what she would do as the next Governor of Arkansas, and I encourage you to watch the entire town hall (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aGPZkz4fBB8) for yourself. Rutledge told voters how she would continue to fight to keep Critical Race Theory out of our schools, give parents the option of school choice, promoted workforce education programs, and how she will continue to advocate for the 470,000 students in Arkansas. We’ve seen how Sarah runs her campaign as if she were still in Washington, D.C., talking about vague national issues, but Arkansans deserve better.

The campaign for Arkansas’s next Governor should be focused on important issues actually facing our State, and we deserve to hear where both Republican candidates stand on the issues. Millions of out-of-state dollars continue to pour in to influence this election, and I think it is time we send a strong message that our kids and our future are not for sale.

Sincerely,
Lt. Gen. (AR) Mark Berry (Ret.)
AR State Representative (R-Ozark)
Campaign Chairman, Rutledge for Governor

DISCLAIMER: Mark H. Berry is a retired member of the U.S. Armed Forces. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the United States Air Force or the Department of Defense.

============================================================
PAID FOR BY LESLIE RUTLEDGE FOR GOVERNOR
________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

P.O. BOX 144
LITTLE ROCK, AR 72203

name: Team Rob Ortt
subject: RELEASE: Rob Ortt Announces Endorsement for Lee Zeldin for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
To save our state, we need new leadership in Albany. That is why I am proud to endorse Lee Zeldin to be New York’s next Governor.
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
| |
---
| CONTACT: Katy Delgado 914-960-6050 katy@delgado.com Katie Vincentz (917) 382-1219 katie@zeldinfornewyork.com
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Tuesday, August 31, 2021

---
| |
---
| NYS Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Announces Endorsement for Lee Zeldin for Governor
---
| Cicero, NY- Today, New York Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt stood alongside Congressman Lee Zeldin at the annual Onondaga Republican County Clambake to announce his endorsement as candidate for New York State Governor 2022.
Senator Rob Ortt announced, "To save our state, we need new leadership in Albany. That is why I am proud to endorse Lee Zeldin to be New York's next Governor. Like me, Lee volunteered to serve his country by joining the US Army. He has a proven record fighting for New Yorkers and our country. Now more than ever, New York needs a battle-tested leader like Lee Zeldin who will fight to lower taxes, restore public safety, and meet the everyday challenges facing families and communities across New York."
"Leader Ortt knows so well why one-party rule must end in Albany. He fights day in and day out to exceptionally represent hard working everyday New Yorkers in a city that is leaving so many people behind. Leader Ortt knows we must end the attacks on our freedoms, wallets and safety, and Save Our State. That's why he's all in on Team Zeldin. Together with Leader Ortt, I look forward to restoring a desperately needed balance of power to Albany in 2022," stated Congressman Lee Zeldin candidate for Governor.
At the annual Onondaga County Clambake Leader Rob Ortt and Congressman Lee Zeldin gathered with supporters to discuss taking back the Executive Chamber.
"While Andrew Cuomo has finally resigned in disgrace, the corrupt culture he fostered is alive and well in our State Capitol. To turn New York around, we need a Governor who will reject Albany's pro-criminal policies, fight for families and jobs, and make our state more affordable. I look forward to working with our next Governor Lee Zeldin to save our state," closed Rob Ortt.
Congressman Lee Zeldin currently represents New York's 1st Congressional District. Congressman Zeldin served active duty in the US Army from 2003-07, during which time he deployed to Iraq with an infantry battalion of fellow paratroopers in support of Operation Iraqi Freedom, and followed by continued service in the Army Reserve. He previously served as State Senator for New York's 3rd District from 2011-14.
Senator Rob Ortt is currently the Senate Republican Leader. Leader Ortt enlisted in N.Y. Army National Guard in October 2001 in direct response to the attacks of September 11, 2001. He is a veteran of Operation Enduring Freedom in Afghanistan. His mission was to serve as a combat mentor and advisor to the Afghan National Police in Kandahar City.

clean_body: To save our state, we need new leadership in Albany. That is why I am proud to endorse Lee Zeldin to be New York’s next Governor. | | | | | | | | | | CONTACT: Katy Delgado 914-960-6050 katy@delgado.com Katie Vincentz (917) 382-1219 katie@zeldinfornewyork.com FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Tuesday, August 31, 2021 | | | NYS Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Announces Endorsement for Lee Zeldin for Governor | Cicero, NY- Today, New York Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt stood alongside Congressman Lee Zeldin at the annual Onondaga Republican County Clambake to announce his endorsement as candidate for New York State Governor 2022. Senator Rob Ortt announced, "To save our state, we need new leadership in Albany. That is why I am proud to endorse Lee Zeldin to be New York's next Governor. Like me, Lee volunteered to serve his country by joining the US Army. He has a proven record fighting for New Yorkers and our country. Now more than ever, New York needs a battle-tested leader like Lee Zeldin who will fight to lower taxes, restore public safety, and meet the everyday challenges facing families and communities across New York." "Leader Ortt knows so well why one-party rule must end in Albany. He fights day in and day out to exceptionally represent hard working everyday New Yorkers in a city that is leaving so many people behind. Leader Ortt knows we must end the attacks on our freedoms, wallets and safety, and Save Our State. That's why he's all in on Team Zeldin. Together with Leader Ortt, I look forward to restoring a desperately needed balance of power to Albany in 2022," stated Congressman Lee Zeldin candidate for Governor. At the annual Onondaga County Clambake Leader Rob Ortt and Congressman Lee Zeldin gathered with supporters to discuss taking back the Executive Chamber. "While Andrew Cuomo has finally resigned in disgrace, the corrupt culture he fostered is alive and well in our State Capitol. To turn New York around, we need a Governor who will reject Albany's pro-criminal policies, fight for families and jobs, and make our state more affordable. I look forward to working with our next Governor Lee Zeldin to save our state," closed Rob Ortt. Congressman Lee Zeldin currently represents New York's 1st Congressional District. Congressman Zeldin served active duty in the US Army from 2003-07, during which time he deployed to Iraq with an infantry battalion of fellow paratroopers in support of Operation Iraqi Freedom, and followed by continued service in the Army Reserve. He previously served as State Senator for New York's 3rd District from 2011-14. Senator Rob Ortt is currently the Senate Republican Leader. Leader Ortt enlisted in N.Y. Army National Guard in October 2001 in direct response to the attacks of September 11, 2001. He is a veteran of Operation Enduring Freedom in Afghanistan. His mission was to serve as a combat mentor and advisor to the Afghan National Police in Kandahar City. | | | == | | | | SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT == | == == | | | | PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:info@robortt.com powered by

body:
#
Peter, our fundraising has picked up since we announced our push to raise $50,000 before the end of the month — but we’re still a little short of where we need to be by midnight tonight.
**If just 1 out of every 12 people reading this email chipped in, we would hit our fundraising goal in no time. Can you use this personalized link to donate $3 or whatever you can afford right now, so Pramila knows it was you who chipped in to get us to our goal? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pramila-aug-deadline?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20210831-1](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5539?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20210831-1&amount=3&t=20&akid=591%2E420207%2EhbCyRq)**
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5539?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20210831-1&amount=3&t=21&akid=591%2E420207%2EhbCyRq)**
Pramila is working _overtime_ to transform this country and address the nation’s many intersecting crises. She’s fighting for a jobs and families package that makes transformative investments in working people and our communities — by expanding Medicare, guaranteeing paid leave for working people, making investments in education and child care, fighting destructive climate change, and so much more.
And she’s not giving up on her push for the Senate to end the Jim Crow filibuster so that we can fully fight voter suppression, protect the right to vote, and preserve our democracy — among so many other priorities in our progressive agenda.
**But our movement must come together**** _now_****to fuel our fights in the weeks and months ahead.****Help us hit our $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal with a contribution of any amount by using your personalized link before midnight:****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pramila-aug-deadline?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20210831-1](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5539?refcode=emdpwillis67@gmail.com-em20210831-1&amount=3&t=22&akid=591%2E420207%2EhbCyRq)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
Please consider contributing even $5 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can stay on track and end the Democrats’ control of Washington.
| | Hey Peter,

Right now, Democrats are attempting to force through the most radical and progressive agenda our country has ever seen. Make no mistake - their vision would fundamentally change America forever.

We need your help to stop the Left, so I’ll get straight to the point. Senator Mike Lee (R-UT) and I have a major end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we need your help to ensure we have the resources needed to take back the Senate.

[**Your support is critical. We’re counting on you to chip in $5, $10 or $25 BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can pick up the pace and win back our Senate majority.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b23d1c95b57f4d32a686cb24e214d92e&_e=uKTap9EMYfGx_K__ce0zh86xK3k2QQ-tKpkVPFgmr5sdr2dghIpSVVhxAhlaDmzX9yN2gHwOdwgpYAx0qnCFf8FD9W37rVhqL9vAqog1FFMNlWq2WtbskgGD9vcwT_eQbZ86YOVa9ijBffpXaNFd2UHQeLfbMo19G9vJSAPNMj1QKjNJXi0GLaR_DZ1itP8avXDNtLX8jvINHGc2Xva6dWYHZsOnvdHy1o6BVoXNm2a2-CBK95tj-yi3A3UAg0-uWjlZTH0TvjEqYbkM8HwJBTdjjtScp8_QPvJ3L6uV1MjB3oxde_pn2cOd9rwO2PMQHiP0LAHiFNW_3uHepl3-dowI8BvMDvRNEeVN0QCu9u_mpeOgDdsw5-WB5Ja7rirn)

[** WIN BACK THE MAJORITY » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b23d1c95b57f4d32a686cb24e214d92e&_e=uKTap9EMYfGx_K__ce0zh86xK3k2QQ-tKpkVPFgmr5sdr2dghIpSVVhxAhlaDmzX9yN2gHwOdwgpYAx0qnCFf8FD9W37rVhqL9vAqog1FFMNlWq2WtbskgGD9vcwT_eQbZ86YOVa9ijBffpXaNFd2UHQeLfbMo19G9vJSAPNMj0onpf-FH2H7j8poLN6juBA8k77KE2VIYkfB62UOLDJ1drhIi1l0dogH1lbKERHdvmacUToZ_lZ9M1W7zp6yKAXFW5i04HDicpZiPlTzNsQNlrleOO4Od7etd9LecxKX_n8UFdSgldarWo08VGu6KgQnTbqc1r1FpfVb0II64KBHsV7GvNo8qrryH6Db1grjnR3y_HAXMAxnF-Aw6_C0Ub2)

Your donation will directly impact whether Senator Lee wins re-election and whether we can reclaim the Senate GOP majority.

[**Peter, please consider contributing even $5 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can stay on track and end the Democrats’ control of Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b23d1c95b57f4d32a686cb24e214d92e&_e=uKTap9EMYfGx_K__ce0zh86xK3k2QQ-tKpkVPFgmr5sdr2dghIpSVVhxAhlaDmzX9yN2gHwOdwgpYAx0qnCFf8FD9W37rVhqL9vAqog1FFMNlWq2WtbskgGD9vcwT_eQbZ86YOVa9ijBffpXaNFd2UHQeLfbMo19G9vJSAPNMj2ebWjGvpbMuzkvDW-N1w-Lav0NIEakLbLEZeRQmeZim4yHqchjtpVI8KKrj7FdJrFGt9RZ2hv1_vPrBEv7IYX7V_Fu3BSu6n60y9K82RDRQE6hSJCEr_2ncbx0aUIVma5T1sNUGRVsjnrSYVKl3RpsQvheYN-3ccAEysDpZvyFhffsYIW70K6U-p5CGTOCEpz9ccuHTBypjRbtIsZ0DALI)

Lindsey Graham

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Important Deadline: Six Hours to Go
body:
Help us reach a critical goal....
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TZfABBgNHkx1WGQzu1ccJIvagoCbZJR7QWedCpMxg6uLfVYaSlmCA1te-s7c16p6BjHCAZil44nKLJu0uBCrJkp2XGfZ0j01K-BqwYAzQbzrPJmMLDJzbc9v2K6vhqXiMwSxfhDtrv4A2gc7ql94tRNbx3fObkhl&c=-XVHPbSxzCYKVCz0Y7aSjzDHxuLap2_7KwK-9bWCNvel1eKDLImn4w==&ch=4xoqrwAHKEd9CRsgKELrHbWC00CHBy6evtRdRxi_aQDBCUOnktyk7w==)
---
| Dear Friend:
As you know, I'm in this race to win. Soon after securing the endorsement of Senator Rand Paul in June, I decided that I would make a major investment in my own campaign. I put up millions of my own money to secure television time between now and the primary election next May.
Why?
First, because I believe our nation is in peril, and this race is too important to be left up to career politicians, party insiders, and political opportunists who stick their finger in the wind to figure out what to say next.
Second, I believe that Washington is broken and corrupt. Frankly, it's important that our next Senator is able to go to Washington without owing favors to lobbyists and special interests. That's why I stepped up to help fund my own campaign. I want to be able to speak my mind, tell it like it is, and be blunt when I get to Washington.
But I still need your help.
We're still working hard to raise money. We've set lofty goals for each month, and with just six hours to go before midnight tonight, we're just a few thousand dollars short for our August number.
Will you be willing to help me hit our goal by making a contribution to my campaign today... before midnight tonight?
If you share my concern for this country, all you have to do is click on the button below.
I truly appreciate your support and your help. Thanks in advance.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TZfABBgNHkx1WGQzu1ccJIvagoCbZJR7QWedCpMxg6uLfVYaSlmCA4b4iAcG-6KK2IJxP45gfucfFceYZfF6QU_PeH6UX5WTnqpXU-XewGMTuFNOJRdlYnN_gwAtsaFENfcSrziFG4NZO3mv6S43w1jKP74vDM4RB94IqF-n_GEopz5D5gESxA==&c=-XVHPbSxzCYKVCz0Y7aSjzDHxuLap2_7KwK-9bWCNvel1eKDLImn4w==&ch=4xoqrwAHKEd9CRsgKELrHbWC00CHBy6evtRdRxi_aQDBCUOnktyk7w==)
---
| In Liberty,
---

name: Hala Ayala
subject: It’s essential that we keep in contact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35002221/303728429/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWQ0ZjRjYi1hNjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7wYJ-JxcLSbq5wzF0hWwgSljosAGVp4UwGSjj1j2Y08=)
---
Peter, I know you’ve received a lot of emails from my team this month.

But with Election Day around the corner, it’s essential that we keep in contact with our incredible supporters like you.
