Peter, you probably heard in the news by now, but vaccine passports are now being implemented throughout New York City! Here's a headline from the Daily Caller about the situation:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58228521:Jv014s2N2:m:1:3253819041:F32DC1B4F49BDAB67CD220A5E99C76B4:r)
Politicians and bureaucrats say these vaccine passports are only for COVID, but we know it won't stop there...considering we're on day 500 something of _' 14 days to slow the spread'_.

Americans are living in a world where politicians and bureaucrats are quite literally trying to CONTROL:

-> _Where you can eat_
-> _Where you can shop_
-> _Where you can travel_
-> _What you can attend_
**-> **_Who you can associate with_

_**That is tyranny through anti-science mandates. **_

The time to fight back is now. Unless you want this tyranny coming to a town near you, I'm going to need your support in getting this message out to as many Americans as possible. That means reaching our fundraising goal.

I'm asking every supporter to chip in just $25 NOW to help fight back against this tyranny─[**can I count on your support?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58228521:Jv014s2N2:m:1:3253819041:F32DC1B4F49BDAB67CD220A5E99C76B4:r)

I cannot thank you all enough for the generosity and support, for the thousands of people who are supporting my re-election campaign. We’ve achieved big things together by protecting the Affordable Care Act, passing commonsense gun safety measures, and taking on big companies who rip off Virginia consumers, and I know we can accomplish a lot more if I continue to serve as Virginia’s Attorney General.
This public fundraising goal is really important because it will show just how many people are supporting my campaign with two months to go until the election. But the deadline is coming up quick, so every single contribution is going to count.
[**Please chip in right now to strengthen my fundraising report before it goes public!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35002958/303730586/-668906574?refcode=E11063-20210831-EOM8-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTQzNWJlOC1hNzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZW3_UOxFux6uq19IfIYfuXzGdJNbpMcdbUw2Jt-yq8=)
Thankful for your support,
Mark Herring

name: Team Padilla
subject: Please give us a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Each and every contribution makes a big difference in our ability to organize and hold this seat for Democrats.
#

$5 before midnight.
That’s what we’re asking of you ahead of our August end-of-month fundraising deadline. Please, give us a chance to explain why your $5 contribution makes such a big difference, especially today.
The truth is that $5 might not seem like much compared to the millions of dollars that right-wing Republicans have to throw around, but those $5 donations start to add up pretty quickly. Because just before you make a contribution, someone else chipped in $5. And by the time you’re finished donating, someone else has added their $5. It all adds up.
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for Senate before our end-of-month deadline hits in just a few hours? Each and every contribution makes a big difference in our ability to organize and keep this seat for Democrats.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?refcode=em210831-1-30&t=1&refcode2=268_159979_HkX4bl&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210831-1-30&t=20&refcode2=268_159979_HkX4bl&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210831-1-30&t=21&refcode2=268_159979_HkX4bl&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210831-1-30&t=22&refcode2=268_159979_HkX4bl&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210831-1-30&t=23&refcode2=268_159979_HkX4bl&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210831-1-30&t=24&refcode2=268_159979_HkX4bl&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210831-1-30&t=25&refcode2=268_159979_HkX4bl&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)**
---
****
We cannot afford to fall short right now. We need to hold this Senate seat in California and expand our majority so it becomes impossible for McConnell and his allies to block us from the minority.
The fact is that the vast majority of the money we raise to fuel this grassroots campaign comes from lots and lots of folks like you making small-dollar contributions when they can.
We’re all incredibly proud of that fact, and you should be as well. But it means that from time to time we have to ask directly:
[**Can you make a $5 contribution to our campaign before tonight’s midnight deadline hits in just a few hours? We’ve got a lot of work to do to keep Alex in the Senate, and we can’t do it without you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?refcode=em210831-1-30&t=26&refcode2=268_159979_HkX4bl&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)
Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us stay on track this month. Your support will help us fight back against whatever Republicans throw at us and continue to run a campaign that is focused on improving people’s lives.
— Team Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?refcode=em210831-1-30&t=27&refcode2=268_159979_HkX4bl&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=268%2E159979%2EHkX4bl)

[Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=75b4223276914c1282ac059d872f3146&_t=bq4dm1a2hiamYSo262vhVHITtizUc8mRe_zicQOH8_1fgP18q7xwcgvy_oaCFCWNWfHL9L7tT2CexQ8gLLH5TrjsKKqdmWYDSM_ooKlwGtQ9hqKX7jRgnONqFCSDi8ENemDXhH-X-w6081Pc9D1HVoeBfDCjE6yaWyhLQlcB-8s%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=75b4223276914c1282ac059d872f3146&_e=EQCe0h7UCib2dbEu7oV5aG-j5qka5IuuTvu6-zk4XBXB_guN6f0q0gc8iaO3KMO1AvKONqZ6v7pbV2hskxc_4AD0MPNSFjDKJK6RKg3DfPCngx6x47-aYOMhTRA0SZ8oLLIZqQLXF5XPWA4DXUDFlws9BcrQb-zeLig8J7-Q6jIYzfoVBftAoZScVRrdAe9-Ud6thJkMH7rFsLOQuKUR5nxxhVqNjrjJFpCpzDJjiUOUueyqpnVAgWv41VDpPExM840Ubo6vuhcPbfrXj3nZBHlsDiEuVIAJ3u28XQwuhCHrrjN4NUEhbit8r1MZiXwHVk6Vv-g9WJ1us_Ob78mZoRBmSPPSzx3DNoe6FVOIdt7EQFZ2KdlXyfZJgSTnvomiUcC5DhzuRjC6jQR9RNhnRlNP_Db_u7lipn3vocGe7tnN2gvW8Qp0pJi2KBHexhN4LjrLpPi5TZide-YtWOGgM78SWXCaRzVzAAulDoYz0Dc%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

$5.

A lot of money for some. Spare change for others. As a candidate for Congress, $5 here and there ads up.

**[I’m relying on $5 donations to help build out the campaign “war chest” that I’m going to need in order to run a competitive race against one of the most vulnerable Democrat incumbents in Congress – Abigail Spanberger](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=75b4223276914c1282ac059d872f3146&_e=EQCe0h7UCib2dbEu7oV5aG-j5qka5IuuTvu6-zk4XBXB_guN6f0q0gc8iaO3KMO1AvKONqZ6v7pbV2hskxc_4AD0MPNSFjDKJK6RKg3DfPCngx6x47-aYOMhTRA0SZ8oLLIZqQLXF5XPWA4DXUDFlws9BcrQb-zeLig8J7-Q6jIYzfoVBftAoZScVRrdAe9-Ud6thJkMH7rFsLOQuKUR5nxxhVqNjrjJFpCpzDJjiUOUueyqpnVAgWv41VDpPExM3eUya-u99PD-8PDNtuYfOJkNpASjkANbByd6s3HAFPpewkjtqvy-85i9783TaJZkBTIDd7IqVY07uaLJtoRclMt-nX4i0LMPPi0Ziia8bwgYvtehM7HjPqQMHhJohjv1wVaXbX9lJrk63_6HoBht9clrgGtnLUfXEOkGo3YIO_QWoFpblhHZ7vJtSVtEov4njhIlGOb-cABfPqeziR1fX3YoG5oKONYOyaKrSPVNe4I%3D)**.

I know that I’ve been writing for months that this will be one of the most expensive and close races of 2022, but if _**you**_ weren’t yet convinced,**take a look at screenshot below from the email her campaign sent out yesterday**.
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=75b4223276914c1282ac059d872f3146&_e=EQCe0h7UCib2dbEu7oV5aG-j5qka5IuuTvu6-zk4XBXB_guN6f0q0gc8iaO3KMO1AvKONqZ6v7pbV2hskxc_4AD0MPNSFjDKJK6RKg3DfPCngx6x47-aYOMhTRA0SZ8oLLIZqQLXF5XPWA4DXUDFlws9BcrQb-zeLig8J7-Q6jIYzfoVBftAoZScVRrdAe9-Ud6thJkMH7rFsLOQuKUR5nxxhVqNjrjJFpCpzDJjiUPf8L-maA2Ot2rxU8ybbVRzSVfOHP6-Gn50s4riGKF9m8todZCcPIJbRmomgJCKhrY_CwB-uNDup-qWFj5zG80kS2mklBUKwTpOJRgMa6HYqwVfatCcxoJGu2pCtQhnH7loNTTbjtZ0ge5Q8rV88SosWpmJzX-TNmKqihWuM5IB37mWI4cVDxPfNMC8joRE65rLlvGlhyBhmK_GsGSZc9ka78UxvlqacJJSxHB54btt8g%3D%3D)

Even her own campaign recognizes that this is going to be close. **[That’s why I’m hoping you’ll do me a huge favor and help me hit that $5,000 goal I emailed you about last week before our time runs out at midnight tonight](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=75b4223276914c1282ac059d872f3146&_e=EQCe0h7UCib2dbEu7oV5aG-j5qka5IuuTvu6-zk4XBXB_guN6f0q0gc8iaO3KMO1AvKONqZ6v7pbV2hskxc_4AD0MPNSFjDKJK6RKg3DfPCngx6x47-aYOMhTRA0SZ8oLLIZqQLXF5XPWA4DXUDFlws9BcrQb-zeLig8J7-Q6jIYzfoVBftAoZScVRrdAe9-Ud6thJkMH7rFsLOQuKUR5nxxhVqNjrjJFpCpzDJjiUPf8L-maA2Ot2rxU8ybbVRzsaH9sk5T-8LLbCtVvvWEGUigKcAtdvrI4rC8skgSMfNfmgcPKd5nHS8mMYSUXVDoV0RV3J-rtAYu3q6lTxmhS-SYdjq-bXeYpSbdn8y_3Kr8vUVkhVUK4dmRGIb8g65Bi8aUtiaA3U6LMfuco1zgSZcESB8q-5KFciji2mxewwv0wvRet1syF1H83DbGdhPWB6VotKppQubmYms-hT1CyQ%3D%3D)**.

body:
I have always been able to count on this extraordinary grassroots team.
#
Peter,
I have always been able to count on this extraordinary grassroots team.
Not only did you help keep Illinois blue in 2020 -- you helped us flip the Senate.
Now, I’m coming to you again because all of our progress is at risk.
Mitch McConnell is already targeting vulnerable Democrats and planning a Senate takeover.

Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, OR let the government enforce mandates? . Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=973a7b574e2b46b3b001ae994749c8ca&_t=zCMscb2cIk16zEySo_MF2aQkSH4LoBl920MvCnRS8K7gbwXVZOBR6RLPCmnK1vsIPDO70g2dqgCuLkrKukwB1djKCgwje9fh2hmi3w8CTIeBh6Co1qz463MYmYEUEkTQTEVd61Umq_zdl2P2o29eCF_RxUeu-HhtcHMrESTAoSg%3D)

---

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow American, The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role. We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. name: David Bowes, Never Again PAC
subject: personally asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
I'm personally reaching out because we only have a few hours left before our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline, and right now, we're still short of our goal. We can't let that happen and here's why: Team,

I'm personally reaching out because we only have a few hours left before our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline, and right now, we're still short of our goal. We can't let that happen and here's why:

The 2022 elections will be crucial in our fight to defend our democracy. We need to defeat the dangerous Republicans in Congress who voted to overturn the results of a free and fair election, and replace them with leaders who will be faithful stewards of our most cherished democratic principles.

We have plans to defeat these Republicans by running ads in their district, making calls, writing letters, and more. We're going to make sure these elected officials' constituents know their representative is a danger to our democracy, but it won't be easy -- or cheap.

That's why it's so important we don't fall behind on our fundraising. Hitting tonight's end-of-month goal will help ensure we have the resources to put our plans into action so we can start putting the pressure on now.

Will you help us reach our goal before our midnight deadline? Chip in $10 or more to help us defeat the most dangerous and radical Republicans in Congress >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/neveragain-aug21-eom](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35003907/303734517/-1928601189?gpsid=8_139_20294&refcode=em21_210831_eom4_fnd_gq_act__db_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210831_eom4_fnd_gq_act__db_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyNDIxOGY4LWFhMGEtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UeAxuVQgm680j0JEAW04cKSKd_7dJKN3Na54NoTsaR4=)**

Thank you,

David

Friend, here’s the video Youtube BANNED and has the mainstream media in a frenzyー[**watch the video >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65357%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GzsE7eMK8tNyz7U3jvt90A&sysid=1)

[**WATCH THE VIDEO YOUTUBE BANNED**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65359%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IfEm3%2f9m96Y%2fs7JxGHARKQ&sysid=1)
**Here’s the message that Big Tech, Youtube, and the Media were so desperate to censor:**
**→ They can’t arrest all of us or keep us locked down indefinitely. **
**→ They can’t force masks onto our children or follow their anti-science mandates. **
**→ They can’t require us to carry a vaccine passport or comply with their mandates. **
_Why?_

We can say NOーbecause Americans are a free people.

This nation _by the people_ , _for the people_ , and _of the people_ was created to protect freedom and liberty in moments just like this,****_**when politicians and bureaucrats use fear and lies to usher in tyranny on the American people. **_

I’m not going to let their fear tactics win, I'll continue being the champion for liberty and freedom, but it’s not a fight I or anyone can do alone. That’s why I’m setting a BIG goal of raising $25,000 before 11:59 PM on August 31st to continue funding the fight for liberty. [**Will you help me reach it by chipping in now?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65350%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tpq914PRnqV20cbva84BVQ&sysid=1)
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**

**$25,000 BY 11:59 PM ON AUGUST 31ST**

[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65354%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iJ6bKkqall2T6KjQ8YOHVw&sysid=1)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
I’ve stood consistently for freedom regardless of which party had power. And I’m not going to stop now. **But this isn’t a fight any American can win alone. **

That’s why I need you on my side.

**Please, chip in what you can before our end of month deadline at this link:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2797431/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65365%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bymIoTyNHQokn4cU7Ha4GA&sysid=1)**

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
My team just told me we’re still a few donations short
#

Team —
I wanted to reach out one last time before the end of the month. My team just told me we’re still a few donations short of meeting our fundraising goal.
I would be so grateful if you could make a contribution — of any amount — before midnight tonight. Here’s a link you can use:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_em_q32021/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35004630/303736342/-353695395?refcode2=341300bb-ac0a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210831-2-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDEzMDBiYi1hYzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j0Wdw8nDcJaGTbZqhl0V1tj0UI8_t_b6VkkS2kCFWLQ=)
Thank you again for your ongoing support. I’m running for Senate because I’m fed up with politicians selling out poor and working-class families across this country just for a check.

Onward,
Malcolm

body:
The moment is upon us to flip NC blue and elect a bold progressive in 2022.
#
Everything could change
With Richard Burr retiring
We deserve a senator who
Is honest and inspiring.
The moment is upon us
[**To flip North Carolina blue,**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13097?refcode=em20210831-400&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=400%2E3698%2EXefqf6)
And elect a bold progressive
In November 2022.
Erica Smith has what it takes
To build a coalition.
A more inclusive Tar Heel State
Has always been her mission.
The only problem, friends?
[**Fundraising is behind.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13097?refcode=em20210831-400&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=400%2E3698%2EXefqf6)
To catch up before midnight
Would bring some peace of mind.
And so the AmERICA Fund began!
In people lies the power.
**We must raise $10,000**
**In less than 24 hours.**
Please help us reach our goal
Let's leave the nay-sayers stunned —
[**_Will you rush $5 directly to_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13097?refcode=em20210831-400&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=400%2E3698%2EXefqf6)

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Almost there...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BwQhRp&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EBohhJM&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/373f3086-3d2b-4d5c-81c6-fe2e9dafe423.png]

You never let me down--not even once...

...and I just wanted to stop and say thank you.Thank you for standing up against the left and the RINOs who partner with them to destroy our nation. Thank you for joining me in the streets to protest against the radical policies in Olympia and Washington DC. Thank you for standing tall to be seen and making your voice heard.

And your voices ARE being heard. CLEARLY.

Our opponents in this race are freaking out over how much support we have on the ground. One of them even tried to come over to my booth and crash my event--and it backfired on him. This month our campaign worked on three major events across the 4th Congressional District over 10 days and we heard from HUNDREDSof voters who supported us in the past and support us now as we move forward to take out the RINO Dan Newhouse.

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/b7a04470-f6f7-4793-aa3c-1dfe9b6f4210.jpg]
Today is the last day of August reporting and we need to keep up the momentum as we head into the final month of the reporting quarter. One of my opponents gave himself $251,000 because he doesn't have any support from voters.Another opponent has been crisscrossing the country pulling in money from special interests, donors with deep pockets, and corporations that own his seat in Congress.

We are on track to have a strong 3rd quarter, but I need to close out August strong to put us in a good position heading into September. We are about $5,200 short of our target--which is easily doable with your help.If two donors gave the max contribution of $2,900 we'd be there. Or 10 folks contributing $500. I understand not everyone has that type of money to contribute and I am honored by ANY contribution you can make.

Together we can reach our goal if everyone does their part according to their resources. I appreciate you all more than you know.

OUR DEADLINE IS TONIGHT AT 11:59 PM PST!!!

Can I count on you? [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKBOsU&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhQZS9z&]

Loren

PS: Don't be surprised if I give you a phone call and thank you personally for your contribution!

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKBObJ&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EQtAyTE&]

THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKBO37&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EtMSylp&]

I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKBO7Z&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EwFeBUA&]

I WANT TO BE ON CULP'S ADVISORY TEAM AND DO $2,900! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SKBOqz&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ESFLy2M&]

PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS

, 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States

You may unsubscribe [https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=BwQhRp&mc=Jj&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EGIZVSH&pt=unsubscribe] or change your contact details [https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=BwQhRp&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EQJstZn&pt=change_details] at any time.

We are about $5,200 short of our target--which is easily doable with your help.If two donors gave the max contribution of $2,900 we'd be there. Or 10 folks contributing $500. I understand not everyone has that type of money to contribute and I am honored by ANY contribution you can make. Together we can reach our goal if everyone does their part according to their resources. I appreciate you all more than you know. OUR DEADLINE IS TONIGHT AT 11:59 PM PST!!! Can I count on you? [&] Loren PS: Don't be surprised if I give you a phone call and thank you personally for your contribution! I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [&] THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [&] I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [&] I WANT TO BE ON CULP'S ADVISORY TEAM AND DO $2,900! [&] PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS , 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States You may unsubscribe [] or change your contact details [] at any time. name: Karen Bass
subject: While they spread misinformation...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team,

While extremists push for a sham recall election in California, extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Josh Hawley are spreading misinformation about COVID-19, the 2020 election, and President Joe Biden. It's clear that we are still living in Trump's America, and that's why I'm reaching out today.

I don't want to take up too much of your time, but this is important. My team let me know this morning that we just need 56 more people to step up and donate to hit our August goal. This is a huge victory, but we can't take our foot off the pedal just yet.

Our democracy is at a crossroads, and we need to hit every single goal we set. Will you be one of the 56 people we need to chip in right now to hit our goal? Use this personal link to donate before tonight's end-of-month deadline » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-eom-aug21&refcode1=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/9ocxsaYazwqeB3ZJKjApzQBB_ZE3zJO7F0T-ObdK15k=/JXZyHIWIMTtFLu4nQeqhr3jIeP6hqy_OoZfih44BKMQ=?gpsid=39_132_20274&refcode=em21_210831_eom1_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210831_eom1_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

KB

clean_body: Warren, Bernie, Kamala and even Biden have all thrown their hats into the ring for Newsom because they know he’s in big trouble. | Friend, Gavin Newsom just launched a new anti-recall add featuring Bernie Sanders , which has him pedaling radical policies and attacking the voters who are fed-up with Newsom’s oppressive and destructive reign over California. This is the second time Newsom has gotten a radical leftist socialist U.S. Senator from the East Coast to appear in an ad for him – Elizabeth Warren being the first. This ad is now running all over California to motivate the Left to vote against the recall, and it’s working. Warren, Bernie, Kamala and even Biden have all thrown their hats into the ring for Newsom because they know he’s in big trouble. Polls still show this recall as neck and neck, but the Democrats’ ad blitz has them up in early mail-in ballot returns. We must ramp up our voter turnout efforts and ensure recall supporters turn in their mail-in ballots or vote on election day. With leftist elites flooding in from all over the country to save Newsom, we desperately need your help top stop them. We only have TWO WEEKS left to make this happen, so can we count on you in crunch time? Thank you, Lou Barnett Campaign Manager Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee | PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM Committee major funding from: Geoff Palmer Saul Fox Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Nikki Fried
subject: Personal Note
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I know it’s getting late, but I wanted to update you on our August fundraising goal. Thanks to supporters like you, we’re only $3,321 short.

If 323 people chip in $10 before midnight, we’ll reach our end-of-month fundraising goal. If you’re able to contribute, please click here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=tuenikk]

I’ll be honest with you, friends: things in Florida are tough right now. While traveling the country to raise money for his Presidential run, Ron DeSantis is trying to defund school districts that require masks.

This isn’t about Democrats and Republicans anymore. It’s about keeping our children safe and saving lives. Ron DeSantis’ attempt to score political points off of COVID-19 isn’t just bad--it’s unconscionable.

He’ll play politics with every issue, from climate change to voting rights to a global pandemic. That’s why it’s so important to stop him next year.

I know we send a lot of emails, and I’m sorry to bother you again. But DeSantis is the most dangerous governor in the country, and we need to do everything we can to win this race.

Team, if you can step up before the end of August, it would mean the world to me and make a real difference. Please click here to chip in now to stop DeSantis and help us win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=tuenikk]

With Gratitude,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor

6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Alex Lasry
subject: midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin
body:
For too long, we’ve been represented by a Senator who refuses to do anything to help everyday Wisconsinites.

Peter,

You’re getting a ton of emails from every campaign asking to make one last donation before the monthly deadline tonight, **so thank you for opening my last request.**

In my campaign, I am fighting for the people of Wisconsin -- not the special interests. This isn’t politics as usual, my campaign is about bringing fresh ideas to Congress so that we can help Wisconsinites.

For too long, we’ve been represented by a Senator by the name of Ron Johnson who refuses to do anything to help everyday Wisconsinites. **His inaction and obsession with blocking any progress from happening in this country have hurt Wisconsin workers, and it’s time to stand up and fight back.**

We have the power to defeat Ron Johnson, and I’m running a competitive campaign that can and will win next November. But I need your help today before midnight tonight to help close the $2,994 gap in our monthly fundraising budget.

**I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t crucial to our campaign’s success, so can I count on you to chip in before midnight tonight? You can use this link to give $5 or more:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lasry_aug2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35006024/303741497/-838859516?refcode=EM_FR_210831FRPM_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWM1Mjg0Ni1iMTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YM6UTSKAVJm2EuLswxFneJYLshQ7pMVObOk0PchWvqE=)**

Thank you,

Alex

Milwaukee, WI 53203

In my campaign, I am fighting for the people of Wisconsin -- not the special interests. I know on the last day of the month, your inbox is effectively flooded with messages from Democratic campaigns asking for your support. But my team told me we’re still $3,350 short of our end-of-month goal -- and we have mere hours to make up the difference. So I had no choice but to reach out. Running against a far-right MAGA darling like Madison Cawthorn takes hard work and serious money, that’s why we can’t afford to fall short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Eric | | Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793 www.ericgash.com Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. He is running for Congress against MAGA Republican Rep. Madison Cawthorn. Cawthorn is an utter failure for the working families he represents, and is more focused on serving himself and the MAGA base than the good people of this district. name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: Like other urgent email deadlines, only with 3x urgency!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=083121c [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=083121c]

Dear Friend,

If we don’t get 12 more contributions by midnight, the Trumpy/Jan 6th-ers of the PA Legislature will turn into progressive-eating zombies , devour legislative aides to replace their dissolved brains, munch away at our voting and reproductive rights, and we’ll wind up with similarly infected judges this November.

While this may be a touch of satirical hyperbole, there’s nothing funny about what is happening in PA politics right now.

The attack on our values is real, and it IS urgent. And we’d really like at least 12 more people to click here and contribute by midnight.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=083121c]

(It’s not that our Finance Director gets summarily thrown off a cliff in the morning if you donate tomorrow. It just looks better on the chart if it is in August.)

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=083121c [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=083121c]

This organization is sick and &#%! tired of progressive circular firing squads, we're trying to focus all energies (and all PA progressives) on the incoming hordes of voters trying to sustain the Big Lie about the election with judges who believe the same.

We need to expand and reach out to more of our own and not just mobilize - we need to fight.

We need more communications to combat the infectious lies coming out of these nefarious nitwits.

We need 12 more donations of any size. Donate $3 or $30,000. But please do something. They’re coming .
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=083121c]

Thanks,

Patrick Clark
Board Member
Keystone Progress

name: Tim Ryan
subject: a snowball’s chance in hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XkTbz5FX0irz2gvd6GJRvimBhJXcrO9bPMat_pw12LbN_JhEqfpzaXPn8mAOvvREi6YZChHKEMZBX25kurIzwEonK9tvd9WjffPKWtbQQAJVbyJp7QQtKTmNKNG_7afYQbBFv3DhtTkhLmRWm4uLwgguCiQLDVl8kavMoK0lqoWT5QubwAlsr0ZCGxyrwAMq4N78_9lB4FrCCl_CmFaIfhHm9FH8PQ2zzgKdro-zD4aXj9QEWfjQrVWtc0mgppqg1i6lNlbRU24nrYvTbAswJzg/3ex/ca13l_FhS8mihJF4LYhWTQ/h0/Y3Jd-isqhIphN8osKtXxi3EcKXUwc21FWlT7pC3xXZE)
Derek --

Some folks think we have a snowball’s chance in hell of winning this U.S. Senate race and flipping Ohio’s open seat blue. They just go on and on (and on) about how Donald Trump won this state.

**You know what I think? NEVER bet against Ohio.**

There’s no secret sauce to winning tough elections beyond hard work and staying focused on what matters most to the people you hope to serve. No matter where you live, everyone wants their representatives to fight for living wages, affordable health care, and good-paying jobs in our communities.

But Mitch McConnell and his big-money donors have no interest in that. For too long, they’ve run rampant in Washington, allowing special interests to pull the strings behind closed-door meetings.

**Well, I am sick and tired of special interests calling the shots while everyday folks get ignored. And if you’re with me, I need your help to flip Ohio’s Senate seat blue.**

[**National Republicans will spend MILLIONS to buy this race and retake the Senate majority. We need to raise another $7,902 to stay on track for the month to win. Can you split a donation of $25 right now between my campaign and Common Good VA?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XkTbz5FX0irz2gvd6GJRvil9v9v-TUcClyhYFi7JYOzWHo1LZAKznF9GEKbjQVyI_GFXv1d2H4hfP3nVEZ1dDHWp4AiLdfYx81_YMdt0rMasa3q3GIRBtFoZWn2CnIFeYNvP4qSoh8anRxCB9_C_5YQ1c-V3PyZIGYm-CwTn1LzUN_BZP1atr2eKqyQfx_zcpcXfe7YIYe4GiBBZ93plVPhZwkJLO9trg8VMUN0JiEVY4xixk4y49O3Q43L3rzcdkvgt5XPoIJWsZBmhzvMe4_Y/3ex/ca13l_FhS8mihJF4LYhWTQ/h1/NNpsJeelK0NOBTrSpXRNQJRMnzepKGvZEHSY0PGSLZI) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XkTbz5FX0irz2gvd6GJRvilgsxioGKyhED9KmWDQSIydzHASr062Smnim1jJutLWz3TIObb_CmsSr2x-kmeBl-uKZezLZ9w5rCPIQGSloUhQ_Fskaq-ausRGSel7RpNq3Hb_I1Djz78Ytg16VaaOnf2EvfAJ2m9r9W43hGdDOW2xWoU-U-UhA2FyqcVSUCBWTsGoCeHBjqnlvHuMnhIZJW2FLA-gnLiTQuMHJLhcscSPRjf1Gs_8Wvxndqk30MnmTeZG621TQQfJi_qvKuF61B4/3ex/ca13l_FhS8mihJF4LYhWTQ/h2/jGYyy7tbCdT8V-6kvUBW4SIWVCfOLcPF9Vh8_pSVdoY)

name: John Fetterman
subject: I can *guarantee* you I will NOT be a Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema-type senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I swear I'm not saying this to scare you. But this is truly how high the stakes are:
#
I hate to sound alarmist, Peter, but I need to be totally honest with yinz:
**Flipping this seat blue + defending our slim Democratic majority will mean EVERYTHING in 2022.** Our success will determine if we can deliver on Joe Biden's agenda for working families — _or if Mitch McConnell will regain his stranglehold on the Senate and block any progress for working people and their families._
I *swear* I'm not saying this to scare you. But this is how high the stakes are. It's why I joined this race to represent PA in the Senate and gain that 51st vote that will unlock so much progress in our country.
**It's also why my campaign and I set a critically important goal to raise another $84,172 directly into the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before the month ends.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210831-2465&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2465%2E434096%2E-wD5Fb)
**As of now, we're still not where we need to be. And according to the records we have on file for you, Peter, you have yet to make your first contribution to our campaign.** That's why, with just a few hours left to close this pretty sizable gap on our goal, I've just got to ask you:**
**
[**_Will you donate your first-ever $5 to the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before tonight's deadline? This special fund is all about building the strong, honest + inclusive campaign we'll need to flip this Senate seat in 2022._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210831-2465&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2465%2E434096%2E-wD5Fb)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210831-2465&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2465%2E434096%2E-wD5Fb)**
I know I may joke around sometimes, but I take public service incredibly seriously.
I believe it's a solemn responsibility to serve the people + families who built this country. But right now, Republicans — _and even a few Democrats_ — are failing to deliver on that promise.
If you trust me with your support today, I can offer you this: **I will fight relentlessly to flip this seat in 2022. And when we pull it off, I guarantee you I will NOT be a Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema-type senator.**
Instead, I would proudly cast that 51st vote Democrats need in the Senate to pass common-sense legislation and deliver President Biden’s agenda to the American people. 💪
[**_But we can't get there without your initial support, Peter. Will you please donate your first $5 or more right now to help reach our goal for the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before it's too late?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210831-2465&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2465%2E434096%2E-wD5Fb)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210831-2465&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=2465%2E434096%2E-wD5Fb)**
Thank you for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. We're about 91% of the way to our urgent goal for the Flip Pennsylvania Fund — and coming up short this month would make it that much easier for Republicans to hold this seat and obstruct our Democratic policies. [** _If you're with me, will you chip in anything you can before midnight tonight to help close the gap on our goal? Thank you in advance for your support._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210831-2465&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=42&akid=2465%2E434096%2E-wD5Fb)

But this is truly how high the stakes are: I hate to sound alarmist, Peter, but I need to be totally honest with yinz: Flipping this seat blue + defending our slim Democratic majority will mean EVERYTHING in 2022. Our success will determine if we can deliver on Joe Biden's agenda for working families — or if Mitch McConnell will regain his stranglehold on the Senate and block any progress for working people and their families. I swear I'm not saying this to scare you. But this is how high the stakes are. It's why I joined this race to represent PA in the Senate and gain that 51st vote that will unlock so much progress in our country. It's also why my campaign and I set a critically important goal to raise another $84,172 directly into the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before the month ends. body:

Sorry for the late email team, but this couldn’t wait. **Saint Anselm College just released a poll showing me down by single digits. With just hours left before our August fundraising deadline, I need your help to close the gap.** Mike Pence and the Trump network have already started campaigning in New Hampshire. Just today, Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, visited the Granite State to rally the GOP's far-right base. With control of the Senate hinging on my seat, **this is going to be the most expensive and consequential race of the cycle.** In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, making it the closest in the country, so coming up even a dollar short could lose us this race -- and the Senate majority. clean_body: | | | Sorry for the late email team, but this couldn’t wait. Saint Anselm College just released a poll showing me down by single digits. With just hours left before our August fundraising deadline, I need your help to close the gap. Mike Pence and the Trump network have already started campaigning in New Hampshire. Just today, Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, visited the Granite State to rally the GOP's far-right base. With control of the Senate hinging on my seat, this is going to be the most expensive and consequential race of the cycle. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, making it the closest in the country, so coming up even a dollar short could lose us this race -- and the Senate majority. I need your help: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you so much. With every good wish, – Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Peter, I need your support to fight these attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We're just a few hours away from our August end-of-month deadline, and I want to share why it is so important that we hit our fundraising goal. This month alone, two separate right-wing dark money groups, Heritage Action and the American Action Network, launched attack ads against me. They're already flooding our district online, on television, and over the phone to attack my record. And we are still a year out from the midterm elections. This is only going to get uglier. Hey Peter,

We're just a few hours away from our August end-of-month deadline, and I want to share why it is so important that we hit our fundraising goal.

This month alone, two separate right-wing dark money groups, Heritage Action and the American Action Network, launched attack ads against me. They're already flooding our district online, on television, and over the phone to attack my record. And we are still a year out from the midterm elections. This is only going to get uglier.

National Republicans and their allies have their sights set on retaking the House majority next year, and they've named my seat a top target to help them do it. They'll say, do, and spend whatever it takes to defeat me.

We know these dark money attacks are just the beginning of what's to come. With two Trump-supporting opponents already in this race, we can't waste any time fighting back against these GOP attacks, and we must be ready to handle what’s sure to come.

Will you chip in $5 or more before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight to help me respond to these attacks? With your support, we can protect this seat and our Democratic House majority, and ensure that President Biden and the House of Representatives can continue to work together to improve the lives of the American people, responsibly lead the world in tackling climate change, and protect our natural resources. >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-aug21-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35007915/303747930/1519137766?gpsid=8_30_20305&refcode=em21_210831_eom5_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210831_eom5_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmNjYTE4Zi1iNzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBKGsAHHh3X484aC0AgK63J6w0pE6oNNrl6216oAric=)**

Thank you,

Kim

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: We can’t let Democrats outraise us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Unlike President Biden, I know where the buck stops. When the Senate majority is the question at hand, for Republicans, the buck stops with me. We can |
---
Peter,

I know my team has been emailing you frequently during the month of August, and now with less than one day left until the end of August fundraising period, I wanted to reach out to you myself.

Unlike President Biden, I know where the buck stops. When the Senate majority is the question at hand, for Republicans, the buck stops with me. We cannot fail to deliver a Republican Senate majority next November.

Democrats have proven time and again - most recently last month - that they’re determined to keep their majority so they can continue tearing apart the country bit by bit.

**[Of course, I don’t want to have to deal with the repercussions of failing to win the one seat that it will take to flip the chamber RED and put Democrats back into the minority where they belong. But let me tell you this now: even flipping one seat isn’t going to be an easy task](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb3e74a22721439c88c19b46073c422b&_e=zPsR4CXCDK9tcwvbUek8QTCOulY3JedyZkdQqzRZYqvQSoDQ-X9sHUcnffYbGH_CgWrtIPHiIziv-6yfSKmmTBxOFVFA0LvIGUQ3zYWEfgtz44Wmzto2NfG7AAehNJ_4WdBeG8CzeuAe5_7wGQ_Q-UlVBNBVUCGnSHN-skKhQGjPCjPYLRlqDCwqC-MSxaLlKBsFdE0_5U2h_Jj1BB4V7bFanNz7IRU027oseKmcvZz7XuAWrGpRBmFsyYnNn6SEIqEB8B1K2kBeqQ7bS9K48MEFd41RM1iDasLhmM8g6HwpSr1oWmWW4VUF7JYfmAE6k0du72sgnRwerO2Dn2W9Y34ZzBLVMsxX_rCkBrm-UTdOB5RJMRXycpPD-j6z-ARy-L4fuLw2a7wp-QQUY9RS-2rgMI0z12oUzxZsOjYUC-Z7UEu7fWftYB0S6TTBBSdydrtQakhcpbE2F4fX7ug5YMH7GYELEBNv0IcFcJVjqFo%3D)**.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to help me ensure that the Senate Republicans meet our August goal. name: MandelaBarnes.com
subject: A very difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
I took a big risk ...with the hope that you would come through for Mandela.
#
Hey there, it's Kory – Mandela's campaign manager.
I made a very difficult decision during our budget meeting.
It's become clear that in order to keep growing our broad coalition of folks all across the country, we're going to need to expand our investment in digital advertising.
The money wasn’t in the budget. But I gave the green light.
It was a risk, for sure. But right now our campaign needs to be doing all we can to make sure people know why Mandela is the strongest candidate in the Wisconsin U.S. Senate race.
So I made a bet that if I asked, you would come through to help fill the gap. And I’m really hoping you will. For Mandela. And for everyone who is ready to defeat Ron Johnson.
[**Can you make a $10 contribution to Mandela's campaign for U.S. Senate today? Every donation will help fill the budget gap we created making critical investments in this campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35008945/303759055/1380602223?refcode2=6a52d3be-bb0a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210831-3-tns-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTUyZDNiZS1iYjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xVxs_3QWoLYj0phBFb-Umcq43C4UxiNWpZiRXVSZlQ=)
As I mentioned, this was a pretty tough call. But if there’s one thing that distinguishes our campaign from others in this race, it’s the fact that we are powered by lots and lots of people contributing what they can.
Thanks for chipping in today if you can afford it.
All my best,
Kory Kozloski
Campaign Manager

name: Chairman Rick Scott
subject: We’ve got one day to raise $30k
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Unlike President Biden, I know where the buck stops. When the Senate majority is the question at hand, for Republicans, the buck stops with me. We can |
---
Fellow American,

I know my team has been emailing you frequently during the month of August, and now with less than one day left until the end of August fundraising period, I wanted to reach out to you myself.

Unlike President Biden, I know where the buck stops. When the Senate majority is the question at hand, for Republicans, the buck stops with me. We cannot fail to deliver a Republican Senate majority next November.

Democrats have proven time and again - most recently last month - that they’re determined to keep their majority so they can continue tearing apart the country bit by bit.

**[Of course, I don’t want to have to deal with the repercussions of failing to win the one seat that it will take to flip the chamber RED and put Democrats back into the minority where they belong. But let me tell you this now: even flipping one seat isn’t going to be an easy task](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5d6c5d1ce9db4e88abaa8a9099a7175d&_e=m9oA4PkWnnB5PEkJPfOToQoeKI4-3yl2jykMbf8UAS1oHwX9p_ywhbD6aCePqiWSq80COZpi3odRs21vJ_aNJvCW7XNDC-mBu7TGDXdaVCNlaXib2vlw989UstGKb6ct4b5AIT_WGBGaOFyaES7sTmB92Q9wEETl72840vjNoFrZ9i_UMS1C_D-m3LG2OcqEOhce9cx5e4yHmVW2NeEdd49rbjbqArJl3DCI35HnvwU7tueyJN98azV-5KBDfutm871_9nuM_lk14t1zZ2Sej93VP732YcK_xLIUrVoG5N_M4jeKscp4q-m2oyxgZmhGJZwkuaBwnlhTEaRF5M4l5AOvIhEguu9tEirCPZXqWpznFzr8oPMYsYnBn7UTsIAyOQ3vUAckplCYZz7VDQ-NnzkpMQuRKewxeoxxBasm5TM8h5OG6MtEpN2C3fMNTqTGiO2Bjr83vmE52ESatF0brY1K23LJ9aC49vP5GFimg_g%3D)**.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to help me ensure that the Senate Republicans meet our August goal. **We need you to chip-in $5 right now if you can. Help us save the country by flipping the senate**

name: Marco's iPhone
subject: the last time you'll hear from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
---
Sorry for the late email, friend. I promise this is the last time you'll hear from me before our huge end-of-month fundraising deadline, but I had to reach out one last time to our top supporters because we're still short of tonight's goal.
I mean it when I say the stakes are getting higher every day, and it's becoming more critical than ever that we be in position to win. We cannot hand our children and grandchildren an Arizona that never reached its own potential. We can't be content to let our families struggle and our votes be silenced. We owe it to every single person in this state to do _better_ than what our failed GOP leaders think is good enough.
But whether or not we defeat the rising extremism in our state and finally get back on track – that comes down to moments like _this_. **So I have to ask: Please, friend, can you chip in $5, $25, whatever you can spare, to hit our end-of-month goal by midnight and keep pushing to flip Arizona blue?**

**Here's the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/marco-lopez-for-governor_email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35009181/303761407/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGRmOWY3MS1iYzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JWLlnv7FMNEJxYCzWgBcy7CaODshUihAKqODyICeToQ=)**
Thank you for never giving up,

Marco
\--------Forwarded Message--------
From: **Marco Lopez**
Date: Sun, Aug 29, 2021
Subject: here are the facts
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35009182/303761408/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGRmOWY3MS1iYzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JWLlnv7FMNEJxYCzWgBcy7CaODshUihAKqODyICeToQ=)
---
I'll lay this out as clearly as I can, friend: My number-one goal is to defeat GOP extremists in Arizona and finally flip our governorship blue – but we can't do that without reaching every goal between now and our election. **[Our next major goal is at midnight on Tuesday, and we won't hit it without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35009183/303761409/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGRmOWY3MS1iYzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JWLlnv7FMNEJxYCzWgBcy7CaODshUihAKqODyICeToQ=)** **So here are the facts – and what I need you to help me do about them.**
**What we're up against:** Arizona's GOP has totally given up on governing, instead focusing all their energy on spreading lies and conspiracies about the 2020 election. They've pushed a sham "election audit," brought in extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Donald Trump to add fuel to the fire and are gearing up to spend _millions_ of dollars to keep Arizona red.
**What it's led to:** Now, an expert at The Washington Post has made clear that the best way for voters to fight back is by electing a Democratic governor. Meanwhile, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says this race is a "toss-up," meaning we can win! **But our finance team says it'll take another $9,133 by midnight tonight to stay on track. **
**What YOU can do:** Grassroots supporters like you delivered the White House for Joe Biden and the Senate for Democrats – including a win right here in Arizona. With so much at stake in this race, we need to bring that same energy and dedication _again_ , rallying together to build an unbeatable movement that restores Arizona's potential and flips it blue!
**[So here's what I need from you, friend: Before our major end-of-month deadline, can you chip in $5, $25 – whatever you can – to fight back against GOP extremists and win this race? clean_body: | | | I've been emailing you a lot recently because we have some important goals to hit, including our August end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight. I want to say thank you, folks. You are who is powering this campaign forward and I’m grateful for every single dollar that you give. Though August is typically one of the slowest fundraising months for any campaign, people have still chipped in what they can because they believe in better leadership for CA-23. And we can’t let up now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately Folks, as I’ve said before, I never wanted to be a politician. I had not pictured myself running against one of the most powerful Republicans in Washington. But I could no longer sit by the sidelines watching people across the Central Valley be forgotten and left behind because they aren’t large corporations or wealthy donors who can pay to play in the game of influence and power. When I announced my campaign, I knew it would be an uphill battle but I also knew it would be worth it — because the people of the Central Valley are worth fighting for. I have always been committed to serving this country and I’m ready to serve the people of this great district in Congress. We still have a long way to go before 2022, folks. We can’t afford to lose any momentum in this race. We’re going to need to make some critical decisions for this campaign in the months ahead — so, our August fundraising deadline tonight couldn’t be more important. I can’t say it enough, folks. Thank you so much for your support and your belief in building this people powered movement. I can't wait to see what we will continue building together. Bruno Amato | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress

Hi Peter, My finance team just updated me on our crucial End-of-Month fundraising goal, and we still need to raise $3050 before tonight’s deadline. subject: Still online?
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35009838/303769198/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjM3ZGY4YS1iZjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJRK0Prmc8SqY96KFyLZ5G6xALGMonMLF9lEDp8YMws=)
Glad I caught you, friend.

I know it's late, but I wanted to check in one last time before tonight's end-of-month deadline (it hits at 11:59pm). My team tells me we’re still a bit short -- just **$6,617** left to raise.

I know... we've emailed quite a bit. But I wouldn't be doing right by my team or our campaign to flip Texas blue if I didn't reach out one last time to try and close this gap.

**So what do you say, can you use the link below to chip in your donation before midnight?**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/donnaimam-q3-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35009839/303769199/77586780?refcode=em-83121-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjM3ZGY4YS1iZjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WJRK0Prmc8SqY96KFyLZ5G6xALGMonMLF9lEDp8YMws=)**

We're running the type of campaign that you can be proud of supporting.

Our goal has always been about having real conversations with voters and meeting them where they're at. This campaign is about the solutions Texans can create together and for each other, and I wouldn't have it another way.

It means so much to have your support in this effort -- especially with the news that broke recently. The elections analysts at _The Cook Political Report with Amy Walter_ are saying the district that I am running in, here in Austin, is very likely to be Democratic-leaning. subject: Biden Must Go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
We need to get rid of this fraud |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=034e9bfb1a&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

It's time to pull the plug on His Fraudulency, Joe Biden.

The guy who never should have been President in the first place, has messed everything up to the Nth degree.

Afghanistan debacle.

Border crisis.

Inflation.

We have had enough of his lies and his radical, failed Socialist policies. It's time to #FIREBIDEN!

[That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b7f260e3fd&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC - I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden - pressuring Congressmen and Senators to remove him from office!

At this point, is there any real doubt that His Fraudulency has been a complete disaster?

_A wave of prominent Republican lawmakers on Thursday called for President Joe Biden to be impeached or to resign, arguing his decisions created an environment ripe for crisis that indicates he is not capable of leadership.

“Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Antony Blinken, Lloyd Austin and General Milley should all resign or face impeachment and removal from office,” Tennessee Sen. Marsha Blackburn tweeted.

“This is the product of Joe Biden’s catastrophic failure of leadership. It is now painfully clear he has neither the will nor the capacity to lead. He must resign,” Missouri Sen. Josh Hawley said in a statement.

They join a chorus of other Republicans calling for Biden’s resignation, impeachment, or removal by the 25th Amendment, as well as the resignation of other top officials in his administration, as Taliban forces took control of the country amid a chaotic U.S. exit._

[Will you help us pressure lawmakers to #FIREBIDEN?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=7d58f61514&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=ceba911638&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Unfortunately, that's not all this incompetent President has unleashed on us.

Gas prices are at an 8 year high and spiking, thanks for Biden's anti-energy "Green New Deal" policies. It's part of a general spike in prices- known as inflation, which is defined as too many dollars chasing too few goods.

_**In other words, the Federal Government is printing money like crazy but the country isn't producing enough. Welcome to Socialism.**_

_And of course, we have all seen the grizzly images of the humanitarian crisis at the Southern border._ Tens of thousands of unaccompanied children, criminals and gang members, and illegal immigrants streaming across our border.

Not only has Biden refused to enforce Federal law, but he actually STOPPED construction on Trump's border wall, which was actually working to stop illegal immigration!

He has refused to enforce Federal immigration law, for which the Supreme Court has already smacked him down. He is spending us into oblivion and causing inflation, paying people NOT to work.

It's time to end this nightmare. Time to use impeachment, or the 25th Amendment, to #FIREBIDEN.
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=d416bf8a6b&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Now, this won't be easy. There are some weak-kneed "Republicans" who will resist. That's why Drain the DC Swamp PAC needs to pressure those weak Republicans and soft Dems to impeach him and remove him!

Who knows, maybe if he's impeached he might resign like Nixon did. God knows he should.

**We cannot trust the politicians to do the right thing- many of them, anyway. They won't see the light until they feel the heat!**

It's time to block ALL of Biden's nominees to anything. It's time to block ALL his legislation. It's time to remove this demented fool before he destroys the country.

The 14 American soldiers killed in Afghanistan due to Biden's incompetence and lies deserve nothing less. _**He MUST be held accountable, and if the establishment politicians won't do it, we will make life difficult for them!**_

[Help us pressure these guys into doing the right thing for the country.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=43114750b6&e=ba6e67b849)

Swampers always betray you the first chance they get, and every single time thereafter. [They are good for nothing, and won't do the right thing until they are forced to!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f97b7603a1&e=ba6e67b849)

Time to ramp up the pressure! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is crucial so we can hold Biden and his cronies accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=35c228170b&e=ba6e67b849)

It won't stop at Biden either. We need to impeach Harris and the rest of this failed Woke Socialist bunch. [Help me bust this cartel up!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=424fb54bc0&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,

Combat Infantry Veteran

name: SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Here's the good news: People across Wisconsin are fired up about taking down Ron Johnson, flipping this Senate seat blue, and expanding our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority. They're also excited about Sarah and the grassroots movement we're building!

Now, here's the bad news: We are $716 short of our end-of-month goal ahead of tonight’s midnight deadline. A gap like that might not seem like much, but it can make a significant difference as we grow our campaign in these critical early months. Can you help close it?

Please rush a donation before our end-of-month deadline at midnight. Every dollar gives us the early resources we need to build a strong campaign and fight Republican efforts to reclaim the Senate majority. You can donate here.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-aug21-eom

Our campaign isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs. In fact, the vast majority of our donations come from messages like this one. This grassroots team has always risen to the occasion, and we can do it again and continue to put ourselves in a strong position to defeat Ron Johnson.

Thanks for stepping up!

— Team Sarah

Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today.

CONTRIBUTE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-aug21-eom

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to support Sarah's campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, please add a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-donate?refcode=em2021&amount=10] to help us win.

clean_body: We don’t have to outraise the National GOP, but we do have to stay on track of our fundraising. | = Hey there, folks — I’m not here to beg for a donation, that’s not how I do things, but with this month’s deadline just hours away, I want to share the honest-to-God truth: My team just told me that we’re going to fall short of this month’s fundraising goal if supporters like you don’t pitch in before midnight. Mitch McConnell, Rick Scott, and the National GOP already raised nearly $60 million this year to flip the Senate, and I’m at the top of their target list. We don’t have to outraise them, team, but we do have to stay on track with our fundraising goals to fend off the attacks we know are coming. This month’s deadline is just a few hours away and your support means so much to me. So, I’m respectfully asking (not begging!) you to please make a donation of $3 — or whatever you can afford — to help us reach our goal before tonight’s midnight deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you and talk soon, Michael P.S. I’m the only Senator running for re-election turning down corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money because I’m running a grassroots campaign. name: Giffords
subject: Give now and YOU could get us across the finish line
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Each donation you make sends a clear message to Congress that we want universal background checks now.
#

Hi there - We have some good news and some bad news.
**The bad news is** the National Sports Shooting Foundation (NSSF) is outspending the NRA to oppose our priorities. If we can’t keep up with their outrageous spending, our gun safety message will get drowned out by their propaganda.
**The good news is** we are only $6,498 away from our $100,000 August fundraising goal. By the time you finish reading this email, we will be even closer. YOU could be the person who gets us across the finish line if you give NOW!
So please:
[**Can we count on you to make a $3 donation right away? Your support will go a long way towards helping us save lives, so please pitch in before our midnight deadline if you can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21-eom?refcode=em210831-2-15&t=1&refcode2=819_3935704_A6LPw3&akid=819%2E3935704%2EA6LPw3)
Each donation you make sends a clear message to Congress that we want universal background checks now, and to our opponents that we’re not backing down.
Thank you for your continued support.
All our best,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21-eom?refcode=em210831-2-15&t=2&refcode2=819_3935704_A6LPw3&akid=819%2E3935704%2EA6LPw3)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=819%2E3935704%2EA6LPw3) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Peter,

I’m reaching out to chat about one thing no one EVER wants to talk about: asking for money. It takes a LOT of resources to run a political campaign, and even more to win. And unlike Nancy Pelosi and her San Francisco elitist friends, I don’t have that kind of cash laying around. I rely on support from everyday people like YOU to keep this train going. Your donations go a long way in helping our campaign build momentum so we can bring home the W on Election Day and take back control of the House. Here are some ways you can pitch in right now, Peter: I know that my grassroots army is the most important asset I have in this race, so I’m counting on YOU every step of the way. body:
| | | _**DON 'T**_ delete this email.
_**DON 'T**_ close your computer.
_**DON 'T give Republicans the satisfaction!**_

Because President Biden is calling grassroots Democrats everywhere to action ahead of our critical eight-hour End of Month Deadline:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)

We can't afford to let President Biden down.

_**Not**_ when House Republicans have blocked his bold agenda at every turn.

_**And not**_ when Donald Trump has staked his return to the White House on the complete destruction of our House Majority.

**[So before our midnight End of Month Deadline, can we count on you to chip in $3 to answer President Biden's call and defend our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. I’m a gay woman, Christian minister, and mom of three running to unseat right-wing insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn and create a new path forward for Western North Carolina.
Skeptics have told me that I have no chance of winning an election here. But I already have -- _twice_.
By organizing everywhere, talking to everyone, and doing a whole lot of listening, I won two terms as county commissioner.
**Peter,** **I’m ready to put in the work and do it again**. We have a real chance at defeating Cawthorn and flipping NC-11 blue.
And it’s never been more urgent. Cawthorn was just caught warning of “bloodshed” and violence against his fellow Americans over Trump’s Big Lie. He is dangerous and unfit to serve.
I need you with me.
[**Can you chip in $2 or more to say goodbye to Madison Cawthorn and his extremist agenda?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35011283/303779486/-217737161?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210831_FR_EOM6LastChance_B1_other_U1_X1&amount=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjJkMmM4Ni1jNTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DCSIlOlPMUkZ4uhVYoa5NINcCk32WstkM8esIemzWyA=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, This is the last chance to reach our end-of-month fundraising deadline. = | | | = | | = I’m a gay woman, Christian minister, and mom of three running to unseat right-wing insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn and create a new path forward for Western North Carolina. Skeptics have told me that I have no chance of winning an election here. But I already have -- twice. By organizing everywhere, talking to everyone, and doing a whole lot of listening, I won two terms as county commissioner. Peter, I’m ready to put in the work and do it again. We have a real chance at defeating Cawthorn and flipping NC-11 blue. And it’s never been more urgent. Cawthorn was just caught warning of “bloodshed” and violence against his fellow Americans over Trump’s Big Lie. He is dangerous and unfit to serve. I need you with me. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Together, Jasmine Beach-Ferrara | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Derek (Personal)
subject: quickly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Hi Peter -- I don't want to take up too much of your time, but this is important.

My finance director, Liz, just let me know we are only 61 donors away from our 500 grassroots donors goal! This is huge, and I'm hoping I can count on you to help us cross the finish line.

There are only a few hours left until the end-of-month deadline, so I'm reaching out to you personally to ask for your support. Here's a personal link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kilmer-august21&refcode2=Peter](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZumtikCpScEtM5BiEbjeqV1G8kKBDV9HNdRMXACLkB0=/B11Zc-jEo9zS9D7S8eydylZG9LAY9oGvFyK8ndXA7pk=?gpsid=50_115_20297&refcode=em21_210831_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210831_EOM3_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

clean_body: We wanted to follow up on the goal Wilmot and the team set yesterday. We wanted to raise $3,500 by midnight, and we’re just $645 away from our goal! | | | Team! We wanted to follow up on the goal Wilmot and the team set yesterday. We wanted to raise $3,500 by midnight, and we’re just $645 away from our goal! If just 19 more people step up with our average online donation of $35 , we’ll blow past this goal in a matter of minutes. But if everyone reading this says “someone else will step up”, we’re going to fall short. Thanks! \- Helena HQ \--- Forwarded Message --- Folks, My campaign is powered by grassroots strength. And there’s no greater testament to that than my average online contribution of just $35. So, my team and I are setting a goal to raise $3,500 by tomorrow night to take on my extremist opponent, which means if 100 people step up with our average donation of just $35, we’ll be able to blow by this goal and have the resources we need to make sure I can keep fighting for the city I love! I understand that you work hard for your money, and if you’re simply unable to make a $35 contribution right now, I would greatly appreciate a donation of any amount, even if it’s just $5. So what do you say? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Thank you for being on this team, Wilmot Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

body:

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/834a9029-70b4-43da-83ce-4214bce52fb9.jpg]

Joe Kent Endorses Loren Culp for Congress

Loren Culp receives the endorsement of America First candidate Joe Kent. The endorsement reads:

I am honored to endorse Loren Culp in Washington's 4th Congressional District.

Loren Culp is an icon in Washington politics. After exploding onto the political scene in 2018 by refusing to comply with Olympia's unconstitutional gun ban, his historic Gubernatorial run last year sparked a wave of conservative grassroots activism across the State of Washington and garnered more votes than any Republican Gubernatorial candidate in Washington State history.

Mr. Culp's opponent is an America Last RINO that voted to impeach President Trump, sided with Nancy Pelosi to form the January 6th Commission--a move that would target America First Patriots as extremists, authored a bill to facilitate amnesty, and currently has one of the lowest conservative ratings in Congress.

I believe together we can remove the America Last RINOs from Washington politics, save our Republic, and restore our nation's future. Please join me in supporting Loren Culp for Congress in Washington's 4th Congressional District.

- Joe Kent

body:
| | | [ ](http://email.m.caitlynjenner.com/c/eJyNkMGOgyAQhp8GbxgZKOjBQ93W-2YfwCAOlQ1io5hu335p1-5hT5sQkvl_5hvmH-pSHWTPROZqKIAVJWcAhWIyZ3kjmup8OlZCsEZUZ05EMeVGu-jv4RNDwCU385SN9VBJ1iuF-lCUKKQYCsErW8KB9aVSVma-HmO8roQfCbTprGi2BfObCwsOD0jSdrCdF6NTaV3QnmIY6GzpNIc4Et7il4suRAyR8FNcNiQgtzh1Ew5um5KGk3Z-F9d5WwwmMRjf6enqnb3vlkmldpeQzJ-tQdE4urVL557aOq_X2JlRB_MaYebX3ISj7XvLL4eP2zImuwveDcn4I65P0XJreF8YCsgtFRVI2peSU8Z0pYuSoTJVttTD9ea8d6tUKeXLY4tntvu3a6IaArBtCQnwjBH-A348hrd0x_sVfzt3aL6HBUSdvgFQE6FL)

| | Friend, The Recall Election is almost here. **We have just weeks to take back California.** As August comes to an end, we are nearing our **FINAL** fundraising deadline. Throughout this campaign, the support of Californians and Americans across the country has been incredible. **We need one LAST fundraising surge to meet this goal.**
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.caitlynjenner.com/c/eJyNULFuwyAQ_Rq8YcFBjD14iJtkr9Slk4UxxFSAXRsr9d-XpE6HTpVOSPce793d6-tSHIqO8szWQICSklEAImiR07zhTXU-HSvOacOrM0Oc-FxJG90WPnQIes7V6LOhFklyMIwKwrnpelp0qjt0JS8J7UkBNHP1EOO0IHZEcEm1aLXOOr_ZMOv-bpKw3diMs5KpNTZIh3Xo8WiwH0McELvoLxttiDpExE5xXjWCYo2-9bq3q0-Y9tK6HVzGdVY6gUG5VvrJWbPtlEqttNeQyJ-rQeA42KVNtSVZ6-QSWzXIoJ4j1Picm-zwCsf310_VyLdEt8HZPhF_wOUBGmYU64jCoJnBvIICd2XBMKWykqSkWqgqm-t-ulnn7FKIlPL1fsUj233tGokGAaxrsgR4xAj_Mb5_hpf0xm3Sv8rdNN_DAiRO3xhJoTk)
---
