name: Team Ryan
subject: Rachel Maddow confirms: Trump is terrified of Tim Ryan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=737%2E3611125%2EWhczCn ][IMG]

MSNBC confirmed it: Trump chose to hold his first rally since leaving the
White House in Ohio because he knows Tim Ryan has the momentum to flip
this open Senate seat blue.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1858?amount=5&t=1007&akid=737%2E3611125%2EWhczCn ]'Trump taking the shots at Congressman Ryan... says something about his chances
at winning that Senate seat.' -- Rachel Maddow

Ohio’s open seat is one of the most likely to flip in 2022. Tim is THE
Democrat to win this seat and expand our Democratic Senate Majority -- and
Donald Trump knows it.

Republicans will pour millions of dollars into Ohio to try to stop Tim’s
momentum. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1859?t=1008&akid=737%2E3611125%2EWhczCn ]Can we count on you to chip in $25 and make sure we have the
resources to compete?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1859?t=1009&akid=737%2E3611125%2EWhczCn ]Donate

Check out what Maddow’s fellow MSNBC host Lawrence O’Donnell had to say:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1858?amount=5&t=1010&akid=737%2E3611125%2EWhczCn ]'There are already a handful of Republican candidates for Senate in Ohio. But
Donald Trump didn't go there to help any of them. He went there to try to stop
Tim Ryan.' -- Lawrence O’Donnell

O’Donnell was crystal clear: he said Donald Trump went to Ohio to attack
Tim Ryan and that Trump is “very afraid” of Tim.

Trump’s position as the leader of the Republican party rests on his
ability to flip the House and Senate red in 2022. But he can’t compete
with Tim’s track record and winning message of cutting workers in on the
deal.

That’s why we need the resources to get Tim’s message out everywhere
across our state -- and make sure it’s louder than all the Republican BS
Trump’s directing our way.

We need your help to send Trump and his team a clear message: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1859?t=1011&akid=737%2E3611125%2EWhczCn ]Tim has
the people behind him, and we’re going all the way to the Senate!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1859?t=1012&akid=737%2E3611125%2EWhczCn ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1860?t=1013&akid=737%2E3611125%2EWhczCn ]Donate $50

Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, OR let the government enforce mandates? . Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=f85504d806cb41039a679bbc1f383b2e&_t=oyFbi9WUJNMk0zGb-XIb9EX5oOZ2qLHslodqoZR6Fluyy_lrcY3dTrrvvPymfni-E_ovtHYFgbeY6LR9mSR8jXZLQsndj9MSoMMup20tXpqxqVpOZH5qFRVCqH-_vfmzX6RezPDF9nLyCpp0ZCVSkj6gTBwrMgr0w77PomewSEU%3D)

---

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f85504d806cb41039a679bbc1f383b2e&_e=m5SRz4Mg6Qk5EGxLD4xjcYl1yELSy4JHG786rw7qDSCMZpOQw4HP16Lpklci0ZbvVK6Gl6zHjFaf9mN5VEGb1qs5-tdOLkkAjriDC8stfZXwgDkM1AOW0HPAHdLvgfGokcTgX5zvHbRU9cxtqkqa5_HCPec6fqan2QNr1b8xvfm7hrEqdY87d_0C6PwEfWxwPbtoKQSut0rIxJb7-E_DhSv7DvzZ31TIW3K6s-rcqxCvE4mdWmOQb5qbsMG1S4MYZG3GpHrsYNpsnZ4Y8xpPV99KJ-ycpXRApfsx_gdMlN3yrTaFJ_aQVY0au0fqmgMonwuARCutmuVq3PxB97B3M88o0IZfjyLpECelzbVUG3TN7IlSDopAoFFrW8vfRe_2AcI06-mgdvEjRuBQ3HIpMjBHGbmOJZmnq9jcG9k4N19mhhQRATvfApJ4MAyypXjzM_iz6NBkExKMmow1KnJrXhYDWK8YeHNMLdD8esg61B3guS0IRRpTK-i4Y6QUUiTWVC8fIPnqm0OcMHXmwMYoFg%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f85504d806cb41039a679bbc1f383b2e&_e=m5SRz4Mg6Qk5EGxLD4xjcYl1yELSy4JHG786rw7qDSCMZpOQw4HP16Lpklci0ZbvVK6Gl6zHjFaf9mN5VEGb1qs5-tdOLkkAjriDC8stfZXwgDkM1AOW0HPAHdLvgfGokcTgX5zvHbRU9cxtqkqa5_HCPec6fqan2QNr1b8xvfm7hrEqdY87d_0C6PwEfWxwPbtoKQSut0rIxJb7-E_DhSv7DvzZ31TIW3K6s-rcqxCvE4mdWmOQb5qbsMG1S4MYZG3GpHrsYNpsnZ4Y8xpPV99KJ-ycpXRApfsx_gdMlN3yrTaFJ_aQVY0au0fqmgMopDSjk2b9Xkp7TZ914ADISD9J6_k-8YlmIArTy132tLGDWGRhZDamuvQFkP1uzEOCdtIlXtwg15gbXhUN0KWOiwN-0-_8WnKfDosKx2ulle_MZQeWNre4hjRweMk9P2ow5r48DUHukX6dcm4xeaVEJeoNE-dmWSIRDorekZGk5nVD16Ckk2XXi9EmBkOYX0c5LHnuuETuq7C00HoBGZuFAg%3D%3D)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 31st

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f85504d806cb41039a679bbc1f383b2e&_e=m5SRz4Mg6Qk5EGxLD4xjcYl1yELSy4JHG786rw7qDSCMZpOQw4HP16Lpklci0ZbvVK6Gl6zHjFaf9mN5VEGb1qs5-tdOLkkAjriDC8stfZXwgDkM1AOW0HPAHdLvgfGokcTgX5zvHbRU9cxtqkqa5_HCPec6fqan2QNr1b8xvfm7hrEqdY87d_0C6PwEfWxwPbtoKQSut0rIxJb7-E_DhSv7DvzZ31TIW3K6s-rcqxCvE4mdWmOQb5qbsMG1S4MYZG3GpHrsYNpsnZ4Y8xpPV99KJ-ycpXRApfsx_gdMlN3yrTaFJ_aQVY0au0fqmgMo4hrHeI2J_cHjjZ6AS33V2R8vdeCZcIqoNPyyCKK3Nejn66B75fWRR2TXvyLv088f1gqu9nWwClNndK9eNSdL52mBZHHk8uvaBSYn63OENKnng8SGHP1Yu2ILUedeFjyesNEcHMFqk5caZQtG9m-26poThirjZqASyo2EzPUUmdOLWQOYtGMXbgHKR2ogPRtlN70ugRQ0K3NrSKo1Se6yqQ%3D%3D)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f85504d806cb41039a679bbc1f383b2e&_e=m5SRz4Mg6Qk5EGxLD4xjcYl1yELSy4JHG786rw7qDSCMZpOQw4HP16Lpklci0ZbvVK6Gl6zHjFaf9mN5VEGb1qs5-tdOLkkAjriDC8stfZXwgDkM1AOW0HPAHdLvgfGokcTgX5zvHbRU9cxtqkqa5_HCPec6fqan2QNr1b8xvfm7hrEqdY87d_0C6PwEfWxwPbtoKQSut0rIxJb7-E_DhSv7DvzZ31TIW3K6s-rcqxCvE4mdWmOQb5qbsMG1S4MYZG3GpHrsYNpsnZ4Y8xpPV99KJ-ycpXRApfsx_gdMlN3yrTaFJ_aQVY0au0fqmgMohFb1l2ZLuPV4q_GTgB3WGBJ992oFaOl3LxYNryKx1LdWyDFbAFAySrb-SFlt_QZhNg61n-eUzgYlveGHNG4aa3fcSigKF99xMg3suPIjI_MQyaIJfEzDLy1Co4QmHZSzLtG1DapgEPA3-xfeZ98JUoHKKAhzCwM1U7t7LrbcACaBDaxmH4-sg8ISBxN7wsBM7ogHT9_fksbHElQ0ZanzoQ%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f85504d806cb41039a679bbc1f383b2e&_e=m5SRz4Mg6Qk5EGxLD4xjcYl1yELSy4JHG786rw7qDSCMZpOQw4HP16Lpklci0ZbvVK6Gl6zHjFaf9mN5VEGb1qs5-tdOLkkAjriDC8stfZXwgDkM1AOW0HPAHdLvgfGokcTgX5zvHbRU9cxtqkqa5_HCPec6fqan2QNr1b8xvfm7hrEqdY87d_0C6PwEfWxwPbtoKQSut0rIxJb7-E_DhSv7DvzZ31TIW3K6s-rcqxCvE4mdWmOQb5qbsMG1S4MYZG3GpHrsYNpsnZ4Y8xpPV99KJ-ycpXRApfsx_gdMlN3yrTaFJ_aQVY0au0fqmgMoqS2rL2fkbOyrK4x6yhApgluAc4AbO6KMg5IpsItdpmjgE18T65vsXFwGU6SWODbBiBGEdCEBPowImvy4ggGbaIJthehsJ0N3iBj13L_BFt94qm_9ZDw9-zsihrTEY85_2zvPrmju6sEUL3mixAj4UPh9_NzcYR0_mYCnrsa1t4_SvKrGTzWBvm8R1tfDTq0UzVZTVMe4YLlHMOiqJa2SOQ%3D%3D)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f85504d806cb41039a679bbc1f383b2e&_e=m5SRz4Mg6Qk5EGxLD4xjcYl1yELSy4JHG786rw7qDSCMZpOQw4HP16Lpklci0ZbvVK6Gl6zHjFaf9mN5VEGb1qs5-tdOLkkAjriDC8stfZXwgDkM1AOW0HPAHdLvgfGokcTgX5zvHbRU9cxtqkqa5_HCPec6fqan2QNr1b8xvfm7hrEqdY87d_0C6PwEfWxwPbtoKQSut0rIxJb7-E_DhSv7DvzZ31TIW3K6s-rcqxCvE4mdWmOQb5qbsMG1S4MYZG3GpHrsYNpsnZ4Y8xpPV99KJ-ycpXRApfsx_gdMlN3yrTaFJ_aQVY0au0fqmgMojl2u0wopl22_YfwgpbdeWFsl04Py3MmcB_-OJO0ORrvZ3AI7nb2zmxYlbFjkwQIeWVyKvZMVsQmzNbc6j0XDgmQC2xMRTwKLKCYIgo8Pvb5mafS3TF21z2RkF12L4Or3dpELRvVNo1dYg1ver2oc9N5deqr7Pgb0MnjXuTXyUJ6juKC0qw7k-sxJOQVW3gDCKKOj5BsRAQdX1qnoYnw-Lw%3D%3D)

name: Team Nikki
subject: correction
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends,

It looks like we sent an old link to Nikki to use for her last email to you.

We’re sorry to send another message, but we want to make sure you’re able to chip in before midnight.

Please use this link to donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-aug-eom-correction [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-aug-eom-correction]

We've corrected the link in the forwarded email below as well.

Thanks for understanding—have a wonderful evening.

—Team Nikki

----Original Message----

Dear Friends,

I know it’s getting late, but I wanted to update you on our August fundraising goal. Thanks to supporters like you, we’re only $3,321 short.

If 323 people chip in $10 before midnight, we’ll reach our end-of-month fundraising goal. If you’re able to contribute, please click here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-aug-eom-correction]

I’ll be honest with you, friends: things in Florida are tough right now. While traveling the country to raise money for his Presidential run, Ron DeSantis is trying to defund school districts that require masks.

This isn’t about Democrats and Republicans anymore. It’s about keeping our children safe and saving lives. Ron DeSantis’ attempt to score political points off of COVID-19 isn’t just bad--it’s unconscionable.

He’ll play politics with every issue, from climate change to voting rights to a global pandemic. That’s why it’s so important to stop him next year.

I know we send a lot of emails, and I’m sorry to bother you again. But DeSantis is the most dangerous governor in the country, and we need to do everything we can to win this race.

Team, if you can step up before the end of August, it would mean the world to me and make a real difference. Please click here to chip in now to stop DeSantis and help us win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-aug-eom-correction]

With Gratitude,
Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/99dd157a-e609-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/f1180d64-cb0a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTE4MGQ2NC1jYjBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uMNr3Y3HBj-wTnudmAfaiPTHngre5Fx9CKFt-W3B5c=&id=116879433 .

body:
Derek, I know it’s late, but I wanted to get one last note out to you before our filing deadline tonight.
| | |
---
| | Derek, I know it’s late, but I wanted to get one last note out to you before our filing deadline tonight.

With less than two hours left, we’re still $10,283 short of our million dollar goal.

**_[Will you chip in right now and help us reach $1 million before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35012381/303781903/-2023814932?refcode=20210831.9_TM_8FD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZkZDE2YS1jYTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qK0tovy_BfzeiDDYFAwG7dFmmbUyD6rw0SlEeMem6UA=)_**

Look, the hard truth is that, at any moment, Glenn Youngkin could write a check to his campaign for millions of dollars. With resources like that, and the race this close, he could actually start to pull away.

We don’t have Glenn’s bottomless bank account, but we do have something better: a historic grassroots movement of Democrats across the country ready to stop Youngkin and stand up to Trumpism in America.

If enough of you step up — right now — we can start September strong and take the fight directly to Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump.

**_[So please, click here and make a secure donation right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35012382/303781904/-2023814932?refcode=20210831.9_TM_8FD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZkZDE2YS1jYTBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qK0tovy_BfzeiDDYFAwG7dFmmbUyD6rw0SlEeMem6UA=)_**

Thanks for hearing me out, Derek — I truly can’t do this without you.

With gratitude,

Terry

#
Peter, I just checked in with the team, and they let me know we're currently 94% of the way to our August goal of $50,000!
**[Your donation _right now_ could be the one that puts us over the top at this key moment. Can you chip in $3 or any amount before midnight?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5566?refcode=em20210831-592&t=21&akid=592%2E420207%2EmPMa1N)**

When you donate to our movement, you're showing up for our urgent fights for a bold jobs and families plan that invests in our communities, expanding Medicare, ending the filibuster, passing a wealth tax, canceling student debt, AND growing our progressive coalition in Congress next year. _And that’s just scratching the surface._
Together we have achieved so much since I was first elected to Congress in 2016, and together we'll continue the fight for transformative change so we can deliver for the millions of people that put President Biden in the White House and Democrats in control of the House and Senate.
Believe me, donations from emails like this one really do allow me to focus on legislating and advocating for our progressive priorities instead of fundraising. | Peter,

I’m reaching out because tonight is our end-of-month fundraising deadline._It also marks two weeks until Gov. Newsom’s recall election._ Ballots have already been sent out and voting has started.

And MAGA Republicans are extremely motivated to vote Gov. Newsom out.

They would do anything to elect Larry Elder -- an anti-masker, Trump-loving misogynist to our Governor’s mansion.

Peter ー it’s Andrew.

I wanted to just send you a quick reminder about my campaign and explain to you why it’s so crucial that we outraise our Democratic opponents.

The Democrats want to pass the infamous HR4 -- which denigrates the American voting process -- in the Senate. But to do that, they need to end the filibuster...

And Peter, I have to admit... I’m very concerned about this. My colleagues on the other side of the aisle, and especially Nancy Pelosi, have proven how shameless they can be over this past year.

If the Dems strike down the filibuster...**we could see America radically transformed.**
[**RUSH A DONATION TO SAVE VOTER LAWS**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=28ea2d4e0e8b4c1d91dc7bda1e031ada&_e=nHran1Qiz31iWR-wTY94_Joltrgqa-3JChBGhkE43AIaBj3BZv8m2usfDu5C5gPejP3mmQxzATZG0i_oZBDjVSqYzjcfEPHG5xXogKDZYch5Rg420oBei-e4j3pbiCF2Y4jj0dVEFGCUyRDfHCnwrKC_CLYJJCALkeONpV-HeFu5LUH77K08cFfIG0X-B9uhVCmAsFAL348YxU3XQqSXnvvTYFmfHfONwUy7FpPqyQWPC0zGZKbFliPDzXP2Op7dMs0njT1I2OpAG9cjWyzC_DlsOYMcg5yJFAirHr_qqWRjRenL85QKdP0VjtetLoMYxQXl8h5TxjOIqUQfvGrno_4RG1iLQyKMyoIno4rB_7xuG_iq-TyqDBd9JMmh5NT4y4iJL7n2-fBN4M2TnZ_I8S5GSHgDr3GCiIzG_0GgEavmLiOz4aPCxaBwkzWk8h5-tWjxBNXoxIysL99WNo0d7UOCb8eZ3cf43SEXSvFEI2hzhJpJ3L37PZj4e1JIfsGb)
But that’s not what we want. And it sure isn’t what hard-working Americans need.

Americans are looking for leadership that actually represents their will. So why are Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats governing like this is a socialist country?

**It all comes down to power and control for the leftists.**

But as your Congressman, I’ve co-sponsored over **70** pieces of legislation in just half a year, bringing jobs and prosperity directly to the Long Island area... leaving the partisan games to Pelosi.

Peter, I need your help to keep doing my work here. I want to continue standing up for YOU in Congress... but right now, I’m counting on your support.

_[**We’re JUST $3,452 away from our goal... will you rush a $5, $25, or $50 donation to my campaign today?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=28ea2d4e0e8b4c1d91dc7bda1e031ada&_e=nHran1Qiz31iWR-wTY94_Joltrgqa-3JChBGhkE43AIaBj3BZv8m2usfDu5C5gPejP3mmQxzATZG0i_oZBDjVSqYzjcfEPHG5xXogKDZYch5Rg420oBei-e4j3pbiCF2Y4jj0dVEFGCUyRDfHCnwrKC_CLYJJCALkeONpV-HeFu5LUH77K08cFfIG0X-B9uhVCmAsFAL348YxU3XQqSXnvvTYFmfHfONwUy7FpPqyQWPC0zGZKbFliPDzXP2Op7dMs0njT1I2OpAG9cjWyzC_DlsOYMcg5yJFAirHr_qqWRFzoIkyZaAX8OQn__r_A3XXRJoeg4QtCMJAJyD-_X4eOqIWiuTR0g7SwcmMrJNVMp3MpTPeNGfwUdsr6Wltxb5-tjFQQX1q6diVUIR7Cy2s1nolCeCIZmq-bG6Wa4NsK4aHVlBuSaaKs0Z_Cen58BH0Jg_mqjCV6dfTxi8_MYivLzvuRm489Ymj6IoChpVqY_Az0MJiGCn02WAp5UI6iIJ)_

name: Chairman Rick Scott
subject: $30k more is all we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Unlike President Biden, I know where the buck stops. When the Senate majority is the question at hand, for Republicans, the buck stops with me. We can |
---
Fellow American,

I know my team has been emailing you frequently during the month of August, and now with less than one day left until the end of August fundraising period, I wanted to reach out to you myself.

Unlike President Biden, I know where the buck stops. When the Senate majority is the question at hand, for Republicans, the buck stops with me. We cannot fail to deliver a Republican Senate majority next November.

Democrats have proven time and again - most recently last month - that they’re determined to keep their majority so they can continue tearing apart the country bit by bit.

**[Of course, I don’t want to have to deal with the repercussions of failing to win the one seat that it will take to flip the chamber RED and put Democrats back into the minority where they belong. But let me tell you this now: even flipping one seat isn’t going to be an easy task](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99aa7ca8a6d74f9f8b97d832b75efbe3&_e=GmH9gS108FBFsx-Z85hOO1slUmMdnbzl6SGErCvMP_2zrxGUzOlVT6ai9Bb3TPiJ3n2Dg5MVkB75oykUYotRUAabTlTntZUHZd-chIJar-wf5DsnvL-yoPg8sy14q-CBNRXo9twLPCtgM8BfzkstdhCyWJpUmGQHy-wCElj8wQ4Ox6A1K6zdk76DZHO4TvuXo3K-w-3Tz_UG0z8f-NA5Z1deOOvM7uKePec9mivsT0KlXToMLTvrS_m0rfVrWupcwRsdwURI1ECX3TazEEnNZnadkrvLwuUCa9eWd5L8P9zAF7JFTcMA1IdwoGnT7msr1YGZTihGc2enlUtXhhs90l22MjsumXTTQFcXSmUJEUC9jecWGeR2OOJ2tPj5OQMNR_WaW0We0nsAyMyVFaImRGF4M5veSlewxs8-hX9FJJ59wB1cSyHH7TmHPvSmeFKnwKYJF8Mt4L341lLV574B0A%3D%3D)**.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to help me ensure that the Senate Republicans meet our August goal. As it stands this morning, we’re just $30k short.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99aa7ca8a6d74f9f8b97d832b75efbe3&_e=GmH9gS108FBFsx-Z85hOO1slUmMdnbzl6SGErCvMP_2zrxGUzOlVT6ai9Bb3TPiJ3n2Dg5MVkB75oykUYotRUAabTlTntZUHZd-chIJar-wf5DsnvL-yoPg8sy14q-CBNRXo9twLPCtgM8BfzkstdhCyWJpUmGQHy-wCElj8wQ4Ox6A1K6zdk76DZHO4TvuXo3K-w-3Tz_UG0z8f-NA5Z1deOOvM7uKePec9mivsT0KlXToMLTvrS_m0rfVrWupcD61J0NpGm3SKSIsrTgAw8S5-2S7HmYJ6r1UYmcwsvJ_dvq48jGUDgoAC_VX7NAzLs-1sRm_Y1Yfzy4LZ_UiMjGZNDGSrYfhGqQ37CvAWz_s543Pj6B-vJhaWaKKto8JHtoQ3XPRBoAWvD6atg0qaHKfTpnuNs1EMyPhZdXO1cD3pxUTwJvccOAgWjHh8QgXHcSO1NGqc83rrz-uNn8s08w%3D%3D)**

| **EMERGENCY END-OF-MONTH DONATION REQUEST FOR**
**We need you to chip-in $5 right now if you can. Help us save the country by flipping the senate**

[**CHIP-IN $5 ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99aa7ca8a6d74f9f8b97d832b75efbe3&_e=GmH9gS108FBFsx-Z85hOO1slUmMdnbzl6SGErCvMP_2zrxGUzOlVT6ai9Bb3TPiJ3n2Dg5MVkB75oykUYotRUAabTlTntZUHZd-chIJar-wf5DsnvL-yoPg8sy14q-CBNRXo9twLPCtgM8BfzkstdhCyWJpUmGQHy-wCElj8wQ4Ox6A1K6zdk76DZHO4TvuXo3K-w-3Tz_UG0z8f-NA5Z1deOOvM7uKePec9mivsT0KlXToMLTvrS_m0rfVrWupcG3p5I7sEOw_eMC32VKocZJc6vxdQ_uahBk-jVmjTwGGjeg6I1jhjAW7c8gMSxoTze3wk1xDBLgWS5SxBOl6Vs77Le-yxFyuREV_6fFf4pEf4AKICVyb4W9el8Mk7HXPH72df1h2230IekUMSOw-j0P5K0JXbe9SzuUKrca6N6W-L1tWjp4qlLiPUQxcf0m8i-FXEsO970IbOvsh4aI7H6g%3D%3D)

Every Republican Senator is counting on you to help us reach our August fundraising goal, **[so I implore you one last time to please pitch in whatever you can.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99aa7ca8a6d74f9f8b97d832b75efbe3&_e=GmH9gS108FBFsx-Z85hOO1slUmMdnbzl6SGErCvMP_2zrxGUzOlVT6ai9Bb3TPiJ3n2Dg5MVkB75oykUYotRUAabTlTntZUHZd-chIJar-wf5DsnvL-yoPg8sy14q-CBNRXo9twLPCtgM8BfzkstdhCyWJpUmGQHy-wCElj8wQ4Ox6A1K6zdk76DZHO4TvuXo3K-w-3Tz_UG0z8f-NA5Z1deOOvM7uKePec9mivsT0KlXToMLTvrS_m0rfVrWupcNtWWuQyMyFjPs-_iU7IZTorXeUeG6WQqFSzIjB2ssIETCoXqeF0qVBaqSH-QKE3-IzhVhlDzQPu4POySmwZCEszOlcH4FL9O56z_uOxfQOjaEroM5p2Kv_oJJJiBeGfRRCxGuFusTd0JYRv_gH9NagBHrb6tz0RtW3nn1lAF7iZorMGr9_ipennmLXUmwraFlgPnPP9rXRqux1nX7RLv8w%3D%3D)**

body:

---
Friend,
Ah, here we find ourselves once again -- the end of the month. As I’ve been talking with voters and hitting the campaign trail over the last 31 days, I can’t help but think that August 2021 is a huge step forward for this campaign.
I can feel the energy propelling us forward. People are joining this movement and playing their part. Needless to say, I feel so fortunate to be the face of this team.
And I’m also clear-eyed about the challenges ahead of us. This race is going to come down to funds. We’ll knock on every door and call every voter, but we’ll still need the funds to put up TV ads and send out mailers.
So here’s my ask: In these last few hours of August, [**can I count on you to donate to this campaign and help me become the next Congresswoman for AZ-02?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35014329/303785242/41694283?refcode=X_083121_EOM_G&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTNjNWMzNS1kNzBhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tpTSnwMjr_DTlqWsnMcT8HpKnWWriCyFaIBiu1FK3C4=)
The more we drive up our August tally, the more of a statement we make. So let’s go out there and end this month with an exclamation mark!
\-- Kirsten
